title: Head of E-commerce & Operations – High Fashion Brand (Shopify + ERP + AI Creative) Full-Time
description:
## About the Role

We are a rising high-fashion label with a strong luxury DNA (Ibiza & Palma). We are looking for a driven, creative and ambitious young professional to take full ownership of our e-commerce universe.



This is a true high-fashion role: you will shape the digital presence of a luxury brand, create editorial-level visuals, build exclusive concierge networks and drive growth with precision and style. Not a freelance gig, not a side job — this is your chance to become the central force behind a fashion brand on the rise.



## Key Requirements (Mandatory)

- Full-time dedication (8 hours per day) with real passion for high fashion  

- No other jobs, freelance clients or parallel activities — we want your full creative energy  

- Direct reporting to the founders  

- Immediate real-time responsiveness during working hours  

- Occasional weekend availability when campaigns or drops demand it  



As the brand grows, you will build and lead your own team of creatives and operators.



## Core Responsibilities



### 1. Shopify Management & Luxury Sales Optimization

- End-to-end Shopify management (online + POS)  

- Create high-end product pages with luxury copywriting and visual storytelling  

- Merchandising, upsell/cross-sell and conversion optimization at the highest level  



### 2. High-Fashion Campaigns & Growth

- Build and execute campaigns for Ibiza, Palma and our exclusive concierge channels  

- Design dedicated landing pages that feel like editorial fashion stories  



### 3. Concierge Network Development (Key Luxury Channel)

- Identify and onboard top concierges in hotels, yachts, private clubs and VIP services  

- Create personalized luxury landing pages and tracking systems  

- Grow this high-touch revenue channel within the most exclusive circles  



### 4. AI-Driven Content Creation & Editorial Visuals

- Generate stunning high-fashion lookbooks and model visuals with AI  

- Create packshots, short-form video content and luxury mood imagery  

- Edit with Canva / Photoshop and add sophisticated fashion-tone overlays  



### 5. ERP & Shopify Synchronization (Critical)

- Daily stock control and instant resolution of discrepancies  

- Seamless flow: 3PL ? Ibiza ? Palma stores  



### 6. Operations, Logistics & Customer Experience

- Daily order flow, shipping and returns with brand-aligned luxury service  



### 7. Performance & Reporting

- Weekly high-level sales & channel reports  

- Data-driven action plans to elevate the brand  



## Who We Are Looking For – Strong Young Women with Fashion Culture

- You live and breathe high fashion and luxury culture  

- Proven Shopify expertise + solid ERP experience (mandatory)  

- Sharp operational mind combined with strong creative and commercial flair  

- Fast, precise and highly responsive — you get things done beautifully  

- You have an eye for aesthetics and understand what makes a fashion brand desirable  



## Required Tools

- Shopify (expert level)  

- ERP systems  

- Canva / Photoshop  

- AI tools (Midjourney, Runway, etc.)  

- Landing page builders (Pagefly, Zeno or similar)  



## What We Do NOT Accept

- Freelancers with multiple clients  

- Candidates with other jobs or side activities  

- Slow or unresponsive profiles  

- Pure technicians without fashion feeling  



## Compensation

Competitive full-time base salary + **generous commission** on e-commerce sales and concierge network performance.  

Top performers have the real potential to earn **a lot** — your income grows directly with the brand’s success and has no upper limit!



## Application Process

Only candidates who complete the mandatory test will be considered:

1. Product page creation (high-fashion style)  

2. AI-generated luxury lookbook visual  

3. Campaign landing page structure  

4. ERP discrepancy scenario  



If you are a strong, ambitious young woman with a deep love for fashion culture and you want to build something iconic while earning very well — this is your role.

title: Senior Creator Support Specialist
description:
1stCollab

Senior Creator Support Specialist

Location: Remote – Philippines | Type: Full-Time | Department: Creator Operations



ABOUT 1STCOLLAB



At 1stCollab, content creators — on TikTok, YouTube, Instagram, and LinkedIn — are at the heart of what we do. Every week, we help hundreds of creators find sponsorships with brands like Notion, Character AI, and Framer. To do this, we're in direct contact with thousands of creators on a regular basis, guiding them from the 
nt we reach out about a potential partnership all the way through to content going live and payment in hand.



We're a fast-growing, creator-first platform built to connect brands with creators at scale. We move fast, iterate often, and put our creators at the center of everything we build. Our Creator Support team is a critical part of that experience — you're not just answering messages, you're the voice of the platform and the bridge between our creators and our team.





ROLE OVERVIEW



We're looking for a Senior Creator Support Specialist to join our growing operations team. This is a high-impact, fully remote role based in the Philippines. As a Creator Support tea
mber, you'll be responsible for communicating directly with creators — guiding them through the process of applying for brand campaigns, clarifying partnership details, and providing hands-on support as they produce and post their content.



It's a fun and genuinely unique opportunity. These creators are like mini-celebrities — many have hundreds of thousands, even millions, of followers — and you'll be talking to them directly. It's the kind of role where you'll have a great story to tell at the end of every week.



This is not an entry-level role. We're looking for someone with senior-level experience who can hit the ground running, navigate a fast-moving product environment, and represent 1stCollab with professionalism, warmth, and clarity.





WHAT YOU'LL DO



• Own high-quality, written support across both
 and 1stCollab's built-in platfor
ssaging — responding to creators with clarity, speed, and a natural, human tone

• Communicate directly with creators throughout the full partnership lifecycle: from initial outreach about a brand sponsorship, through content production, posting, and final payment

• Guide creators through the campaign application process, clarifying partnership details and keeping them informed every step of the way

• Provide hands-on support and guidance as creators produce and post their sponsored content

• Adapt quickly to ongoing product updates and process changes — at a startup like ours, the product evolves constantly, and you'll be expected to stay current and communicate changes confidently

• Collaborate with internal teams (operations, product, engineering) to escalate and resolve complex creator issues

• Maintain detailed and accurate records in our CRM, tracking creator interactions, feedback trends, and resolution outcomes

• Communicate with tea
mbers, management, and leadership across all levels with professionalism and clarity

• Contribute to internal documentation, support playbooks, and knowledge bases as the product grows

• Identify recurring patterns in creator feedback and proactively surface them to the broader team





WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Communication & Tone

• Exceptional written English — you write with confidence, clarity, and warmth in both
 and real-time chat environments

• You communicate like a real person, not a support script — our creators should feel like they're talking to someone who genuinely gets them, not an autoresponder

• Experience corresponding with a range of stakeholders — from creators to management and C-level contacts — adjusting tone and depth accordingly



Adaptability & Startup Mindset

• Demonstrated experience working in environments where products, processes, and priorities shift frequently — you don't just tolerate change, you thrive in it

• Ability to maintain quality and efficiency even when workflows or tooling are updated mid-stream

• A proactive, problem-solving mentality — you're the type to find a workaround before waiting to be told one exists



Technical Proficiency

• Solid working knowledge of CRM platforms (e.g., HubSpot, Zendesk, Salesforce, Intercom, or similar)

• Comfortable with technical tools and digital workflows — you can learn new platforms quickly without hand-holding

• Familiar with structured support systems, ticketing tools, tagging/routing, and basic reporting



Remote Work & Team Fit

• Proven track record of working successfully in a fully remote environment — you're self-managed, reliable, and communicative

• A stable, high-speed internet connection is required — this is non-negotiable for a remote support role

• You're the kind of teammate people actually enjoy working with. We value kindness, low ego, and genuine collaboration

• Flexible and available to support a schedule that aligns with our users' needs (US business hours or overlapping availability)





MUST-HAVES



• 2–3+ years of customer or creator support experience at a senior or specialist level

• Experience in fast-changing or high-growth environments where priorities shift quickly

• Stable, high-speed internet connection with a reliable remote workspace

• Schedule flexibility to support cross-timezone collaboration

• Proven ability to work well independently and as part of a remote team — references that speak to your work ethic and team presence

• Strong tracker management skills — able to build and maintain organized trackers with charts, conditional formatting, and dashboard-level visibility for the broader team

• Familiarity with Notion for documentation, project tracking, and team collaboration

• Proficient and proactive use of AI tools to improve efficiency and quality of work

• Comfortable communicating with third-party support teams (e.g., Stripe) via call when needed to resolve creator payment issues post-campaign





NICE-TO-HAVES



• Experience working with a US-based or globally distributed tech company

• Familiarity with startup culture and the pace that comes with it

• Proficiency with Slack and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Drive, Gmail)

• Hands-on experience using AI tools in a professional setting

• Background or interest in influencer marketing, creator economy, or digital advertising

• Mid-to-senior level team lead or mentorship experience — a plus as our team scales





WHY 1STCOLLAB



• Work with a collaborative, low-bureaucracy team that respects your expertise and autonomy

• Be part of a growing platform at an exciting inflection point — your work will have real impact

• Fully remote — work from anywhere in the Philippines with the flexibility to do your best work

• A team culture built on kindness, transparency, and continuous improvement

title: Senior E-commerce Manager (Amazon, Shopify, Faire)
description:
We are hiring a highly organized, proactive Senior Ecommerce Manager to help run and improve our fast-growing ecommerce brand Bare Babe. Bare Babe is a fast-growing bra accessories brand in the U.S. market. We sell premium nipple covers, sticky bras, boob tape, and related products.



This role will focus primarily on Amazon, with additional support across Shopify and Faire. We are looking for someone who can take ownership of ecommerce operations, keep recurring tasks on track, improve listings, and help us execute promotions, launches, and platform updates.



This is not a basic VA role. We want someone detail-oriented, dependable, commercially aware, and strong at follow-through.



Responsibilities

- Manage day-to-day ecommerce operations across Amazon, Shopify, and Faire

- Set up and improve product listings

- Help optimize Amazon listings for conversion and visibility

- Manage promotions, pricing updates, and recurring platform tasks

- Help troubleshoot platform issues and work with support when needed

- Review listings and customer feedback to identify improvements

- Support product launches and marketplace expansion

- Help keep backend systems clean, accurate, and organized



Qualifications

- Strong experience with Amazon Seller Central

- Experience with Shopify

- Experience with Faire is a plus

- Strong fluent English communication required

- Excellent organization and attention to detail

- Strong follow-through and ownership

- Comfortable working with data, systems, and recurring operational tasks

- Ecommerce brand experience strongly preferred



Position Details

- Full-time, 30–40 hours per week

- Remote

- Monthly salary

- Must have working hours that overlap reasonably with Thailand time to review work with the founder (Founder based in Thailand)



To Apply Please include:

- Your resume

- A short summary of your ecommerce experience

- Which platforms you’ve worked in

- Examples of brands or listings you’ve helped manage

- Your availability

title: Affiliate & Influencer Manager Support
description:
The role

Half the role is keeping operations tight. The other half is helping us grow.



We're a fast-moving affiliate team that's expanding into influencer and creator outreach. AI handles the heavy reporting — so your job isn't to pull numbers. It's to read them, act on them, and make sure nothing falls through the cracks while we scale.

You'll work directly with the affiliate manager and founder. The work is hands-on, the feedback is fast, and what you do shows up in revenue.



What you'll own

Affiliate operations (core admin) Manage affiliate requests — links, creatives, access. QA tracking, funnels, and offers to make sure everything works before and during launches. Run daily operations so the program doesn't miss a beat. This is the foundation. Get this right and everything else gets easier.



Influencer & creator outreach (new + growing) Source and reach out to relevant creators and influencers to bring into the program. Build and manage an outreach pipeline — track who's been contacted, who's responded, who's live. Follow up consistently and help onboard new partners with the right assets and information. You're building relationships that directly grow our reach.



Performance monitoring (AI-assisted) Our AI surfaces the data. Your job is to interpret it — catch a drop in EPC before it becomes a problem, flag an affiliate who's quietly scaling, identify what's underperforming and ask why. Then tell someone. You don't just read reports. You form a point of view.



Affiliate communication & follow-ups Push top performers to scale. Re-engage dormant affiliates. Make sure active partners always have what they need. You're the connective tissue between the program and the people running it.

Growth support & insights Spot a creative that's fatiguing and suggest a new angle. Flag a reactivation opportunity. Notice what's working and push to do more of it. Small observations compound into real revenue. You're expected to bring ideas, not just complete tasks.



TikTok & creator support (secondary) Track trending creatives, help source and test new creators, keep growth experiments organized. Not the main act — but a fast-growing one.



What we're looking for

High ownership and initiative

Sharp attention to detail

Clear communicator

Organized under pressure

Can form insights from data

Comfortable with outreach

Bonus: Experience with ClickBank, Digistore24, performance funnels, or TikTok/influencer workflows — but we'll back the right person regardless.



This role is not for you if...

You want a checklist, not a challenge

You treat "support" as code for "just follow instructions"

You shut down when the process isn't fully mapped out

You're not motivated by having skin in the game



What you get

A real seat at the table — with pay that reflects how well you perform. You'll see the numbers, influence decisions, and grow with the program. The base gets you stable. The bonus rewards you for actually moving the needle. And as the program scales, so does your ceiling.



How to apply

Send your application to 
 with the subject line: I'm interested

Please include your resume and a short note on your background and why this role caught your attention

Daphne

title: IA Content Creator
description:
The Opportunity

We're looking for a full-time AI Content Creator to join our creative team. Your mission: produce unlimited AI-generated video assets  B-rolls, UGC-style content, before/after sequences, and any visual content needed for our Meta ads.

This isn't just about using AI tools it's about mastering them. You'll be responsible for transforming creative briefs into high-quality video assets that look natural, engaging, and conversion-ready. The goal is to build a content engine that can produce volume without sacrificing quality.

Starting point: approximately 50 assets per week. Ultimate goal: automate and optimize your workflow to produce unlimited content at scale.

This is a long-term opportunity. We value consistency, mastery, and reward performance with bonuses when your content contributes to winning ads.



What You'll Be Doing

AI Video Generation

Creating high-quality AI-generated video content using tools like Kling, Runway, Pika, Sora, Luma, or similar platforms

Producing diverse content types: B-rolls, lifestyle scenes, product shots, UGC-style videos, before/after transformations, transitions

Delivering content in various formats and durations (from 2-second inserts to 1-minute UGC sequences)

Prompt Engineering

Crafting precise, detailed prompts that consistently produce high-quality outputs

Understanding how different AI models interpret instructions and optimizing prompts accordingly

This is the core skill the quality of your prompts directly determines the quality of the content

Brief Interpretation & Delivery

Receiving detailed video briefs via Loom from our Creative Strategist

Translating creative visions into finished AI-generated assets that match the brief exactly

Managing tasks through our Notion workspace and delivering to designated Google Drive folders

Quality Control & Optimization

Ensuring every asset meets quality standards: natural movement, proper lighting, no AI artifacts, correct aspect ratios

Continuously improving your workflow to increase output volume while maintaining quality

Finding ways to automate repetitive tasks and scale production toward unlimited output



What We're Looking For

Required Skills (Non-Negotiable)

Proven experience with AI video generation tools (Kling, Runway, Pika, Sora, Luma, or similar)  you must already know how to use these tools

Strong prompt engineering skills  you understand how to write prompts that produce consistent, high-quality results

Ability to produce volume without sacrificing quality  speed and precision matter equally

Understanding of video formats, aspect ratios, and technical requirements for social media ads

Excellent attention to detail  spotting and fixing AI artifacts, unnatural movements, or quality issues

Portfolio showcasing AI-generated video content you've personally created

Personality Traits

Process-Driven: You thrive in structured environments with clear workflows and can manage multiple tasks efficiently

Quality-Obsessed: You don't deliver anything that doesn't meet your own high standards

Self-Motivated: You can work independently, manage your time effectively, and deliver consistently without micromanagement

Fast Learner: AI tools evolve constantly  you stay updated on new features, models, and techniques

Highly Responsive: You communicate clearly, respond promptly, and flag issues before they become problems

Nice to Have

Previous experience creating content for e-commerce brands or Meta Ads

Experience with multiple AI video platforms (versatility across tools)

Understanding of what makes ads convert (hooks, storytelling, emotional triggers)

Experience with AI avatar/UGC tools like Arcads, HeyGen, or Synthesia

Basic video editing skills for post-processing (upscaling, color correction, stabilization)



Our Workflow

We have a streamlined, fully automated process in place:

You receive tasks in our Notion workspace with clear briefs and deadlines

Each task includes a detailed Loom video explaining exactly what's needed

You create the AI-generated content using your preferred tools

You upload completed assets to the Google Drive folder linked to each Notion task

Our video editors take your assets and incorporate them into final ad creatives



What We Offer

Base Salary: $1,280/month for 40 hours/week ($8/hour)

Trial Period: 1-month evaluation period

Performance Bonuses: After the trial period, earn bonuses based on output and content performance

Tool Flexibility: Use whatever AI tools work best for you  we care about results, not specific platforms

Clear Processes: Everything is organized in Notion with detailed Loom briefs  no guesswork

Remote Flexibility: Work from anywhere with a stable internet connection

Growth Opportunity: Be part of a scaling brand with long-term potential



How to Apply

To be considered for this position, please complete our application form with:

Your CV/Resume

Portfolio of AI-Generated Videos  show us your best AI-generated content (Google Drive, Vimeo, or similar link)

Answers to this Form : 

Availability confirmation for 40 hours/week

title: EBAY / POSHMARK LISTING & MANAGING SUPERSTAR WANTED
description:
Part-Time Virtual Assistant

eBay / Poshmark Fashion Accessories Seller 

20 hours/week • Remote • Long-term



About This Role

I run a growing eBay store in the USA specializing in fashion accessories and I am looking for a reliable, detail-oriented VA based in the Philippines to take over the day-to-day selling tasks listed below. This is a part-time role with room to grow into full-time as the business scales. I want someone who can work independently, communicate proactively, and treat this store like their own.



Quick Facts

• Hours: 20 hours per week to start, flexible scheduling

• Pay: Negotiable, commensurate with experience

• How to apply: Onlinejobs.ph message or

• Duration: Long-term preferred — I am not looking for a one-off hire

• Tools used: eBay Seller Hub, Poshmark, Depop, Google Sheets, basic



Your 7 Core Tasks

The table below describes everything you will be responsible for. All tasks are done inside eBay Seller Hub, Poshmark, Depop, or Google Sheets — no special software required.



# Task What it involves Frequency

1 Relisting items Check sold orders from the past 30 days that have positive feedback. Create draft listings in Seller Hub using Sell Similar for high-velocity SKUs. Maintain a stock of 10 drafts per top SKU so the owner can publish quickly from mobile. Daily / Weekly

2 Customer service Monitor and respond to buyer messages in eBay Seller Hub. Handle refund requests professionally and follow eBay Money Back Guarantee policy. Escalate unusual cases to the owner. Daily

3 Dispute monitoring Check the Resolution Centre daily for any open disputes or cases. Respond promptly with tracking information, photos, or other evidence. Keep a log of all disputes and outcomes in Google Sheets. Daily

4 Negative feedback removal Identify any new negative or neutral feedback. Attempt to resolve the buyer's issue and request feedback revision where appropriate. Follow eBay's feedback revision process correctly. As needed

5 eBay seller health Check the Seller Dashboard weekly for any defect rate warnings, late shipment flags, or policy alerts. Report any issues to the owner immediately with a brief summary. Weekly

6 Crosslisting List active eBay fashion accessories inventory on Poshmark and Depop. Adapt titles and descriptions to suit each platform’s audience and SEO. Keep pricing consistent across platforms. Monitoring Shipstation Inventory prior to listing.

7 Blocking buyers After owner approval or a clear policy violation, add problematic buyers to the Blocked Buyer List in eBay Account Settings. Keep a Google Sheet log of blocked buyers with reason and date. As needed





What I Am Looking For

Must Have

• Proven experience listing and managing an eBay seller account (Seller Hub, not just buying)

• Familiarity with eBay policies: Money Back Guarantee, defect rates, feedback removal

• Experience with Poshmark and/or Depop listing

• Comfortable writing professional customer service replies in English

• Reliable internet connection and available during agreed hours

• Able to work independently with minimal supervision



Nice to Have

• Experience with fashion accessories, jewelry, belts, hats or similar categories

• Google Sheets experience for logging and tracking

• Familiarity with eBay’s Cassini search algorithm and listing optimization

• Experience handling eBay disputes and escalations

• Experience solving problems with ChatGBT or Claude



What I Offer

• Consistent part-time income with potential to grow to full-time

• Clear task list with no guessing— you will always know what to do

• Respectful, straightforward working relationship

• Paid training period to learn my specific workflow

• Long-term opportunity as the business scales



How to Apply

Please send me a message that includes ALL of the following. Applications missing any item will not be considered. 



• A short introduction about yourself (3–5 sentences)

• How many years you have managed eBay seller accounts and what categories you sold

• Your experience with Poshmark and/or Depop

• One example of how you handled a difficult buyer or dispute

• Your available hours per week and preferred schedule (Philippine time)

• Your rate in USD per hour

• 

This position requires close attention to detail please respond with "Kent I am Your eBay Expert!" in the subject line of your response to this job posting.  I look forward to hearing from candidates who have read this post carefully.





Thank you for your interest — I look forward to finding the right long-term partner for this role.

title: Outbound Sales | Speaking Engagement Booking Agent
description:
I am an author and speaker who shares my story as a survivor of human trafficking to inspire healing and personal transformation in professionals, and communities.



My work has reached colleges, universities, and organizations where real conversations are being had. I’m expanding into more corporate spaces, and I’m looking for an outbound sales agent who can confidently secure high-value speaking engagements ($25K+).



Your Role: 



 • Identify and connect with decision-makers (HR leaders, event directors, university coordinators)



 • Lead strategic cold outreach 
, LinkedIn)



 • Position speaking engagements in a way that resonates with the organization’s goals and creates demand.



 • Stay consistent with follow-up and relationship-building.



 • Negotiate and close deals that reflect the value of the work. 



Compensation



 • Base pay + commission



 • Commission tied to closed deals



 • Strong earning potential for the right person



This Role Is For You If You:



 • Have experience closing $25K+ deals 

 • Know how to turn cold outreach into conversations and opportunities

 • Are comfortable communicating with decision-makers and leadership

 • Understand how to present value confidently

 • Want your work to be tied to both impact and income



Skillset



1. Strong communication skills – you know how to connect

2. Consistency in follow-up – you don’t let opportunities fall through

3. Emotional awareness – you can represent a powerful story with respect and care 

4. Self-leadership – you take initiative and move without needing constant direction



What Success Looks Like:



 • A consistent pipeline of corporate and university opportunities

 • Signed contracts for booked speaking engagements at the $25K+ level

 • A clear role in growing both the message and the business



Before You Apply:



This role focuses on creating and securing opportunities through outbound outreach.

You’ll have the space to lead, test, and refine your approach.



To Apply:



Please answer the following questions before you apply:



Tell me about a time you created an opportunity from nothing and turned it into a closed deal. What specific steps did you take, and what was the outcome?



What would it mean for you to work with a survivor of human trafficking?

title: Mid/Snjr Visual Designer / Graphic Designer (SaaS)
description:
About the Role



This is a hands-on design role sitting within a fast-moving B2B SaaS marketing team. You’ll be across everything from campaign creatives and social content to EDMs and brand assets — producing high-quality work at pace, across multiple formats and channels.



What You’ll Be Doing



Content Production (Approx. 80%)



- Social and paid ad creatives (Meta, LinkedIn, and others)

- Campaign rollouts and design variations across the funnel

- Collaborating with the growth team to bring strategy to life visually

- High-volume output without compromising on quality or intentionality

- Social media content (LinkedIn, Instagram,
)

- EDM design (HubSpot)

- Marketing collateral — one-pagers, brochures, sales enablement assets

- Supporting blog and visual content creation



Website & Landing Pages (Approx. 10%) 



- Landing page layouts and updates

- Website content refinements and visual improvements

- Basic UX thinking applied to conversion-focused pages



Brand & Identity (Approx. 10%) 



- Contributing to visual identity and brand consistency

- Supporting brand guidelines, templates, and rollout



About You



You’re a junior-to-mid-weight designer who:



- Has a strong foundation in design principles — hierarchy, layout, typography, clarity

- Can work at pace without letting quality slip

- Brings ideas to the table, not just execution

- Is comfortable switching between formats and briefs

title: Full-Time Short-Form Video Editor (Instagram Reels & YouTube Shorts)
description:

About the Content



I create travel content focused on flights, deals, and behind-the-scenes experiences. The style is a mix of:



Vlog-style clips

Voiceover-driven videos (no talking head)

Occasional direct-to-camera/talking head



The goal is not just aesthetic travel content — it’s engaging, informative, and personality-driven.



What This Role Looks Like

Editing multiple reels per day (this is high volume)

Turning raw footage + loose ideas into polished 15–30 second videos

Occasionally editing longer Shorts (up to ~3 minutes for flight reviews)

Working quickly and iterating fast



What You’ll Do

Cut footage down aggressively (remove pauses, filler, dead space)

Maintain fast pacing that keeps retention high

Add high-quality captions and text overlays that grab attention and are on-brand

Shape strong hooks and structure (not just assemble clips)

Use green screen editing when needed

Work with my real voice for voiceovers (no AI voiceovers)

Follow and apply my brand colors and visual style





You’re a great fit if you:



Have experience editing for Reels/TikTok/Shorts

Know how to make videos feel fast and engaging

Bonus Skills (Strong Plus)

Content ideation and brainstorming

Ability to research trends and adapt them to my niche

Understanding of hooks, retention, and what makes content perform



Important Notes

All videos are vertical (9:16)

Captions are required on all videos

Must follow my branding (colors, style, tone)

No AI voiceovers — only my real voice

This role requires speed, taste, and attention to detail



Hiring Process

I will be hiring multiple editors for a paid test project.

From there, I will select one or more editors to work with long-term.



To Apply



Please include:



Examples of short-form videos you’ve edited (Reels/TikTok/Shorts)

Your turnaround time for short-form videos
salary: $4 to $10 per hour depending on experien

title: COMMERCIAL LENDING ADMIN VA
description:
JOB TITLE

COMMERCIAL LENDING ADMIN VA

===========================



JOB DESCRIPTION

We are an Australian commercial funding business based on the east coast of Australia. We match borrowers - builders, developers, landowners, and commercial property owners - with private investors and institutional lenders. We are hiring a full-time Commercial Lending Admin VA to take over the administrative side of our operations.



Your day-to-day work will involve setting up and managing document data rooms in Google Drive for each deal, collecting and organising all required documents from clients, following up when documents are overdue, managing diaries, and handling general admin tasks across all active deals. You will be building the filing and document management system from scratch - there is no existing CRM or structured process in place.



If you have experience in finance administration, credit file processing, loan administration, compliance document management, or similar roles where you were responsible for collecting, organising, and tracking documents across multiple matters or cases, we want to hear from you.



---



WHAT WE OFFER



* Stable, long-term role with an established Australian business

* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* PHP 30,000 starting salary during probation

* PHP 33,500 + PHP 1,500 benefits post probation (approximately 1 month)

* 13th month pay

* Government-mandated benefits

* Fully remote - work from home



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



* Create and manage Google Drive data rooms (shared folders) for each deal - labelling and organising documents by type such as valuations, assets and liabilities statements, contracts, and title documents

* Collect all required documents from clients for each active deal

* Follow up with clients who have not provided documents on time via
 or phone

* Track what has been received and what is still outstanding across all deals

* Handle day-to-day admin tasks assigned by both principals

* Organise files,
s, and deal records

* Manage calendars, schedule meetings, and coordinate follow-ups



---



REQUIREMENTS



* Understanding of finance and basic credit files - terms like valuation, assets and liabilities, settlement, and security should be familiar to you. Prior experience in finance, credit, or lending admin is strongly preferred

* Strong document management and organisational skills - you will be building the filing system from scratch across multiple simultaneous deals

* Google Drive proficiency - comfortable creating shared folders, managing permissions, and maintaining clean file structures

* Proactive follow-up habits - comfortable chasing clients for outstanding documents without waiting to be asked

* Professional written and verbal communication - you will have direct client contact for follow-ups and admin tasks

* Ability to manage competing priorities from two managers without dropping things

* High attention to detail and personal standards - messy or incomplete work will not be accepted

* Reliable computer and stable internet connection



---



NICE TO HAVE



* Prior experience in Australian commercial lending, broking, or finance administration

* Experience setting up document management systems or data rooms from scratch

* Calendar management and executive admin support experience



---



SCHEDULE



* Full-time, 40 hours per week

* Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM

* Australian timezone (AEST/AEDT)



---



Once your application is submitted, you will receive an
 from us with the next steps and instructions.

title: Digital Marketing Campaign Manager (Australia)
description:
Australian Agency | Full-Time Remote | Long-Term | Above-Market Pay

media — from strategy through to execution, optimisation, and reporting.

, Instagram, LinkedIn)

WHO YOU ARE

, chat, and video

title: Operations Manager / Team Leader – Microloans Company (Remote – Philippines)
description:
We are a Canadian company based in Quebec, operating in the microloans industry across Canada, and we are looking for a highly organized and proactive Operations Manager / Team Leader to support and manage multiple areas of our daily operations.



This is a key leadership support role for someone who is comfortable working in a fast-paced financial services environment and managing responsibilities independently.



The selected candidate will help handle important operational tasks that leadership does not have time to manage directly.



About the Role



This is a multi-task operations leadership position, not a single-task job.

You will be involved in collections coordination, approvals, scheduling, documentation management, and team support.



Key Responsibilities



• Oversee collections activities related to microloan clients across Canada

• Review and approve operational entries and internal requests

• Organize and maintain company files and documentation

• Prepare and manage employee work schedules

• Coordinate daily operational tasks across tea
mbers

• Support management with administrative and operational priorities

• Suggest workflow improvements and efficiency strategies

• Take initiative to improve systems and processes

• Help ensure smooth operations across departments



Important Requirement



The candidate must feel comfortable working with:



• Microloan clients

• Collections processes

• Operations within a financial services environment

• Supporting and coordinating employees remotely



Experience working in lending, collections, financial services, or similar industries is a strong advantage.



Requirements



• Strong multitasking and organizational skills

• Previous experience in operations, coordination, or team leadership

• Experience with collections (required)

• Fast learner with strong problem-solving ability

• Strong computer and digital tools proficiency

• Ability to take initiative without waiting for instructions

• Excellent communication skills

• Fully bilingual in Filipino and English (required)

• Additional languages are an asset



Ideal Candidate



You take ownership of responsibilities.

You are proactive and solution-oriented.

You help leadership stay organized and efficient.

You think ahead and suggest improvements.

You are comfortable working in a structured financial environment.



Position Details



• Remote position (Philippines-based applicants only)

• Full-time long-term opportunity

• Work with a stable Canadian company

• Growth potential within the organization

• Competitive salary based on experience



If you are reliable, proactive, and comfortable managing multiple responsibilities in a financial operations environment — we would love to hear from you.



Please apply and tell us why you are the right fit for this role.

title: Senior Collections Agent – Microloans (Remote – Philippines)
description:
We are a Canadian company based in Quebec, operating in the microloans industry across Canada, and we are currently looking for an experienced Senior Collections Agent specializing in deep / hard collections.



This role is ideal for someone confident handling overdue accounts, negotiating payment solutions, and maintaining professionalism while working with challenging collection cases.



Key Responsibilities

• Perform deep collections follow-ups with late-stage clients

• Contact clients by phone, message, and
 to secure payments

• Negotiate repayment arrangements when appropriate

• Maintain accurate records of collection activity

• Follow company collection procedures and compliance standards

• Work toward daily and weekly recovery targets

• Communicate updates clearly with the management team



Important Requirement



Candidates must be comfortable handling:



• Late-stage delinquent accounts

• Difficult collection conversations

• Financially sensitive client situations

• Performance-based collection targets



Experience in microloans, lending, or financial collections is strongly preferred.



Requirements



• Proven experience in deep or hard collections (required)

• Experience in lending, microloans, or financial services (strong advantage)

• Strong negotiation and persuasion skills

• Ability to stay professional under pressure

• Results-driven mindset

• Strong communication skills in English

• Filipino language fluency required

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment



Ideal Candidate



You are confident speaking with overdue clients.

You know how to recover payments professionally and effectively.

You stay calm in difficult conversations.

You are reliable, persistent, and results-oriented.



Position Details



• Remote position (Philippines-based applicants only)

• Full-time long-term opportunity

• Work with a stable Canadian financial services company

• Performance-based growth opportunities

• Competitive salary based on experience

title: Experienced Project Manager (Amazon FBA | Full-Time)
description:
Join a Fast-Growing E-Commerce Brand Based in Singapore



We’re a fast-growing Singapore-based Amazon FBA brand, and we’re looking for a strong Amazon Project Manager to help us scale.



This is not a coordinator role.

You’ll be managing people, systems, and execution across our Amazon operations.



We’re looking for someone who already knows the Amazon backend and can operate independently without being hand-held.



What you’ll be doing



You’ll manage a team of around 6 people across listings, design, and operations.



You’ll coordinate shipping plans with suppliers, freight forwarders, and inspection agents.

You’ll review and improve product listings, making sure keywords, images, and backend data are correct.

You’ll track inventory, sales, and campaigns, and keep our spreadsheets and dashboards accurate.

You’ll work closely with our design, listing, and ops teams to keep launches and updates on track.



You’ll take part in internal training, including AI-powered workflows.

AI is a tool, not a crutch. We expect you to use it to think better, work faster, and improve outcomes, not to blindly paste output.



You’ll help plan projects, improve processes, and make sure details like product size tiers and listing data are correct before they cost us money.



Tools you’ll use



Amazon Seller Central

Google Sheets and Docs

Notion

Helium 10

DataDive

Zoom



What we’re looking for



At least 5 years of relevant experience, ideally in Amazon FBA or e-commerce operations.

Real experience with Amazon listings, inventory tracking, and backend workflows.

Strong attention to detail and the ability to communicate clearly with different teams.

Able to work independently, prioritise well, and adapt when things change.

Strong problem-solving, coordination, and analytical skills.

Proactive, open-minded, and able to work well in a fast-moving team.



Working hours



Monday to Friday, 12 PM to 10 PM Singapore time

1 hour break

Remote, 44 hours per week



How to apply



Please include:



A short introduction about yourself and why you’re a good fit

Links or references to past Amazon FBA work

A brief explanation of your most recent role

A short video introduction if possible

Clear details of your Amazon FBA experience



Important



Only candidates with real Amazon FBA experience will be considered.

Applications without references or relevant background will be ignored.

If you are new to Amazon or need training, this is not the right role for you.

title: Senior Teramind Specialist (Remote)
description:
We are seeking a senior-level Teramind Specialist to support ongoing operations and project-based deployments across our business.

This role is suited to an experienced professional who can operate autonomously and manage the Teramind platform end-to-end with confidence and precision.



Role Overview

You will be responsible for the deployment, configuration, and ongoing management of Teramind, ensuring it is implemented effectively to support operational visibility, compliance, and user activity monitoring.

This is a remote contractor role with flexible working arrangements, with availability aligned to Australian (AEST) business hours where required.



Key Responsibilities

• Deploy and configure Teramind across environments

• Design, implement, and maintain monitoring policies

• Configure and manage user activity tracking and controls

• Ensure accurate, reliable, and consistent data capture

• Generate clear, structured reports and insights

• Maintain system effectiveness and address configuration issues

• Operate independently across both setup and ongoing management



Required Experience

• Strong hands-on experience with Teramind (UAM, DLP, or related modules)

• Proven ability to manage Teramind end-to-end without supervision

• Experience configuring policies and monitoring user activity

• Strong understanding of Teramind architecture, agents, and deployment models

• Ability to diagnose and resolve platform or configuration issues

• Experience producing meaningful and accurate monitoring reports



Working Arrangement

• Remote

• Contractor engagement

• Ongoing long-term work with a consistent pipeline

• Flexible hours with partial alignment to AEST business hours



Application Requirements

To apply, include the following:

1. Teramind Experience

• Outline your direct experience with Teramind

• Specify modules, environments, and scale of deployment

2. Policy Configuration Approach

• How you design and implement monitoring policies

• How you ensure policies are effective and aligned to requirements

3. Reporting and Analysis

• How you analyse user activity

• How you structure and present reports

4. Example Work

• Brief examples of previous Teramind deployments or configurations

• Types of monitoring or reporting you have implemented



This role requires a high level of autonomy, accuracy, and technical competence. If you are confident managing Teramind in a production environment and can deliver reliable outcomes without supervision, we are interested in hearing from you.



Submit your CV and responses for consideration.

title: Video Editor — Escape Agency Burnout • One Brand, World-Class Standards
description:
You’ve done the agency thing. Fast turnarounds, demanding clients, and a culture that rewards hours logged over quality produced. You’re tired.

You want a role where quality actually matters. Where “good enough” isn’t good enough. Where you can slow down enough to do genuinely excellent work — and be part of a team that appreciates it.

This is that role.



THE ROLE

Market Leaders is a lean coaching and marketing education brand. You’ll produce 4–6 long-form videos per month (10–60 minutes each) — YouTube, course content, webinars — with clear briefs, direct creative collaboration, and enough time to do it properly. Hormozi-level quality standards. Peaceful & Profitable culture. No 11 PM revision requests.



WHAT YOU BRING

• 2+ years of long-form video editing — agency or in-house

• Mastery of at least one professional editing tool

• Strong audio mixing — dialogue, music, noise reduction

• Ability to handle consistent volume without sacrificing quality

• Collaborative, proactive, and low-drama



NICE TO HAVE (not required)

WHAT YOU GET

• SGD $1,000–1,200/month • Remote, flexible

• No micromanagement, no impossible timelines

• Quarterly paid team retreats

• A team that values craft over speed



A NOTE ON CULTURE

We have a strict no brilliant jerks policy. Skills matter deeply here — so does how you show up for the people around you.

You’re our kind of person if you deliver excellent work without creating friction, take ownership without needing applause, and genuinely celebrate when a teammate wins.

High Performance. Zero Drama. Peaceful & Profitable — we mean all three.



High standards, sustainable pace. This is your sanctuary from agency burnout.

?

nts. From cameras to premium photo prints and memory restoration, everything we do is about helping families live fully and remember what matters.



Role Overview

We’re looking for a creative and detail-oriented Social Media, Marketing & eCommerce Manager to support our online growth.



This role is focused on content creation, product uploads, SEO, and ongoing website improvements — helping turn visitors into customers and keeping our online store active, engaging, and easy to use.



You’ll be working closely with our team to execute ideas, not just plan them.

• Schedule and publish posts across Instagram,
, and other platforms

-Fun Company Get-Togethers

-An Annual Christmas Party that our team truly looks forward to

-Year-End Package



We make sure our team not only works hard, but also feels appreciated and celebrated.



About the Role

We are currently looking for four (4) experienced AU Tax Accountants to join our growing team.

In this role, you will work closely with an Australian firm handling tax compliance and accounting services for a diverse client base. This position offers the opportunity to further develop your expertise in Australian taxation while working in a supportive and collaborative environment.



Key Responsibilities

-Prepare and review Australian Tax Returns, BAS, and Financial Statements

-Ensure compliance with Australian tax regulations and legislation

-Provide tax planning support or advice to clients or internal stakeholders

-Analyze financial statements and provide insights where needed

-Maintain accurate financial records and documentation



What We’re Looking For

-2–5+ years of Australian Tax and Business Services experience

-Ability to prepare tax returns for Individuals, Partnerships, Companies (including Group Companies), and Trusts

-Experience in preparing and reviewing Financial Statements

-Solid understanding of Australian tax legislation, including:

Capital Gains Tax (CGT)

Fringe Benefits Tax (FBT)

Division 7A compliance and application

-Experience in preparing IAS and BAS

-Experience in tax planning is an advantage

-Strong analytical and communication skills

-Proficient in using Xero, XPM, and other accounting software

-Positive and proactive attitude with a fun team spirit

-Bookkeeping experience is a plus



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: Real Estate Video Editor
description:
Real Estate Video Editor (Part-Time, Remote, Long-Term)



Quick Overview

Schedule - Part-time to start (~20 hrs/week), with potential to grow full-time

Hours - Flexible — work on your own schedule, meet deadlines

Rate - Competitive — based on experience (please include your rate in application)

Software - Adobe Premiere Pro required | After Effects a plus

Start Date - ASAP — we are actively hiring





About Jonez Filmz

We are a real estate and commercial media company based in Spokane, Washington. We shoot professional listing videos, walk-throughs, agent promos, and business content for clients across Spokane and North Idaho. We are a fast-growing team and we take pride in delivering clean, polished, high-quality content that helps our clients sell homes and grow their businesses.

We are looking for a reliable, long-term tea
mber — not a one-off freelancer. If you are great at your craft and want stable, ongoing work with a US-based company, this role is for you.



What You Will Be Doing

Editing real estate listing videos (walk-throughs, highlight reels, drone footage)

Cutting agent promo videos and social media clips

Color grading footage shot on Sony A7S III and Sony A7 III

Syncing cuts to music and following provided style guides

Delivering exports in correct formats for MLS, social media, and web

Communicating clearly via messaging about project status and questions



Requirements

Minimum 2 years of video editing experience

Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro — this is non-negotiable

Strong sense of pacing, music sync, and visual flow

Reliable internet connection and computer capable of handling 4K footage

Ability to meet 24–48 hour turnaround times on standard projects

Portfolio or sample work showing real estate or cinematic video edits



Nice to Have

Experience with Adobe After Effects (motion graphics, titles, transitions)

Previous real estate video editing experience

Familiarity with MLS video standards



How to Apply

Send your application with the following:

A short introduction — tell us about yourself and your editing background

Link to your portfolio or 2–3 sample videos you have edited

Your hourly or monthly rate

Your availability (hours per week, time zone)



Applications without a portfolio link will not be considered. We read every application and will respond to shortlisted candidates within 3–5 business days.

title: Google Ads Specialist - Australian Company
description:
PET LET Holiday Homes (
) is South Australia's leading pet-friendly holiday rental company, operating for 17 years across the Fleurieu Peninsula with approximately 60 properties. We run a direct bookings business and Google Ads is a key channel.



---



## The Role



We have two active Google Ads campaigns that need structural cleanup and ongoing optimisation. This is not a startup account — there's real history, real data, and a clear brief. We know what good looks like and we need someone who does too.



We have two established campaigns that need structural cleanup and ongoing optimisation — restoring a clean, well-siloed structure with tight keyword discipline and ads written to match search intent directly.



Once both campaigns are performing well, we're open to setting up a third experimental campaign.



---



## What We're Looking For



- Proven Google Ads search campaign experience

- Strong grasp of campaign structure, match types, and negative keywords

- Comfortable with Google Analytics and conversion tracking

- Ability to run A/B tests using Google Ads to generate marketing intelligence — offers, headlines, and ad copy variants

- Works independently, communicates clearly, reports concisely

- A weekly summary report: what changed, what's working, what needs attention



Our monthly budget is ~$1,000 AUD.



---



## How to Apply



Please send:



1. A brief intro — who you are and what accounts you've managed

2. **Two or three specific examples** of Google Ads problems you've diagnosed and fixed — what was wrong, what you did, what the outcome was. Real numbers preferred.

3. How are you using AI to improve Google Ads performance?

4. How do you approach a new campaign? How do you prepare?

5. Your availability to start

6. Your resume



Applications without concrete examples will not be considered.

title: Virtual Bookkeeper (QuickBooks Expert) – Detail-Oriented & Accounting-Focused
description:
We are looking for a highly detail-oriented Virtual Bookkeeper with strong accounting knowledge and hands-on experience using QuickBooks to provide immediate support for client bookkeeping. This role is ideal for someone confident working with financial data, who understands accounting principles, and takes pride in maintaining accurate, organized, and audit-ready books across multiple client accounts.



This is a remote, flexible position, starting at approximately 20 hours per week, with the opportunity to grow into a full-time role (up to 40 hours/week) based on performance and workload.



Key Responsibilities:

• As our Virtual Bookkeeper, your primary responsibility will be managing and maintaining accurate financial records for multiple clients. Duties include:

• Managing day-to-day bookkeeping tasks using QuickBooks

• Recording, classifying, and maintaining accurate financial transactions

• Performing bank and credit card reconciliations with precision and consistency

• Maintaining clean, organized, and up-to-date books for each client account

• Preparing and reviewing financial reports (Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

• Monitoring accounts for discrepancies, errors, or missing transactions

• Managing accounts payable and accounts receivable, including invoicing and expense tracking

• Ensuring all financial data is accurate, complete, and compliant with standard accounting practices

• Meeting weekly and monthly deadlines across multiple client accounts

• Maintaining strict confidentiality of all financial information





Qualifications:

• To succeed in this role, you must have a strong foundation in bookkeeping and accounting:

• Proven experience in bookkeeping and advanced proficiency in QuickBooks (required)

• Solid understanding of accounting principles (debits & credits, reconciliations, financial reporting)

• Exceptional attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong organizational and time management skills

• Ability to manage multiple client accounts simultaneously

• Proficiency in Google Workspace and Microsoft Excel/Spreadsheets

• Ability to identify and resolve discrepancies independently

• Strong written and verbal communication skills

• Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

• A proactive, problem-solving mindset



How to Apply:

Please submit the following via OLJ messaging only:

1. A brief message outlining your bookkeeping experience and QuickBooks expertise, including the types of accounts you have managed

Important Notes

 or other platforms will not be considered

• Only candidates with strong bookkeeping and accounting experience will be shortlisted

title: Virtual Assistance VA Cold Caller - Real Estate
description:
REAL ESTATE COLD CALLER — VIRTUAL ASSISTANT

Full-Time | Remote | Philippines-Based | Pacific Standard Time Overlap Required



ABOUT US

We are a real estate wholesaling company based in Washington State, Pacific Northwest. We find off-market properties by connecting directly with homeowners who may be ready to sell. We do not list on the MLS — we find deals before anyone else does.

We are looking for a reliable, confident cold caller to contact homeowners from our targeted lead lists, qualify motivated sellers, and help us build our acquisition pipeline.



WHAT YOU WILL DO



Make outbound calls daily using Enzo Dialer (training provided)

Follow our proven script to identify motivated sellers

Target lead types: absentee owners, pre-foreclosures, probate, tired landlords, high-equity owners

Ask qualifying questions: property condition, timeline, motivation, price expectations

Log every call outcome accurately in CRM as you go — not at end of day

Flag hot leads to the acquisitions manager immediately via agreed channel

Attend a brief weekly check-in call (30 minutes, Fridays)

Send a written end-of-day summary every working day

Meet daily and weekly call volume and contact rate targets





WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR

Must Have:



1 to 3 years of verified cold calling experience — real estate, wholesaling, or high-volume outbound sales preferred

Documented track record on OnlineJobs.ph — strong ratings and verifiable reviews from past employers required

Clear, confident spoken English — neutral or light accent

Strong active listening skills

Reliable internet connection and quality headset

Disciplined about following scripts and logging data consistently

Responsive during working hours

Treats this like a full-time job — shows up every day, on time, without being chased



Nice to Have:



Experience with auto-dialers (Enzo, Mojo, or similar)

Familiarity with CRM

Real estate knowledge (not required — we will train you)





SCHEDULE AND COMPENSATION



Hours: Monday through Friday, 8:00am–5:00pm PST with a one-hour unpaid lunch break (taken at 12:00pm or 1:00pm). Minimum 4-hour PST overlap required.

Pay: $3–$5/hour base depending on verified experience

Performance bonus available for leads that convert to closed deals





HOW TO APPLY

To be considered, your application must include all four of the following. Applications missing any item will not be reviewed.



A voice recording (60–90 seconds) — introduce yourself and tell us why you want this role

Your available hours in Pacific Standard Time

Your requested hourly rate

Your OnlineJobs.ph profile link showing verifiable ratings and reviews from past employers — minimum 1 year of cold calling experience required





One note before you apply: This role requires consistent daily execution — script adherence, accurate CRM logging, and proactive communication every single day. If you are looking for flexible or casual work, this is not the right fit. If you are looking for a stable long-term role where reliability is rewarded, we want to hear from you.

Flag hot leads immediately — do not wait until end of shift

Your requested hourly rate

title: Accounting and Payroll Specialist (Part time)
description:
About Digibeacon

Digibeacon is a trusted Solutions Partner of ClickUp and other SaaS tools, helping businesses streamline workflows, boost team productivity, and drive digital transformation. We provide software licensing, implementation, and process optimization services that empower organizations to work smarter and achieve measurable results.

What You'll Do



About the Role of Accounting and Payroll Specialist

1. Conduct end-to-end payroll computation, processing, and reporting with accuracy and timeliness

2. Prepare, review, and maintain financial reports to support management decisions and audit requirements

3. Ensure full compliance with BIR and other local regulatory requirements, including timely filing and remittance of statutory obligations (SSS, PhilHealth, Pag-IBIG, withholding taxes, etc.)

4. Maintain accurate and organized accounting records within the Xero accounting system

5. Support internal and external audits by preparing necessary documentation and schedules

6. Perform field work as needed, including visits to government agencies, banks, client sites, or other offices for accounting and payroll-related matters

7. Safeguard confidential financial, payroll, and employee information at all times



What We're Looking For

1. Part time availability, Hybrid work setup. Preferably residing within the south of Metro Manila for ease of field work coordination

2. Excellent background in payroll processing and general accounting

3. Strong understanding of BIR regulations and other local statutory and regulatory requirements

4. Proven experience in preparing financial reports and supporting audit processes

5. Strong hands-on experience with the Xero accounting system

6. CPA license is an advantage but not required

7. High level of integrity — you understand that this is a position of trust and are committed to observing and practicing the highest standards of confidentiality and data privacy

8. Detail-oriented, organized, and able to meet strict deadlines

9. Willing and able to perform field work when required



What You'll Need

1. A desktop or laptop with decent specs capable of running accounting software and virtual meetings

2. A quiet home workspace

3. A noise-cancelling headset

4. A stable high-speed internet connection



Why Join Digibeacon?

1. Competitive compensation package

2. Hybrid work setup with a supportive and collaborative team

3. Opportunity to grow your accounting and payroll career within a fast-growing SaaS and digital transformation company

4. Exposure to modern accounting tools and best practices, including Xero and other cloud-based systems



How to Apply

1. To process your application, please complete the sign-up form below.

2. We only process applicants who complete the form.

3. Apply here: 
.com/digibeaconcareers

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (React / .NET) - (Job ID: SFSD26)
description:
We are looking for a new Senior Full Stack Developer (React / .NET) to join us in developing leading edge software for large enterprise companies. PetroBeacon requires a dedicated full-time resource who is comfortable working remotely with an international team based in Calgary, Alberta, Canada. We pride ourselves in being an effective team working together to advance our company, as well as each other to provide innovative technical solutions. We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will be a core member of the company.



We are currently seeking a versatile, senior full-stack software developer that possesses a passion to craft valuable applications and impactful experiences. Candidates should be self-motivated, initiative-taking and demonstrate a genuine interest and affluence in modern software development tools and practices. The role will be primarily responsible for maintaining and extending an existing system built by PetroBeacon, secondarily working, and collaborating with the team on new projects and products built using modern web technologies.



Technical/Functional Skills Required:

• Relevant Experience: 5+ years (C#)

• Extensive experience in JavaScript development, with a strong focus on React and Node.js

• Proficiency in front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frameworks

• Experience and knowledge of Redux and other react frameworks

• Solid understanding of server-side RESTful API development 

• Experience with database systems such as MS SQL, Mongo DB, etc.

• Familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git) and agile development methodologies

• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

• Excellent communication and collaboration abilities

• User interface design experience an asset



Other Skills and Quality Traits Required:

• Self-starter or initiative-taking, self-motivated to deliver high quality products professionally

• Capable of working with a production system with active users

• Capable of developing software in a fast-paced, deadline driven environment

• Capable of effectively working with a team of, but not limited to: software developers, business analysts, architects, clients -- remotely and across geographical locations, and adjust work times when necessary

• Capable of self-managing their own workload to meet deadlines and commitments, upholding personal integrity with commitments

• Capable of handling sensitive information in a responsible manner

• Capable of providing timely and accurate status reporting, time tracking, and similar

• English: Fluent speaking and writing

• BitBucket GIT: Code Repository

• Remote Desktop: Access to remote machines

• Jira: Task Tracking / Project Management

• Jenkins: Continuous Integration / Build automation

• DevExpress Grid/Dashboards





COMPANY DESCRIPTION

PetroBeacon is a data-centric software company that operates primarily in oil and gas but has interests in other industries. We have been in business for a decade, and we have our own products that we sell and maintain, while also providing consulting services to clients if requested. We are a small company of industry leading experts with staff all over the world. Our primary focus is data quality solutions and plan to continue to expand in this area.

We are looking for independent talented people who would like to expand their role in the software industry. We do our best to provide everyone with the opportunities to develop and grow in the direction they choose, while working as a team to create industry leading solutions for enterprise clients.



Join our talented high-performing team and enjoy these Benefits:

• 13th Month Pay - accrue monthly (prorated if less than 1 year, paid full for full year of service onwards)

• 2 weeks Paid Leave (equivalent to 10 days paid time off for vacation or flexible as you please)

• Paid Philippine nation-wide regular (non-working) holidays (where holiday lands during the week)

• Paid training & mentoring

• Currently 100% Work from home; Required on-site office location 3-5days/week once a local office location is secured

• Some travel, though not required

• Flexible time

• Company Events (last event was in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA)

• Opportunity to progress in your career



HOW TO APPLY:

1. Applicants may apply or submit questions via e-mail to 
 Attach your cover letter and resume in either Word-format or PDF.

b. Include Job ID “SFSD25” in the subject line.

c. Confirm your availability for interviews. Refer to IMPORTANT section below. *Failing to comply with the instructions provided will result to your application to not be received and reviewed.*



IMPORTANT:

1. We are currently scheduling interviews for September 24th, 2025. In-person interviews will be conducted in Cebu City. Please note that due to a high volume of applications, we will prioritize correspondence with applications that will potentially land on interviews and progress into the hiring process. Interviews will be conducted virtually and/or face to face.



2. Actual wage/salary per month to-be offered may slightly vary from the wage/salary posted in this job site, depending on actual skill level assessed and other considerations.
