title: Sales Closer — Remote, Commission Only (US-Based Company)
description:
About Us:



CloseControl is a US-based company that builds virtual receptionists for service businesses. We help plumbers, HVAC companies, electricians, landscapers, law firms, med spas, and other service businesses capture every phone call and book more jobs. We are growing fast and looking for a closer who can turn warm leads into paying clients.



What You'll Do:



You will get on phone calls with business owners who have already expressed interest in our service (booked by our appointment setter) and close them. You will also generate your own leads through your own outreach —
 groups, LinkedIn, referrals, and any professional method that works. You explain what CloseControl does, handle objections, close the deal, and guide the client through onboarding until their receptionist goes live. You are the client's main point of contact from the first call through go-live.



What We're Looking For:



Excellent English speaking skills — you must sound natural, confident, and professional. Callers should not be able to tell you are not based in the US.

Proven experience closing B2B sales, preferably in services, SaaS, or agency-style businesses

Comfortable handling objections and closing on the phone without a script — we give you frameworks, not word-for-word scripts

Self-motivated and hungry — this is commission only, so you eat what you kill

Organized — you will maintain a follow-up pipeline, track all call outcomes, and keep clients informed during onboarding

Presentable on video calls if a prospect requests one — clean background, good lighting, professional appearance



Pay Structure:



$125 for every client who pays the $750 setup fee

$25/month recurring for every active client (as long as they keep paying)

Milestone bonuses: $500 when we hit 10 active clients, $500 at 20, $750 at 35

Paid monthly



Your Income Potential:



Here's how your earnings grow over time assuming you close 4 clients per month and all clients stay active:

After Month 1:

You close 4 clients. Close commission: 4 x $125 = $500. Recurring: you have 4 active clients paying you $25 each = $100. Total earned so far: $600.



After Month 2:

You close 4 more clients. Close commission: 4 x $125 = $500. Recurring: you now have 8 active clients (4 from month 1 still paying you + 4 new). 8 x $25 = $200 this month. Total earned so far: $600 (month 1) + $700 (month 2) = $1,300.



After Month 3:

You close 4 more. Close commission: $500. Recurring: 12 active clients x $25 = $300 this month. Plus you hit the 10-client milestone: $500 one-time bonus. Total earned so far: $1,300 + $500 + $300 + $500 bonus = $2,600.



After Month 6:

You've been closing 4 per month for 6 months. That's 24 active clients. Here's what each month looked like in recurring: Month 1 = $100, Month 2 = $200, Month 3 = $300, Month 4 = $400, Month 5 = $500, Month 6 = $600. That's $2,100 total in recurring over 6 months. Plus $3,000 total in close commissions (6 months x $500). Plus $1,000 in milestone bonuses ($500 for 10 clients + $500 for 20 clients). Total earned so far: $6,100.



After Month 12:

48 active clients. Your recurring alone in month 12 is 48 x $25 = $1,200 — just from that one month. Over the full year your recurring payments totaled $7,800. Close commissions totaled $6,000. Milestone bonuses totaled $1,750 ($500 at 10 clients + $500 at 20 + $750 at 35). Total earned in your first year: $15,550.



By month 12, you are earning $1,200 every single month in recurring income. That money comes in whether you close new deals that month or not. Every client you brought in keeps paying you $25/month as long as they stay active. The longer you stay, the bigger that number gets. Your recurring income never stops growing.



Minimum Targets:



10 sales calls per week (from booked appointments + your own leads)

4 closes per month



Requirements:



Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Headset with microphone

Available to work during US business hours

Willing to record all sales calls for quality review

Presentable for video calls if needed



How to Apply:

Record a short video (2-3 minutes) of yourself speaking in English. Introduce yourself, tell us about your sales experience, give an example of something you've sold and how you closed the deal, and explain why you'd be a great fit for this role. Upload the video and include the link in your application. Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer (React / .NET) - (Job ID: SFSD26)
description:
We are looking for a new Senior Full Stack Developer (React / .NET) to join us in developing leading edge software for large enterprise companies. PetroBeacon requires a dedicated full-time resource who is comfortable working remotely with an international team based in Calgary, Alberta, Canada. We pride ourselves in being an effective team working together to advance our company, as well as each other to provide innovative technical solutions. We are looking for a long-term tea
mber who will be a core member of the company.



We are currently seeking a versatile, senior full-stack software developer that possesses a passion to craft valuable applications and impactful experiences. Candidates should be self-motivated, initiative-taking and demonstrate a genuine interest and affluence in modern software development tools and practices. The role will be primarily responsible for maintaining and extending an existing system built by PetroBeacon, secondarily working, and collaborating with the team on new projects and products built using modern web technologies.



Technical/Functional Skills Required:

• Relevant Experience: 5+ years (C#)

• Extensive experience in JavaScript development, with a strong focus on React and Node.js

• Proficiency in front-end technologies such as HTML, CSS, and JavaScript frameworks

• Experience and knowledge of Redux and other react frameworks

• Solid understanding of server-side RESTful API development 

• Experience with database systems such as MS SQL, Mongo DB, etc.

• Familiarity with version control systems (e.g., Git) and agile development methodologies

• Strong problem-solving and analytical skills

• Excellent communication and collaboration abilities

• User interface design experience an asset



Other Skills and Quality Traits Required:

• Self-starter or initiative-taking, self-motivated to deliver high quality products professionally

• Capable of working with a production system with active users

• Capable of developing software in a fast-paced, deadline driven environment

• Capable of effectively working with a team of, but not limited to: software developers, business analysts, architects, clients -- remotely and across geographical locations, and adjust work times when necessary

• Capable of self-managing their own workload to meet deadlines and commitments, upholding personal integrity with commitments

• Capable of handling sensitive information in a responsible manner

• Capable of providing timely and accurate status reporting, time tracking, and similar

• English: Fluent speaking and writing

• BitBucket GIT: Code Repository

• Remote Desktop: Access to remote machines

• Jira: Task Tracking / Project Management

• Jenkins: Continuous Integration / Build automation

• DevExpress Grid/Dashboards





COMPANY DESCRIPTION

PetroBeacon is a data-centric software company that operates primarily in oil and gas but has interests in other industries. We have been in business for a decade, and we have our own products that we sell and maintain, while also providing consulting services to clients if requested. We are a small company of industry leading experts with staff all over the world. Our primary focus is data quality solutions and plan to continue to expand in this area.

We are looking for independent talented people who would like to expand their role in the software industry. We do our best to provide everyone with the opportunities to develop and grow in the direction they choose, while working as a team to create industry leading solutions for enterprise clients.



Join our talented high-performing team and enjoy these Benefits:

• 13th Month Pay - accrue monthly (prorated if less than 1 year, paid full for full year of service onwards)

• 2 weeks Paid Leave (equivalent to 10 days paid time off for vacation or flexible as you please)

• Paid Philippine nation-wide regular (non-working) holidays (where holiday lands during the week)

• Paid training & mentoring

• Currently 100% Work from home; Required on-site office location 3-5days/week once a local office location is secured

• Some travel, though not required

• Flexible time

• Company Events (last event was in Las Vegas, Nevada, USA)

• Opportunity to progress in your career



HOW TO APPLY:

1. Applicants may apply or submit questions via e-mail to 
 Attach your cover letter and resume in either Word-format or PDF.

b. Include Job ID “SFSD26” in the subject line.

c. Confirm your availability for interviews. Refer to IMPORTANT section below. *Failing to comply with the instructions provided will result to your application to not be received and reviewed.*



IMPORTANT:

1. We are currently scheduling interviews. Please note that due to a high volume of applications, we will prioritize correspondence with applications that will potentially land on interviews and progress into the hiring process. Interviews will be conducted virtually and/or face to face.



2. Actual wage/salary per month to-be offered may slightly vary from the wage/salary posted in this job site, depending on actual skill level assessed and other considerations.

title: Klaviyo Specialist
description:
We’re hiring a full-time Content Marketer to own our content strategy across platforms, with a primary focus on
 marketing (Klaviyo) and website (Shopify). This role is full-time and in-house (remote), so please only apply if you’re looking for a long-term permanent position. We're not hiring freelancer or agency.



This role is ideal for someone who is creative, strategic, and detail-oriented, and excited to work closely with designers to improve content performance through clear insights, testing, and audience-focused messaging.



What You’ll Be Responsible For

- Plan, write, and execute
 campaigns and automated flows in Klaviyo.

- Create and optimize website copy, landing pages, product descriptions, and other on-site content.

- Collaborate with graphic designers to produce visuals aligned with campaigns.

- Analyze
 and website performance metrics to identify what’s working, underperforming content, and opportunities for improvement.

- Participate in brainstorming sessions to improve content and campaign performance.

- Provide insights and recommendations to improve messaging, tone, and overall content effectiveness.

- Analyze website behavior and implement content-driven CRO strategies to improve conversions on landing pages, product pages, and key funnels.

- Monitor competitors’
s, websites, offers, and campaigns to identify gaps or opportunities in our market niche.

- Stay up-to-date with DTC content marketing trends and
 best practices.



Requirements

- Full-time, Monday–Friday (9am–5pm PH time)

- Remote position

- Strong writing, editing, and storytelling skills

- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills; able to interpret content performance data to make informed decisions

- Able to explain insights to non-technical teammates

- Organized, self-directed, execution-focused, and able to work independently



Nice To Have (but not required)

- Experience with Klaviyo or other
 marketing platforms

- Experience with Shopify or website analytics

- Experience in content marketing or CRM/CRO for DTC brands

- Familiarity with user behavior analytics, heatmaps, or funnel optimization



What We Offer

- Competitive salary

- Performance-based bonuses

- Paid annual leave & public holidays

- Fully remote work

- Training, upskilling, and career growth opportunities

- A team that values ownership, clarity, and results



Application

Please send your application via
 to 
 with the subject line: "Klaviyo Specialist – (Your Name)". Include your OnlineJobsPH profile link and answers to the questions below in numbered format directly in the
 body:

1) Describe your most recent job: your job overview, and how long did you work there?

2) What challenges did you face, and why did you leave the job?

3) Describe one (or more) test/experiment you tried that didn't work as expected? What did you learn, and what would you do differently now?

4) Submit your portfolio. If you don’t have relevant DTC experience, submit your best work. Strong portfolios outside this role may be considered for other roles.

5) Pick one project from the portfolio in question (4) that you are proud of and answer the questions below. You may pick more than one project.

- What was the project?

- Your contribution?

- Why you approached it this way?

- Results (provide metrics if possible)?

title: Sales And Customer Service Manager
description:
Job Title: Sales And Customer Service Manager



Location: Remote



Hours: Monday-Friday, 8-5 Central Standard Time. Full Time (40 hours per week).



Company Overview



Everblue Pond is based in the United States.



Everblue Pond is a pioneering online pond and lake store dedicated to guiding customers to the right products and solutions. With a focus on selling highly technical products that require intricate electrical configurations, we pride ourselves on our unmatched customer service and technical expertise. Established for 3 years, our mission is to surpass competitors in customer care, embodying values of integrity, strong relationships, and exceptional service. As a small, family-owned business, we uphold the highest standards of ethics and professionalism, striving to build positive and honest relationships with our customers, dealers, and vendors while driving revenue and business growth.



Role Summary



As a key player in our company, the Sales and Customer Service Manager will be the face of Everblue Pond, leading day-to-day operations and driving our mission forward. This role requires a unique blend of tech savvy, sales and customer service skills. You will guide customers through thorough product selection, manage customer service issues, and forge strong supplier and customer relationships—all while operating remotely.



Primary Responsibilities



-Guide customers through the sales process via phone, providing technical advice and solutions while generating and closing sales.

-Handle customer service inquiries, troubleshooting, and warranty claims.

-Develop and maintain relationships with suppliers, HOAs, contractors, and business customers.

-Process orders, fulfillments, and returns through Shopify.

-Create sales materials and update website when needed.

-Participate in and contribute to ongoing training and professional development.



Candidate Requirements



-Strong problem-solving skills and technical aptitude.

-Experience in sales and customer service preferred.

-Ability to learn and apply technical information.

-Proficient in relationship-building and sales closing strategies.

-Self-motivated with extreme ownership, good judgment, and decision-making skills.

-Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, comfortable with confrontation and capable of closing sales.

-Must have a reliable computer and internet connection for remote work.

-A self-starter attitude is critical. We seek someone who actively seeks solutions, approaches challenges creatively, and shows -exceptional judgment in autonomous decision-making while learning quickly.



Benefits/Compensation



-$16,000-$18,000 Salary + Commission (based on monthly sales volume)

-Flexible, remote working environment.

-Opportunities for professional development and growth within the company.

-This will be a Full Time contractor position estimated at 40 working hours per week.



Our Culture



At Everblue Pond, we believe in empowering our team members to make decisions and learn from their experiences. We value open communication, teamwork, and a culture of continuous improvement. Our daily operations are grounded in our core values, and we strive to deliver the “Wow” factor in everything we do.



Application Process



Please follow these directions to apply for this position. Any applications that do not follow these steps will be immediately disqualified.



1.) Send an
 to 

2.) The subject line of your response must be "Sales And Customer Service Manager"

3.) Write one paragraph of 3 lines or less in black font and tell me about yourself.

4.) Write a second paragraph of 3 lines or less in blue size 14 font about why you would be a great fit for this role.

5.) Include your resume as an attachment in the
.



If you're a proactive problem solver with a technical edge and a passion for sales and customer service, we'd love to hear from you! Everblue Pond is more than just a business; it's a family committed to excellence, integrity, and our customers. Join us in making a difference together.



Job Types: Full-time, Contract



Benefits:



-Flexible schedule

-On-the-job training

-Paid time off and paid holidays

-Work from home



Work Location: Remote

title: NetSuite Functional Consultant / Project Lead
description:
Project Leadership

• Lead full-cycle NetSuite implementations including discovery, design, configuration, testing, training, and go-live

• Serve as primary client-facing project lead, managing stakeholder relationships and executive communications

• Build and manage project plans, timelines, milestones, and resource allocation across multiple concurrent engagements

• Coordinate with other tea
mbers, offshore and onshore, vendors and clients

• Facilitate business requirements workshops and solution design sessions with C-suite and finance teams

• Oversee QA, conduct UAT, and change management processes to ensure successful adoption

NetSuite Functional Expertise

• Configure and optimize NetSuite modules including Financials, Order Management, Inventory, SuiteBilling, and Revenue Recognition

• Design and implement SuiteProjects for professional services and project-based businesses — time tracking, job costing with standard costing

• Build SuiteFlow workflows, saved searches, custom records, forms, and dashboards

• Architect multi-subsidiary, multi-currency, and multi-book accounting structures

• Implement Advanced Revenue Management (ARM) and ASC 606 compliance frameworks

• Partner with cross-functional teams to evaluate, implement, and optimize third-party tools across the business technology stack — including CRM, billing, expense, and tax platforms — while leading end-to-end business process reengineering initiatives that align legacy workflows with NetSuite best practices to drive operational efficiency and scalability

• Own the creation and maintenance of comprehensive functional documentation including BRDs, SDDs, process flow diagrams, configuration workbooks, test scripts, training materials, and post-go-live runbooks to ensure continuity, audit readiness, and seamless knowledge transfer across internal teams and client stakeholders

Finance & Accounting

• Apply deep GAAP knowledge to design chart of accounts, financial reporting structures, and close processes

• Configure revenue recognition schedules, deferred revenue, and subscription billing models for SaaS clients

• Design financial consolidation and intercompany elimination workflows

• Partner with CFOs and Controllers to translate complex accounting requirements into NetSuite configuration

• Support audit readiness, SOX compliance, and internal controls documentation

.

title: AI ART DESIGNER
description:
Description:

We are building a digital art brand focused on high-quality artwork that meets certain specifications. We need an AI Art Designer who can consistently produce polished, style-specific images—not random outputs.



This role is production-focused with clear standards and ongoing work for the right person.



Responsibilities:

Generate AI artwork (landscapes, interiors, seasonal, traditional styles)

Match specific styles (e.g., oil painting with visible brush texture, realistic lighting)

Follow exact requirements:

3840 × 2160 resolution (16:9)

No distortion or stretching

Clean composition

Refine prompts and iterate based on feedback

Deliver organized, high-quality files



Requirements:

Experience with Midjourney, Stable Diffusion, or similar tools

Strong visual judgment (composition, lighting, realism)

Ability to replicate a consistent style

Attention to detail (no artifacts, warped structures, etc.)

Reliable and responsive



Pay:

$3–$4/hour depending on experience

Long-term opportunity with consistent work



To Apply:

Share 3–5 samples of AI-generated images you’ve created

List the tools you used



Selected candidates will be asked to do a paid test requiring the following:



Part 1 – Style Matching (Realism / Painterly)



Create an image based on:



Christ walking out of the tomb, backlit with warm light, wearing flowing white robes, emerging into a bright landscape.

Style should be inspired by traditional Christian painters (e.g., soft, reverent, painterly realism, similar feel to artists like Roger Loveless or Yongsung Kim).

Focus on lighting, emotion, and realism.

Composition must be 16:9.



Part 2 – Style Transformation (Same Scene, New Style)



Create the same scene, but in a completely different style:



Light, airy watercolor style

Soft edges, minimal detail, bright and uplifting tone

Emphasis on atmosphere over realism



Part 3 – Process Explanation



Briefly explain:



What tools you used

How you adjusted prompts between the two styles

Any editing or upscaling process

What We’re Evaluating

Ability to match a specific artistic style

Ability to intentionally change styles while keeping the same scene

Composition and lighting quality

Attention to detail (no distortions, clean structure)



Do NOT Apply If:

You rely on generic prompts without control

You cannot recreate a consistent look

You submit unedited or low-quality outputs



Bonus:

Experience with religious or traditional artwork

Strong understanding of painting styles (oil vs watercolor, etc.)

Experience creating artwork for print or display

Nice to have

Rouge Reckoning™ is an unapologetic women's fiction and content brand — raw, cinematic, specific. We publish books, run an audio drama subscription (The Reckoning Vault), and sell planners. The brand voice is bold and human — think church girl gone rogue. Content must feel real, not polished corporate. If you need to be told what "edgy" means, this isn't the role.

Applications without samples will not be reviewed

title: Customer Service Specialist
description:
We're growing our Customer Service team and looking for someone to be a main touchpoint between our customers and our brand (
/thewarkitchen). Excellent customer service is something we take seriously, and as we scale beyond digital drops into more physical products, we want a specialist who can own this work alongside our existing team. This role is open to both part-time and full-time candidates, depending on fit and availability.



What you'll do:

- Respond to customer
s with warmth, always offering a solution, and going out of your way to make things right when needed

- Resolve order issues including address holds and changes, wrong addresses, lost and delayed shipments, returns and exchanges, and general product questions

- Coordinate with our fulfillment partners in the US, acting as the intermediary between customers and our fulfillment team (handled in a dedicated Slack channel)

- Spot patterns across tickets and surface recurring issues before they become bigger problems

- Continuously refine our SOPs, FAQs, macros, and internal documentation to improve the customer experience over time

- Keep our Gorgias workspace clean, organized, and well-tagged



What we're looking for:

- Excellent written English with the ability to match our brand voice (warm, considered, never templated)

- Hands-on experience with Gorgias (or a comparable helpdesk like Zendesk, with a willingness to learn)

- Working knowledge of Shopify, including order management, creating orders, managing inventory, refunds, and fulfillment workflows

- 2+ years in customer service for a DTC or e-commerce brand, ideally in apparel, beauty, or lifestyle

- Strong judgment on when to resolve independently, when to escalate, and when to flag something to leadership

- Meticulous, organized, and comfortable working US time zone hours



To apply, start your message with the word "Mango" and send us your resume or CV along with a short paragraph on why you think you'd be a good fit. Remuneration is negotiable depending on experience. Thank you!

Remote (Philippines or similar)

 Queen Clean (U.S.-based cleaning company)

$8–$12/hour to start | Growth to $12–$16/hour+

30–40 hours/week



About Us



Queen Clean is a growing cleaning company based in Bozeman, Montana (USA). We specialize in high-quality residential cleaning, with additional commercial and construction services.



We are building strong systems and a reliable team and are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term and take on a key role in operations.



The Opportunity



This is not a typical virtual assistant role.



We are looking for someone who can take on a consistent, near full-time role supporting day-to-day operations and grow into a key leadership position within the company.



Over time, this role can evolve into managing scheduling, overseeing communication, and helping run overall business operations.

Responsibilities (Starting Tasks)

s and client inquiries

Jobber (scheduling & operations)

QuickBooks (financial tracking)

AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)



Experience is helpful, but willingness to learn is most important.



Requirements

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Excellent communication skills

Fast response time and reliability

Comfortable learning new systems

Proactive and solution-oriented

Interested in long-term work and growth

Work Hours

30–40 hours/week

Compensation & Growth

$8–$12/hour starting rate (based on experience)

Performance-based raises

Opportunity to grow into a higher-level operations role ($12–$16/hour+)

We are willing to invest significantly in the right person as they grow into this position

Long-term role with increasing responsibility and pay

How to Apply (IMPORTANT – Please Follow Carefully)

Your highest level of education (a college degree is preferred)

Confirmation that you can provide 3 professional references from previous clients or employers (remote or administrative work preferred)



Please include the word “Queen” in your message so we know you’ve read the full post.



Only applicants who follow all instructions will be considered.

title: Head of Marketplaces (Ecommerce - Shopee, Tiktok, Lazada)
description:
Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.



This role is ideal for someone with strong commercial instincts, leadership experience, and hands-on marketplace expertise. You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, managing marketplace operations, and leading strategy across multiple platforms.



Key Responsibilities:



- Defining vision, setting priorities, and driving growth across online marketplaces.

- Own overall marketplace strategy and performance (Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop, and future platforms)

- Drive sales growth, profitability, and market share.

- Plan and execute campaigns, promotions, and Platform Ads (Shopee, Lazada, Tiktok Seller Center).

- Optimize product listings, pricing, and assortment.

- Analyze sales data, traffic, and conversion metrics to improve performance.

- Manage marketplace operations including inventory coordination, order fulfillment, logistics, returns, and customer service.

- Monitor competitors and marketplace trends.

- Ensure compliance with marketplace policies and standards.

- Collaborate with the Marketing team to optimize demand, funnels, and conversions while scaling livestream, affiliate, and KOL/KOC commerce.

- Oversee forecasting, performance tracking, and executive-level reporting.

- Communication with Key Account Managers.

- Leading PH team, collaborating with other multicultural teams, and managing external partners.



Qualifications:

- 3 - 5 years proven experience in E-commerce Marketplace Management (e.g., Shopee, Lazada, TikTok Shop) or roles as E-commerce Manager or Marketplace Manager.

- Background in fast-growing or high-volume e-commerce businesses.

- Strong understanding of online sales, promotions, and analytics.

- Knowledge of paid ads within marketplaces (Shopee Ads, Lazada Ads, TikTok Ads).

- Data-driven mindset with strong problem-solving abilities.

- Comfortable work environment, same working time zone as Philippines (GMT +8).

- Structured salary increase and promotion based on performance.

We appreciate your interest and look forward to hearing from you.

title: Urgent Financial Analyst with General Admin Experience (Cebu Based Preferred)
description:
We are urgently seeking a highly analytical and detail-oriented Financial Analyst to support our CEO and Finance/Accounting Team. This role will work closely with our current Financial Analyst and assist in driving financial insights, forecasting, reporting, and strategic analysis across the organization.



This is a work from home position ideal for a finance professional with strong modeling skills and experience supporting senior leadership.



Key Responsibilities

* Evaluate overall financial performance, including key drivers and KPIs

* Build, maintain, and enhance financial and sales models for budgeting, forecasting, and performance measurement

* Assist in establishing and maintaining financial dashboards for senior management and business partners

* Develop weekly, monthly, and quarterly productivity and realization reports across active engagements

* Manage and analyze the firm’s revenue pipeline (prospective, current, and won engagements) across multiple practice lines

* Conduct ad hoc financial analysis and provide actionable recommendations to address emerging business challenges

* Support the development and maintenance of 3-statement financial models for forecasting, M&A activities, and strategic investments



Qualifications & Experience

* Bachelor’s degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, or related field

* 5+ years of experience in financial analysis, FP&A, corporate finance, or related role

* Strong experience with financial modeling, including 3-statement models

* Experience with budgeting, forecasting, and KPI tracking

* Advanced proficiency in Excel (required); experience with financial planning tools is a plus

* Strong analytical thinking and problem-solving skills

* Excellent written and verbal communication skills

* Windows-based setup is highly required for this position.

* Ability to work independently in a remote environment and collaborate with cross-functional teams



Preferred Experience

* Experience supporting executive leadership

* Exposure to M&A analysis and strategic investment modeling

* Experience working with professional services firms or multi-practice organizations



If you're interested in applying, please send your application along with the requirements listed below:



Resume, screenshot of computer specifications, screenshot of internet speed test, and video recording where you introduce yourself and elaborate on your experiences. Thanks!

title: Executive Assistant / Admin Virtual Assistant
description:
Executive Assistant / Admin Virtual Assistant

We are a U.S.-based education company that helps train sales reps and place them into real opportunities.

We believe deeply in helping our people build a real life, not just fill a role. This is a position with room to grow for the right person. We are looking for someone who wants to become a valuable part of a fast-moving team and grow with a company that values loyalty, communication, and execution.

We are hiring a Virtual Assistant / Executive Admin Assistant to support a fast-paced business environment.

This role is for someone who is highly responsive, organized, detail-oriented, and strong in English communication. The biggest priority is fast communication and reliability.

Main responsibilities:

Data tracking and spreadsheet updates

Administrative support

Organizing information and keeping records accurate

Fast communication throughout the day

Being available to hop on Zoom calls

Assisting with executive and day-to-day admin tasks

Helping keep operations organized and moving quickly

What we need:

Strong written and spoken English

Very fast response time

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable using Zoom

Comfortable communicating through iMessage

Professional, dependable, and proactive

Able to follow instructions and execute quickly

Bonus:

Having an iPhone is a plus

Ideal candidate:

Communicates clearly and professionally

Can handle fast-moving tasks without getting overwhelmed

Takes initiative and does not need constant follow-up

Understands urgency and can keep things on track

Wants a role they can grow in over time

About us:

 We are an education company based in the United States. We train sales representatives and help place them into real opportunities. We care about building a strong team, and we genuinely believe in helping our people create a better future for themselves. We do not just look at this as hiring help — we look at it as bringing on the right person and helping them grow.

To apply, send:

Your experience as a virtual assistant or executive assistant

Your level of English proficiency

Your availability and time zone

Whether you have an iPhone (prefered) 

Why you would be a strong fit for a fast-paced admin role

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor | Motion Graphics + AI Video Platforms

Zarrin Productions | Remote | Full-time



About Zarrin Productions

Zarrin Productions is a video production and digital marketing agency. We produce short-form performance content, branded multimedia assets, ad creatives, and educational video series for clients in nutraceuticals, SaaS, healthcare, and fintech. Our work moves fast, and the quality bar is high.



What You Will Be Doing



You will edit and deliver polished, branded video content across a range of formats and client projects. Specific responsibilities include:



Editing short-form and long-form video content for social media, paid ads, websites, and in-app platforms. 

Working with AI-generated video footage from tools like HeyGen, Synthesia, and Kling AI to produce clean, professional outputs.

Adding motion graphics, lower thirds, animated text overlays, and branded transitions.

Sourcing and integrating B-roll to support storytelling and visual flow. 

Resizing and reformatting content across aspect ratios (16x9, 9x16, 1x1, 4x5).

Color grading and audio correction.

Editing within Descript or similar transcript-based tools when needed.

Organizing and managing project files for efficient turnaround.

 Applying client brand guidelines consistently across all deliverables.



What We Are Looking For

Minimum 2 years of professional video editing experience. A strong portfolio that shows motion graphics, branded content, and multi-format delivery.

Hands-on experience with at least one AI video platform (HeyGen, Synthesia, Kling AI, or similar).

Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects.

Familiarity with Descript or CapCut is a plus. 

Strong attention to pacing, visual hierarchy, and brand consistency.

Reliable internet connection and ability to meet deadlines.



Nice to Have

Experience editing performance video ads for Meta or YouTube.

Familiarity with content repurposing workflows. Basic audio mixing skills.



How to Apply

Send your application with your CV and a link to your portfolio. Applications without both a CV and a portfolio link will not be reviewed.



A few things to note before you apply: This role involves real client projects with real deadlines. We work lean, communicate clearly, and expect the same. If you take pride in clean edits and can hold a brand standard across a high volume of content, we want to hear from you.

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant
description:
(MLSPro + Seller Support + Transaction Coordination)

We are a fast-growing real estate team seeking a detail-oriented, experienced Virtual Assistant to manage backend operations across listings, seller communication, and transaction coordination.

This is a fast-paced, process-driven role with clear systems and expectations. We’re looking for someone who is proactive, highly organized, and comfortable handling multiple listings with accuracy and speed.

Our goal is to build a high-trust, hands-off system, where the VA takes full ownership of daily operations and ensures nothing is missed—allowing us to focus on other areas of the business.

 

Responsibilities

Seller Communication

• Manage daily
 communication with sellers (support & follow-ups) 

• Respond to all seller
s within 1–2 hours during working hours, with urgent requests (listing changes, activations, or document issues) handled as top priority. This is a high-responsiveness role where communication speed directly impacts listings and client experience. 

• Follow up consistently until tasks are completed 

• Maintain professional, client-facing communication (CC agent on all
s) 

• Monitor listing expiration dates and
 sellers 7 days prior to confirm property status (sold, under contract, or still active) and coordinate listing renewals when needed 

 

MLS & Listing Management

• Input and manage property listings in MLS 

• Process listing updates (price changes, status updates, etc.) 

• Ensure 100?curacy across all MLS fields 

• Track listing status (Active, Pending, Sold) 

• Ensure timely processing of urgent updates, including weekend listing activations when required 

 

Document & File Management

• Request and collect required documents (disclosures, agreements, etc.) 

• Review documents for completeness 

• Maintain organized Google Drive folders for each property 

 

Transaction Coordination

• Assist from listing to closing 

• Track key deadlines (inspection, financing, closing) 

• Follow up daily on missing documents 

• Maintain clean and complete transaction records 

 

Admin & Systems

• Create forms using JotForm 

• Maintain notes in CRM/task system 

• Send listing confirmations and closing
s 

 

Marketing Support (Light)

• Share listings on social media platforms 
, Instagram, etc.) 

• Ensure posts are accurate and match MLS details 

• Coordinate with agent for posting when needed 

 

Tools & Systems

• MLS Platforms: Matrix, FlexMLS, Paragon 

• Google Workspace (Drive, Gmail, Docs) 

• E-signature tools: DocuSign, Dotloop, Authentisign 

• JotForm 

• CRM/Task systems (preferred but not required) 

 

Requirements

• Required: Prior experience as a Real Estate VA or Transaction Coordinator 

• Strong understanding of MLS systems and listing workflows 

• Experience handling real estate documents and compliance 

• Excellent written English (client-facing role) 

• Highly organized and detail-oriented 

• Able to manage multiple listings and deadlines simultaneously 

• Proactive and reliable (minimal supervision) 

 

Technical Requirements

• Stable high-speed internet (50+ Mbps) 

• Backup internet/power 

• Quiet, professional workspace 

• Dual monitors preferred 

 

Schedule

• Full-time (40 hours/week) 

• Must be available 9 AM – 5 PM EST (Monday–Friday) 

• Weekend availability required as needed for time-sensitive tasks (listing activations, change requests, etc.) 

• Weekend hours are paid and workload-based 

• Must be able to check and respond to urgent weekend tasks (2–3 scheduled check-ins when needed) 

 

Performance Expectations

• Maintain high responsiveness with most seller
s answered within 1–2 hours during working hours 

• Same-day processing of listing updates (when possible) 

• No missed follow-ups or incomplete tasks 

• This role is designed for a high-trust operator who can independently manage daily operations with minimal oversight 

 

Compensation

• $4–$6/hour (based on experience) 

• Performance-based bonuses for accuracy, responsiveness, and reliability 

• Long-term position with growth potential 

We strongly value high performance and reliability in this role. Bonuses will be awarded for consistently excellent execution, fast communication, and proactive handling of tasks that ensure smooth operations and peace of mind for the team.



 

To Apply

Please submit:

1. Your real estate experience (specific tasks you handled) 

2. MLS systems you’ve used 

3. A short voice recording introducing yourself 

4. A sample
 requesting missing documents from a seller 

Important: Include the word “MLSPro” in your application subject line.

Only applications that follow instructions exactly will be considered.

 

Daily Workflow Overview

You will follow structured daily processes including:

• Inbox management & seller communication 

• Listing input and updates in MLS 

• Document collection and review 

• Transaction tracking through closing 

• Light social media posting of listings 

• Monitoring listing expirations and renewal follow-ups 

• End-of-day reporting 

 

Key Expectations

• Every property must have a fully organized folder 

• Every document must be saved correctly 

• Every seller communication must be documented 

• Follow up until completion — no loose ends

title: Creative Strategist - US Market
description:
Fill out form: (ADD PORFOLIO IN FORM)





About Us



We operate a portfolio of performance-led DTC brands across the US and Southeast Asian markets. Our brands are in the 7–8 figure range, and our growth is built entirely on creative research, testing, iteration, and the discipline to do all three at volume.



We run a structured, data-driven creative system. Testing velocity and iteration discipline are what determine how fast we grow. If you want to work somewhere that treats creative strategy as a real performance function, not a vibes-based exercise, this is it.



As a US Creative Strategist, you'll be dedicated to our US market brands, developing and testing concepts for American audiences with the specific buyer psychology, market awareness stages, and offer positioning that move cold traffic in that market.

 

Compensation

This role offers a competitive base salary plus performance-based commissions tied directly to winning concepts that validate and scale. You earn more when your creative drives results - it's that simple.

 

What You'll Be Doing



Research & Concept Development

•   	Developing 15–20 net-new concepts per week across video and image formats. Typically, video concepts make up 70–80% of your weekly output, with image concepts making up the balance; this ratio shifts based on what's scaling and where the priorities are

•   	Conducting deep research into high-impact angles, unique mechanisms, and market awareness stages to develop breakthrough concepts for US audiences

•   	Studying competitive intelligence (ad spying), consumer psychology, mass desire, and internal winners to identify untapped opportunities specific to the US market

•   	Building concepts that are rooted in how American buyers think, what they respond to, and what's already saturated in the market



Scriptwriting & Creative Execution

•   	Writing compelling, high-converting direct-response scripts designed to hook cold US audiences and drive them to purchase (and potentially work in tandem with a dedicated copywriter)

•   	Producing clear, detailed briefs for editors and designers - tight enough that the execution team can move fast without ambiguity

•   	Owning the creative pipeline for your assigned brands: research ? ideation ? scripting ? post-launch performance analysis and iteration

•   	Writing across formats: UGC-style scripts, direct-address video ads, static ad copy, and image concept briefs with the same conversion logic applied to each



Collaboration & Iteration

•   	Working closely with the Lead Strategist at the strategic level and with editors and designers at the execution level

•   	Leveraging proven copy structures, frameworks, and past winners to accelerate testing velocity

•   	Feeding insights back to the wider team to continuously improve our creative playbook



Performance Analysis & Scaling

•   	Analyzing winners and losers weekly - documenting what worked, why it worked, and what to test next

•   	Rapidly iterating winning concepts into multiple variations to validate and scale

 

What We're Looking For



Must-Haves

•   	Proven direct-response experience > you've written scripts, hooks, or ad concepts that have run on Meta or TikTok (paid socials)

•   	Strong copywriting skills across video and static formats > your writing pulls people in and keeps them moving toward a purchase

•   	Deep understanding of consumer psychology, awareness stages, and what makes cold traffic convert in the  target market

•   	Obsessive researcher > you go beyond surface-level competitive intel and find angles other people miss

•   	High output capacity, averaging 15–20 concepts a week, is the expectation, not the ceiling, and you can sustain it without the quality slipping



Instant No's

•   	You don't have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting

•   	You want to spend weeks polishing one campaign > this role requires speed, iteration, and high-quality output simultaneously

•   	You struggle with volume, operational workflows, or fast feedback cycles

•   	You're uncomfortable with the reality that most ads fail before one wins > failure is data, not a problem

•   	You're balancing multiple jobs or clients > this requires full-time, dedicated ownership

 

What Success Looks Like

•   	Consistently producing 15–20 net-new concepts per week across video and image formats

•   	Achieving a 10%+ creative hit rate -concepts that validate, scale, and drive real spend

•   	Operating as a reliable creative partner to the editors, designers, and lead strategists around you

 

Why Join Us

•   	Hands-on experience working on 7–8 figure brands with real paid media budgets behind them

•   	Performance-based upside - base + commissions tied directly to winners and scaling impact

•   	High ownership - your concepts directly influence spend, revenue, and growth

•   	Rapid learning environment with proven frameworks, strong feedback loops, and high iteration cadence

•   	Clear growth path to Lead Strategist or larger brand scope as you prove your output

 

???? If you don't have real experience in ad creative strategy or direct-response copywriting, please do not apply. If you do and you're ready to operate at volume in one of the most competitive DTC markets in the world, we'd like to hear from you.



Hiring Process

1. Fill out form: 

2. Once screened, you'll do skills assessment test

3. Interview

title: Online Math/Science Teacher(Near-Native Accent)
description:
About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, catering to individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced Near-Native English-speaking Online K-12 Math and/or Science Teachers with verifiable teaching certifications. The ideal candidates will have strong academic backgrounds in Mathematics and/or Science, experience teaching young learners (ages 5–18), and a commitment to creating a supportive, inquiry-based, and engaging online learning environment.



Responsibilities



Deliver interactive and engaging Math and/or Science lessons to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

Teach using internationally recognized curricula such as A Closer Look, Glencoe Science, Pearson Interactive Science, NGSS-aligned resources, Singapore Math, or IB/AP/A Level Math programs.

Create age-appropriate lesson plans focused on conceptual understanding, inquiry, problem-solving, and real-world applications.

Incorporate visuals, multimedia, and hands-on virtual activities to make abstract concepts accessible and engaging.

Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback to students and parents.

Foster curiosity, discussion, and active learning in a safe and supportive space.



Qualifications



Professional teacher with at least 2 years of teaching experience (Kindergarten–Grade 12).

Must hold a valid teaching license/certification (e.g., Teaching License, State Certification). TESOL/TEFL is a plus.

Near-native English accent with excellent spoken and written communication skills.

Strong academic background in Mathematics and/or Science (Biology, Physics, Chemistry, General Science).

Experience teaching in public/international schools or reputable online platforms.

Familiarity with inquiry-based and/or interdisciplinary approaches (e.g., STEM/STEAM).

Comfortable working between 07:00–22:00 (Weekdays) and 9:00–22:00 (Weekends), GMT+8.

Proficiency with digital platforms such as ClassIn, Microsoft Office, and other educational technologies.

Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10 or Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits



Flexible working hours.

Opportunity to teach using globally respected Math and Science curricula.

Be part of an international, passionate team of educators.

Access to training and professional development.

Regular enrollment model (not a booking system), ensuring schedule stability and consistency



US$3-4/Hour

________________________________________________________________________________



Online English/World History Teachers (Near-Native Accent)

About Pomelo Academy

Pomelo Academy is an innovative online international school dedicated to delivering high-quality education to students worldwide. We provide a dynamic and engaging learning environment, offering individualized instruction that transcends geographical boundaries.



Job Description

We are seeking passionate and experienced near-native English-speaking online teachers with strong backgrounds in English and/or World History. Candidates may specialize in one subject (English or History) or be able to teach both. The ideal teachers will have experience working with young learners and be committed to creating a supportive and engaging online classroom.



Responsibilities

• Provide instruction in English and/or World History to individuals and small groups of 2–6 students aged 5–18.

• Utilize international-standard curricula.

• Create and deliver engaging lesson plans tailored to each student’s needs.

• Monitor and assess student progress, providing regular feedback to students and parents.

• Foster a positive and encouraging learning environment.



Qualifications

• Skilled at working with young learners aged 5–18

• Must have a stable and fast internet connection and a PC/laptop with at least Windows 10/Mac OS Catalina.



Benefits

US$3-4/Hour

bout Pomelo Academy

title: Appointment Setter — Remote (US-Based Company)
description:
CloseControl is a US-based company that builds virtual receptionists for service businesses. We help plumbers, HVAC companies, electricians, landscapers, law firms, med spas, and other service businesses capture every phone call and book more jobs. We are growing fast and looking for a driven appointment setter to join our team.



What You'll Do:

Your job is to reach out to service business owners across the United States and book them on a phone call with our closer. That's it. You are the first point of contact. You create interest, book the call, and move on to the next prospect. You will use cold calling,
 groups, Google Maps prospecting, LinkedIn, and any other professional method that works. You are not limited to one approach — we want someone resourceful who finds what works and runs with it.



You Are NOT Selling:

You do not close deals. You do not discuss pricing. You do not explain how the product works in detail. You book the appointment and our closer handles the rest.

What We're Looking For:



Excellent English speaking skills — you must sound natural and confident on the phone. Callers should not be able to tell you are not based in the US.

Experience in cold calling, telemarketing, lead generation, or appointment setting

Self-motivated — you will be given targets and expected to hit them without constant supervision

Organized — you will maintain a daily call log and log all appointments in a shared calendar

Reliable — show up on time, every day, no excuses



Pay Structure:



$3.00/hour base pay (40 hours/week = $120/week)

$2.00 bonus for every appointment where the prospect actually shows up

$100 monthly bonus if you book 35+ confirmed appointments in a calendar month

Paid weekly every Friday



Minimum Targets:



80 outreach attempts per day

7 booked appointments per week



Requirements:



Reliable internet connection and quiet workspace

Headset with microphone

Available to work during US business hours (Eastern, Central, Mountain, or Pacific time zones)

Willing to record outreach calls for quality review



How to Apply:

Record a short video (2-3 minutes) of yourself speaking in English. Introduce yourself, tell us about your experience, and explain why you'd be a good fit for this role. Upload the video and include the link in your application. Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Social Media Ads Video Editor
description:
Our ads are scaling fast and we need a video editor who lives and breathes social media content. We're a growing ecommerce brand and we're looking for a talented, full-time video editor to join our team - someone who knows how to stop the scroll on
, Instagram, and TikTok and turn viewers into customers.



Responsibilities:

, Instagram, and TikTok

- Producing a range of content formats

- Working from creative briefs to deliver content that aligns with campaign goals

- Managing multiple projects simultaneously and meeting turnaround deadlines

- Staying across platform trends and proactively suggesting fresh creative approaches to combat ad fatigue



About you:

- Proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro and/or Capcut

- Proven experience editing direct-response or performance-focused video ads

- You understand how to hook a viewer in the first 3 seconds and keep them watching

- Strong eye for pacing, music selection, and on-screen text that drives action

- Able to adapt your editing style to suit different brand guidelines and audience types

- Organised, reliable, and able to manage your own workload without needing constant supervision

- Genuinely passionate about social media and keeping up with what's working right now



If this opportunity interests you, we ask you to please complete a simple video task as a part of the application. ANY application submitted without completing the task will not be considered.



Here is a link to a brief for this application task. Please take your time to read and complete as instructed.





Once complete, please upload the completed videos to a personal Google Drive folder and share the link when submitting your application along with your portfolio of previous work.



I look forward to seeing your application!

title: Marketing Coordinator
description:
Employment Type: Full-Time

Service Hours: Monday to Friday, 10:00 AM to 6:00 PM (Melbourne Time)

Compensation: PHP 30,000/month (based on experience and interview outcomes)



Role Overview

We are looking for a highly experienced Marketing Coordinator to execute and manage marketing initiatives. This role balances hands-on execution and strategic support, particularly in social media, while contributing to broader marketing campaigns.

You will help drive brand awareness, engagement, and lead generation, ensuring all marketing efforts are aligned with business goals and reporting directly to the CEO.

Reporting Line & Collaboration

• Report directly to the Head of Marketing and CEO, providing updates on campaign performance, initiatives, and outcomes

• Collaborate closely with internal teams to ensure alignment on campaigns and priorities

• Support and coordinate a cross-functional marketing team, including Designers, Coordinators, and SEO Specialists

• Track deliverables, monitor progress, and ensure high-quality outputs



Key Responsibilities

• Execute and coordinate social media and marketing strategies aligned with business goals

• Manage and create content for all social media channels

• Manage and optimize campaigns across platforms: 

o LinkedIn

o

o Instagram

o TikTok

o YouTube

• Maintain and oversee content calendars across all brands

• Execute paid advertising campaigns (Meta Ads, LinkedIn Ads, TikTok Ads, YouTube Ads, Google Ads)

• Plan and execute
 marketing campaigns

• Conduct outreach and engagement activities across platforms

• Coordinate expos, including planning, logistics, and preparation of expo materials

• Support video content creation (Reels, TikTok, YouTube Shorts) based on business needs

• Assist in managing and mentoring the marketing team to ensure productivity and quality of work

• Review and coordinate creative assets, campaigns, and content before publishing

• Monitor engagement, respond to messages/comments, and support online community management

• Track, analyze, and report on performance metrics (engagement, reach, CTR, conversions)

• Collaborate with Sales to improve lead generation and conversion strategies

• Ensure consistent branding and messaging across all channels

• Stay updated with trends, platform updates, and competitor strategies

• Perform other marketing tasks as assigned by the Head of Marketing and CEO based on business needs



Qualifications

• Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or related field

• 3–5+ years of experience in social media and digital marketing

• Strong track record in campaign execution and performance monitoring

• Hands-on experience with: 

o Meta Business Suite

o LinkedIn Campaign Manager

o TikTok Ads Manager

o Google Ads / YouTube Ads

o Social media scheduling tools (e.g., Hootsuite, Buffer)

• Strong analytical, organizational, and communication skills

• Ability to balance hands-on execution with team coordination



Success Metrics (KPIs)

• Monthly qualified leads generated

• Cost per lead (CPL) and return on ad spend (ROAS)

• Social media engagement and follower growth

• Campaign performance and conversion rates

description:

 & SMS Marketing Manager to lead the charge in growing and optimizing our owned marketing channels. title: Industrial Designer (Brand & Product Form)
description:
About the Role

We’re looking for a highly creative Industrial Designer based in the Philippines to help define and evolve the visual identity of our product portfolio across high-end hair tools and power/home improvement tools.

This role focuses on product form, brand expression, CMF, and user experience. You will translate brand strategy into iconic, emotionally compelling physical products that stand out in competitive global markets.

From premium hair dryers to precision power tools, you will shape a cohesive and recognizable design language that defines who we are — while working closely with our product development team to ensure your vision is thoughtfully executed.



Responsibilities

• Lead the form development and aesthetic direction of new products across multiple categories.

• Create a distinctive and consistent design language that strengthens brand recognition.

• Explore concepts through sketching, form studies, ergonomic refinement, and 3D development.

• Develop thoughtful CMF (Color, Material, Finish) strategies aligned with brand positioning.

• Ensure designs consider real-world functionality, usability, and internal component integration.

• Collaborate closely with the product development team to align on feasibility, performance requirements, and manufacturing considerations while maintaining design integrity.

• Produce high-quality renderings and presentation visuals to communicate design intent.

• Conduct trend research and competitive analysis to inform forward-thinking design decisions.

• Contribute to a cohesive product ecosystem across SKUs and categories.



What We’re Looking For

• Strong portfolio demonstrating brand-led product design, form exploration, and CMF expertise.

• Experience designing consumer products (beauty, electronics, tools, home goods, lifestyle products, etc.).

• Exceptional understanding of proportion, ergonomics, surface development, and user interaction.

• Ability to balance aesthetics, functionality, and manufacturability.

• Strong sketching skills (digital or hand).

• Proficiency in 3D modeling and rendering tools such as Rhino, SolidWorks, Fusion 360, KeyShot, or similar.

• Clear communication skills and experience collaborating with cross-functional teams.



How to Apply

Please submit your portfolio showcasing concept sketches, form development, CMF exploration, and final product renderings.

We’re looking for designers who create products people recognize instantly — before they even see the logo.



What you'll get

Competitive Salary – Earn in USD!

Health Coverage (HMO) – Enjoy peace of mind after one year!

Paid Time Off – Because work-life balance matters!

title: Remote Creative Assistant (Graphics + Video) - Stable, Long-Term Role
description:
If you’re tired of jumping from client to client and wondering when your next project is coming, this might be what you’re looking for.



Kids On Stage is a US-based performing arts company that has been running for 30+ years with consistent programs, steady revenue, and an established system that isn’t going anywhere.



We’re a small, tight-knit team (5 core members), and we prioritize long-term working relationships. People here don’t get cycled out. They stay, grow, and take on more over time.



This is not a “one-off freelance gig.”



This is a stable role with increasing responsibility and hours for the right person.



THE ROLE

We’re hiring a Remote Part-Time Creative Assistant to create:

• Social media graphics

• Short-form videos

• Marketing and website visuals

You’ll also help improve existing designs, organize assets, and contribute ideas for content.



WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT

• Start at 10–15 hours/week ($5/hr)

• Consistent weekly work (not project-based)

• Hours increase over time based on performance

• Clear workflows and structured systems

• A small team that actually communicates and collaborates

• Long-term stability with a company that’s been around for decades



YOU’RE A GOOD FIT IF YOU:

• Have strong design sense (Canva, CapCut, or similar tools)

• Have excellent US English (written and spoken)

• Are organized, responsive, and reliable

• Can work independently without being chased

• Use AI tools to improve speed and output

• Want consistent, long-term work, not random side projects



WORK SETUP

• Remote

• Part-time (10–15 hrs/week to start)

• Daily meeting at 8:00 AM PST



TO APPLY

1. Visit 
 and check our socials 

2. Apply here:



3. Follow all instructions, including the video interview



If you’re looking for something stable that can grow with you over time, this is worth applying for.

title: Cold Caller
description:
We are looking for a confident and fluent English-speaking Cold Caller to help reach out to business owners and book calls for our team.



Your main role will be making outbound calls, having short conversations, and setting up qualified calls for our sales team. This is not a hard sales role — your focus is simply to start conversations and book appointments.



Clear communication and a natural, professional speaking voice are extremely important for this role.



Responsibilities:

Make outbound cold calls to business owners

Follow a simple script and adapt naturally in conversations

Introduce our services and generate interest

Schedule qualified appointments on our calendar

Track calls and results in our system

Handle basic objections and keep conversations moving



Requirements:

Fluent English with a clear, neutral accent (very important)

Strong verbal communication skills

Comfortable speaking with business owners on the phone

Confident, friendly, and professional tone

Reliable internet connection and quiet work environment

Ability to follow scripts but also sound natural



Nice to Have (Not Required):

Previous cold calling or appointment setting experience

Experience calling U.S.-based businesses

Familiarity with CRM tools or dialers



Work Details:

Part-time or full-time available

Must be available during U.S. business hours

Ongoing work with consistent calling



Compensation:

monthly salary + performance bonuses for booked appointments

Opportunity for long-term role with increased pay



How to Apply:



Please include:

A loom recording (30–60 seconds) introducing yourself

The word “CALL” at the top of your application

title: Child Development Content Lead – AI-Powered Educational Guides
description:
We are a growing educational content company creating posters, worksheets, and guides that help parents and teachers support children's emotional and academic development. We use AI tools to generate ideas and visuals — but human expertise, judgment, and care are at the heart of everything we publish.



About the Role

We're looking for a Child Development Content Lead who will own our guide production process from concept to final approval. You'll combine your professional background in therapy or counseling with strong editorial judgment and AI fluency to produce resources that are accurate, visually compelling, and genuinely useful for parents and teachers.

You are not a designer — we have a designer on the team. You are the expert, the editor, and the creative director who ensures every guide meets a high standard before it reaches our audience.



What You'll Do

Content Development

Generate and pitch new guide and poster ideas based on what parents and teachers need most

Use AI tools to draft guide text, then vet and refine it using your professional expertise — ensuring accuracy, age-appropriateness, and emotional sensitivity

Simplify complex child development concepts into clear, warm, parent-friendly language



Visual Direction

Use AI tools to generate a visual concept for each guide

Evaluate the output critically — flagging weak illustrations, poor layout, mismatched imagery, or anything that doesn't meet our quality bar

Brief our designer with clear, specific instructions: which illustrations to replace, what fonts to use, how to structure the layout, and what the final piece should look like



Editorial Review & Approval

Review the designer's Canva output against your brief

Assess every piece for visual quality, content accuracy, title strength, layout clarity, and age-appropriateness

Approve final pieces or provide precise feedback for revisions

Maintain a consistently high standard across all published guides



What We're Looking For

Background in therapy, counseling, or child psychology — must have

Solid understanding of child development and social-emotional learning

Ability to critically vet content for professional accuracy — you will be the expert in the room

Strong visual editorial eye — you can look at a guide and immediately identify what's working, what's too cluttered, what illustration is missing the point, or what title won't stop a parent mid-scroll

Fluent with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Gemini, or similar for both text and image generation

Clear, direct communicator — able to brief a designer with specific, actionable instructions

Meticulous and high-standards — you notice details others miss and you care about getting it right

Self-directed and comfortable working remotely and independently



Nice to Have

Experience creating educational materials for classrooms or families

Familiarity with growth mindset, SEL, or positive psychology frameworks

Experience managing or directing creative work



What We Offer

Long-term employment

$9 USD per hour as a starting pay

Fully remote, flexible working arrangement

Meaningful work that directly supports children's wellbeing

A collaborative, creative team environment



To Apply

Please send your CV and a brief note about your background and experience.

As part of the application process, you must perform a test task, follow the instructions here:


/drive/folders/1LHpVo7oQjlMOIm_aqhp7xve4WkwS5Aq-?usp=sharing



IMPORTANT: Applications without a completed test task will NOT be considered.





Your test task will be evaluated on:

Content accuracy: Does the guide faithfully and professionally represent the source text?

Illustration relevance: Are the images specific and accurate to each section — not generic?

Visual quality: Are illustrations clear, high quality, and consistent in style?

Layout: Is it clean, scannable, and uncluttered?

Typography: Does it match the style of our reference guides?

Title: Is it attention-grabbing and parent-facing?

Designer brief: Are your instructions clear and specific enough for a designer to execute without guessing?

title: Executive Assistant
description:
READ THIS FIRST



[SHORT INTRO OF OUR COMPANY]



We are a Singapore based company.



Our main core business involves coaching and training a new generation of financial advisors to reach out to more people, transform more lives and build the business of their dreams.



We have coached more than 3000 Financial Advisors and have more than 8 years under our belt in doing so.



Our clients are mainly in Singapore, Malaysia and Hong Kong and we are on track to reaching out to more of them as we speak.



Right now, We are looking for an Executive Assistant to be part of our company, and to be working directly with the Chief Executive Officer (CEO).



As the Executive Assistant of our company, you will be responsible for coordinating, planning events, communicating to the team and clients, and organising all the backend logistics and operations of the company.



More importantly, your main objective is to buy back time for the CEO.



Your position will play an important and crucial role in the team’s success.





[HOW LIFE IS GONNA LOOK LIKE FOR YOU]



You will be involved in the day to day communications and supporting the CEO directly, assisting in random tasks or any tasks that the CEO requires.





There is no limit to duties an executive assistant can handle, which is why if you are taking on this role, you must have a confident, problem-solving-can-do attitude.



We will not sugarcoat anything but here’s how it is like as well.



You WILL be in a high pressure environment that will force you to step up and grow as an individual.



There will be no bullshit beautiful lies, but rather ugly truth - although necessary - but ugly all the same that will poise you for growth.



While it might be intense, the rewards are great.



Bonuses, employee benefits and perks that will ensure you get well remunerated for your efforts.



The “work hard, play hard and work even harder mantra” is here.



Because we are going to be poised for crazy growth and expansion, you will have to put on your thinking cap, initiative and out of your comfort zone to get things done.





You'll get to attend world-class business, marketing and personal development programs for FREE and rub elbows with renowned Asian entrepreneurs and Financial Advisors.



You’ll be working with an international team, and you’ll even get to hang out with them at least once a year at our annual retreat in an exotic location.





=========

If you are remotely interested after reading the above, click here for next step: 
/document/d/1fPIFvrq33y5RsXemzS8TFbiUQ9bCDOKY4YNDyjo8L2w/edit?usp=sharing

title: Graphic & Web Designer | Elementor | Native-level English REQUIRED
description:
We are looking for a highly skilled Web Designer with a strong foundation in graphic design to join our remote team. This role requires advanced visual design expertise, exceptional attention to detail, and hands-on experience creating and maintaining websites in WordPress using Elementor. The ideal candidate is first and foremost a designer who understands branding, layout, typography, and visual storytelling, and can translate those skills into high-performing, well-structured websites.



This position is not for developers who only assemble templates. You must be able to design original visual systems, create polished graphic materials, and execute complete websites that reflect each client’s identity and goals.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design custom, brand-aligned websites in WordPress using Elementor, with a strong emphasis on visual hierarchy, spacing, typography, and responsiveness.

- Create high-quality graphic materials for digital use, including website visuals, banners, social media graphics, brand identity, and photo editing is a plus.

- Use Adobe Creative Suite at an advanced level to design original layouts and visual elements that integrate seamlessly into web builds.

- Maintain and update existing websites, including design refinements, layout adjustments, blog posts, city pages, and client-requested changes.

- Review and optimize website pages for visual consistency, usability, clarity, and SEO-friendly structure.

- Manage projects from concept through launch, ensuring design accuracy, consistency, and on-time delivery.

- Collaborate with the Art Director and internal team, proactively contributing design ideas and improvements.



Qualifications:

3+ years of professional experience designing and building websites in WordPress.

Expert-level proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite, including Photoshop & Illustrator.

Strong eye for detail with proven ability to design polished, original graphic materials.

Ability to design and build complete websites from scratch using Elementor.

Highly organized and capable of managing multiple projects simultaneously.



A portfolio is required. DO NOT APPLY IF YOU CANNOT PROVIDE A PORTFOLIO.



Nice-to-Have Skills:

Experience with Slack and Asana.

Additional language skills are a plus.



Fluent or native-level English proficiency is required.

space

title: Senior Paid Media Manager (Google Ads & Meta)
description:
We are marketing agency seeking an experienced Senior PPC Manager to lead and optimize paid advertising campaigns across Google Ads and Meta, with a strong focus on lead quality, conversion performance, and measurable business impact.



This role is ideal for someone who understands that low-cost clicks and high lead volume are meaningless unless they translate into qualified prospects and real customers.



You take ownership of performance, think beyond surface-level metrics, and continuously test, refine, and optimize campaigns with clear intent. You are comfortable working in performance-driven environments where results matter, and you know how to identify opportunities, troubleshoot underperformance, and drive consistent improvements in conversion rates.



REQUIREMENTS

5+ years of hands-on PPC experience

Strong expertise in Google Ads (especially Search campaigns)

Solid understanding of conversion tracking, attribution, and performance measurement

Proven ability to improve lead quality—not just reduce CPC

Comfortable owning performance and being accountable for results

Clear and professional written English communication



RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage, optimize, and scale Google Ads and Meta campaigns

Drive improvements in lead quality, cost per lead (CPL), and conversion rates

Plan and execute structured testing across keywords, audiences, creatives, and landing pages

Monitor campaign performance and implement proactive, data-driven optimizations

Analyze results and provide clear, actionable insights and recommendations



WHAT WE CARE ABOUT

Generating qualified leads, not just volume

Understanding user intent and filtering out low-quality traffic

Making data-driven decisions and communicating the “why” behind them



NICE TO HAVE

Experience working with service-based businesses

Landing page optimization and/or CRO experience



TO APPLY

Please answer the following:

1.) Campaign Experience

Briefly describe one lead generation campaign you managed (industry, monthly budget, CPL, and results).

2.) Lead Quality Optimization

How do you diagnose and improve poor lead quality in PPC campaigns?

3.) Account Management

How many accounts do you currently manage (or have recently managed), and how do you allocate your time across them?

4.) Technical & Budget Experience

-What is the largest monthly ad budget you have personally managed (in USD)?

-How do you manage negative keywords at scale?

5.) Tools & Process

Do you use Google Ads Editor? If yes, how and how often?



Please include your resume and desired pay (Please ensure your resume link is publicly accessible and does not require permission to view)



Please begin your application with the phrase “I have read and understood the job requirements.” Applications that do not follow this instruction may not be reviewed.



This role will begin with a paid trial period, with the opportunity to transition into a long-term position based on performance.
