title: B2B Appointment Setter/BDR - Full Time
description:
Job Title: Senior B2B Appointment Setter (Cold Calling – SaaS Focus)



Location: Remote (Philippines)

Hours: Full-time — 40 hours per week

Pay: $6 USD/hour (with performance-based increases)

Schedule: US business hours



About the Role



We are hiring a high-performance appointment setter with deep experience in cold B2B outbound calling. This is not an inbound or warm-lead role.



You will be calling business owners and decision-makers who are not actively looking for our service. Your job is to handle objections, create interest, and book qualified appointments for our sales team in the B2B SaaS space.



If your background is mostly inbound calls, customer support, or light follow-ups — this role is not a fit. We are looking for someone who thrives in high-volume, high-rejection cold calling.



What You’ll Be Doing:

- Making 200–300 outbound cold calls per day

- Calling B2B leads in SaaS and related industries

- Handling objections such as:

“Not interested”

“We already have a solution”

“Send me an
”

- Creating curiosity and positioning the offer

- Booking qualified sales appointments

- Logging call outcomes and updating CRM



Who We’re Looking For



You must have:

- 2+ years of B2B cold calling experience

- Experience booking meetings where the prospect was not expecting your call

- Strong objection-handling and conversational control

- Ability to stay focused during high-dial-volume days

- A quiet, professional work environment

- Stable internet and headset (Mandatory)



Nice to have:

- Experience with PhoneBurner, Kixie, Aircall, Five9, Koncert, or other power/parallel dialers

- SaaS, tech, marketing agency, or B2B service experience



This Role Is NOT For You If

- You only have experience with inbound calls or warm leads

- You are uncomfortable with rejection

- You struggle with call volume or fast-paced dialing

- You rely heavily on scripts instead of real conversation



Application Requirements (Mandatory)



To be considered, you must submit:

- Your Resume or CV

- At least one cold-call recording (MP3 or Google Drive link)

- Must include objection handling

- Must be a real sales call (not role-play)

- If a cold call is unavailable, a video recording of you explaining why you would be a good fit for this role specifically will suffice.

- Stats on your internet speed.



APPLICATIONS WITHOUT A CALL RECORDING/VIDEO INTRODUCTION WILL NOT BE REVIEWED.



Compensation & Growth

- Starting pay: $6 USD/hour

- 40 hours/week



High performers will be given:

- Pay increases

- Spiffs

- Commissions



If you are a true cold-calling professional who knows how to turn strangers into booked meetings, we want to hear from you.

title: Growth and Distribution Operator
description:
Growth & Distribution Operator

 

(Growth & Distribution VA – Movement Builder)

 

Mission: We are building a movement focused on leadership, manhood, family, and restoring order in communities.

 

This is not a typical virtual assistant role.

 

We are looking for someone who can:

 

Take a powerful message and consistently get it in front of the right people—turning attention into engagement and engagement into real opportunities.

 

Role Overview

You will be responsible for:

• Growing visibility

• Driving engagement

• Creating conversations

• Helping expand a leadership movement

 

This role combines execution + strategy + outreach

 

Core Responsibilities

1. Content Distribution

• Post content consistently on:

o LinkedIn (Primary)

o
 (Secondary)

• Optimize posts for engagement (comments, shares, saves)

• Schedule and manage posting calendar

 

2. Outreach & Relationship Building

• Send 20–50 targeted messages daily to:

o Pastors

o Leaders

o Organizations

o Community influencers

• Start conversations (not spam)

• Follow up with leads

• Build relationships that lead to:

o Calls

o Partnerships

o Opportunities

 

3. Content Repurposing

• Turn raw ideas (voice notes, teachings, notes) into:

o Social posts

o Short-form content

o Simple graphics (Canva preferred)

 

4. Lead Tracking & Reporting

• Track:

o Conversations started

o Engagement metrics

o Leads generated

• Provide weekly reports including:

o What’s working

o What’s not

o Recommendations

 

5. Growth Strategy Execution

• Identify ways to:

o Increase reach

o Improve engagement

o Expand audience

• Suggest improvements based on results

 

What This Role Is NOT

• Not just posting content

• Not just admin work

• Not just using tools like GoHighLevel

 

Tools are secondary. Growth is primary.

 

Required Qualifications

1. Proven Growth Experience

 

You must be able to show:

• Accounts you’ve grown

• Engagement results

• Audience-building experience

 

2. Outreach & Communication Skills

• Comfortable starting conversations

• Able to build relationships through messaging

• Strong written communication

 

3. Platform Knowledge

• Deep understanding of:

o LinkedIn growth

o
 engagement

• Knows what content performs and why

 

4. Execution Ability

• Works independently

• Takes initiative

• Does not require constant direction

 

5. Alignment & Awareness

• Understands leadership, personal development, or faith-based content

• Can represent the message with clarity and respect

 

Bonus Skills (Not Required)

• Funnel building (GoHighLevel or similar)

•
 marketing

• CRM management

• Graphic design (Canva)

 

Daily Expectations

• 1 post published

• 20–50 outreach messages sent

• Respond to comments and DMs

• Track daily activity

 

Weekly Expectations

• Growth report including:

o Followers gained

o Engagement metrics

o Conversations started

o Leads generated

 

Required Application Question

 

Please answer the following:

 

“If I gave you a powerful message but no audience, what would you do in the first 30 days to get it in front of the right people?”

 

Success in This Role Looks Like

• Increased visibility

• Higher engagement

• More conversations with leaders

• More opportunities created

title: MARKETING MANAGER: 100% Remote | Flexible Hours | Unlimited Paid Leave | Global Team & Clients
description:
MARKETING MANAGER: Help Accelerate Cures in 10 Major Diseases



100% Remote | Flexible Hours | Unlimited Paid Leave | Global Team & Clients





THE SHORT VERSION

We're hiring a Marketing Manager to run the B2B marketing at Trialfacts, a clinical trial recruitment company that's been in business for 19 years. Your job is marketing Trialfacts to the academic researchers and commercial sponsors who run clinical trials at institutions like Harvard, Yale, and Stanford.



You'll manage content,
, case studies, freelancers, and analytics. You'll work with the CEO to build the marketing function across two segments and all channels. The strategy gets developed together. You make it real.



This role is designed for a strong marketing executor who wants to develop into a strategic marketing leader. You'll gain the cross-functional exposure, mentorship, and business-level thinking that most marketing managers never get access to, and there's a clear path from here to leading the marketing function and joining the leadership team.



If you're an experienced marketer who wants real ownership and impact at a stable, mission-driven company, this role works for you too.



WHAT YOU GET:



The career path:

Strategic mentorship with a clear path from Marketing Manager to Senior Marketing Manager to Head of Marketing

Direct collaboration with the CEO on marketing strategy, not just executing someone else's briefs

Cross-functional work with sales and tech teams, plus access to a full tech and analytics team

Budget ownership: you manage how the marketing budget is allocated across freelancers, agencies, staff, tools, and other expenses



The benefits:

-AUD $3,000-$4,000 per month (with flexibility for the right candidate, depending on experience and overall fit)

-100% remote, work from anywhere, no location restrictions

-No time tracker, no fixed schedule. We measure results, not hours.

-Unlimited paid leave, no approval process, plus a company-wide December closure

-TailorFit Wellness Fund covering physical, mental, emotional, social, and professional wellbeing

-17 weeks parental leave at 50% pay

-Equipment support and company-paid training

-Individual Development Plans and quarterly growth conversations



WHAT THE TEAM SAYS:



"Best remote work experience. Like working in an amazing multinational company, but from home."

-Current employee, Glassdoor



"Tons of ownership without micromanaging."

-Current employee, Glassdoor



Trialfacts is rated 4.5/5 on Glassdoor with a 4.9/5 for Culture & Values. 

92% of reviewers recommend it to a friend.



ABOUT TRIALFACTS:



We recruit participants for clinical trials, connecting academic researchers and commercial sponsors with the right people for their studies. Our clients are primarily academic health researchers at universities in the US and Australia, with a growing commercial segment that includes pharma and biotech sponsors.



We've been doing this for 19 years. 1,097 studies. 476 client organisations. 35,000+ participants enrolled. 35 tea
mbers across 7 countries. Our mission is to accelerate cures in 10 major diseases, and the work your marketing supports has a direct line to studies that could become real treatments.



We're currently rebuilding our marketing foundations from the ground up, across both segments, across all channels. The proof, the credibility, and the data already exist (Harvard, Yale, Stanford clients; over a thousand studies; a 0.7% refund rate). What's missing is a marketing function that properly deploys it. That's where you come in.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Build the proof engine. Trialfacts has 1,097 studies, clients at Harvard, Yale, and Stanford, and a 0.7% refund rate, but almost none of this proof is deployed in marketing yet. You'll conduct case study interviews with US and Australian academic researchers, manage the outreach pipeline (scoring, scheduling, follow-ups), write the outreach
s that get busy researchers to say yes, and turn raw proof into published case studies and content that drive real business results. We also have deep data on our campaign performance and results that can be built into compelling, data-rich marketing assets for an audience that values numbers and evidence.



Run the channels. Content marketing,
 campaigns, newsletters, social media, lead magnets, and collaboration with the sales team on outbound. You'll manage freelancers and agency partners across content, design, and paid advertising (including Google Ads and LinkedIn Ads), and work closely with the in-house tech and analytics team to build, track, and measure what matters. You own the full picture across both audience segments: tracking performance, interpreting data, and reporting clearly on what's working and what isn't.



Make it scale. Improve workflows, build documentation, and set up systems so marketing execution doesn't depend on any one person. Use AI tools for content production, design, analysis, and automation. We'll give you access to whatever tools make sense.



Lead the rhythm. Run the weekly marketing meeting, set clear measurables for your freelancers and any future tea
mbers, and hold people accountable to deadlines and quality standards.



YOU'RE A STRONG FIT IF YOU



-Have 3+ years running marketing campaigns across multiple channels (content,
, social, paid)

-Can write, edit, and quality-check content to a high standard. You're the last set of eyes before something goes live.

-Have managed freelancers or agencies and know how to write a clear brief, set expectations, and review work critically

-Are comfortable with marketing analytics: dashboards, A/B tests, performance reporting, interpreting what the data is telling you

-Use AI tools in your workflow and want to push further

-Have hands-on experience with WordPress/CMS,
 platforms (ActiveCampaign, Mailchimp, or similar), and design tools (Canva or similar)

-Can schedule occasional interviews with US-based academic researchers (typically 1-2 per week, requiring some US timezone overlap)



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF



-You're a strong executor who wants to develop strategic skills, not just keep doing what you're already good at

-You're excited about building a marketing function, not just maintaining one someone else built

-You want to work closely with a CEO and learn how marketing strategy connects to business decisions

-You're comfortable managing scope, prioritising, and pushing back when something isn't the right priority. This is a lean team and you'll need to make smart tradeoffs.

-You care about the quality of your output, not just the volume. Attention to detail matters here.



THIS ROLE IS PROBABLY NOT FOR YOU IF



-You want full strategic autonomy from day one. Strategy here is built collaboratively with the CEO, especially in the first 6-12 months. Your strategic ownership grows as you demonstrate results.

-You're a specialist in one channel looking for a specialist role. This requires breadth across content,
, social, analytics, and freelancer management.

-Your primary motivation is maximising salary. The total value here is flexibility + mission + mentorship + career path, not maximum pay.



WHAT HAPPENS WHEN YOU APPLY



Our hiring process is thorough. That's by design. It protects you as much as it protects us.

1. Application with a few screening questions so we can understand your background

2. Screening interview to get to know each other and explore fit

3. Final interview to dig deeper into your experience and how you think

4. Live hiring assessment where you'll work through a marketing case study with us, so we can see how you approach real problems



We want to see how you think, not just what you've done.



APPLY HERE:

title: E-commerce Optimization Lead for Shopify, Shopee, TikTok  (SEO, AEO & GEO focus)
description:
We are looking for a forward-thinking Optimization Specialist to lead Jomingo’s visibility strategy across Shopify, Shopee, and TikTok Shop. Your mission is to ensure Jomingo is the "top-of-mind" recommendation across traditional Search Engines (SEO), AI Search Engines (AEO), and Generative engines like Perplexity and Gemini (GEO). As well as using Generative AI tools to produce consistent, high-end product imagery that drives our 10% conversion target.



Key Responsibilities



1. Algorithm & AI Discovery (AEO/GEO)



Structured Data Mastery: Implement advanced Schema markup so AI agents (Gemini, ChatGPT) can accurately "read" product benefits and stock levels.



Generative Engine Optimization (GEO): Seed brand-authority content to ensure Jomingo is the #1 recommended natural deodorant in conversational AI queries.



Visual SEO: Optimize AI-generated images with descriptive Alt-Text and metadata to dominate Google Lens and TikTok visual search.



2. Platform SEO & Conversion (CRO)



Marketplace Dominance: Optimize Shopee and TikTok Shop listings for high-intent keywords like "Natural Deodorant SG" and "Zero Waste Beauty."



High-Conversion Copy: Write "benefit-first" descriptions and A/B test product thumbnails to maximize Click-Through Rates (CTR).



3. AI-Powered Product Imagery



Consistent Visual Identity: Use AI tools (e.g., Midjourney, Adobe Firefly, or specialized product AI) to generate clean, consistent lifestyle backgrounds for our botanical products.



Virtual Staging: Transform basic smartphone product shots into professional studio assets that highlight Jomingo’s "Clean & Vibrant" aesthetic.



Batch Content Generation: Rapidly iterate visual assets for different campaigns (e.g., Earth Month, Gift Guides) ensuring the lighting, shadows, and "botanical" feel remain uniform across Shopify and Shopee.



Mandatory Criteria:



AI Tool Proficiency: Mastery of Generative AI for image creation (e.g., Midjourney, Flair.ai, or Canva Magic Studio) to achieve realistic product-in-environment shots.



Advanced Search Knowledge: Proven understanding of the difference between SEO (traditional), AEO (AI search), and GEO (generative answers).



Marketplace Expertise: Expert-level experience with Shopee Seller Centre and TikTok Shop Seller Center.



D2C Technical Skills: Proficiency in Shopify backend management and technical SEO.

title: Credit Repair Customer Service
description:
CR Financial Solutions is a leading credit repair company seeking a dedicated, professional, and customer-focused Customer Service Representative. We are searching for a single, ideal candidate who will provide exceptional support to our clients by phone,
, and chat, specializing in the credit repair process.



Key Responsibilities:



Deliver outstanding customer support by addressing credit inquiries, subscription payments, and online account access issues.

Guide customers through login steps and troubleshoot technical issues on CR Financial Solutions’ platform.

Resolve customer concerns with professionalism, empathy, and clear communication.

Maintain accurate records of customer interactions and issues.

Collaborate with the CR Financial Solutions team to continuously improve service quality.



Qualifications:



Prior customer service experience, ideally in credit repair, finance, or a related field.

Excellent English communication skills, both written and verbal.

Strong attention to detail and problem-solving abilities.

Tech-savvy: comfortable navigating online systems, CRMs, and troubleshooting logins on our platform.

Ability to handle sensitive customer data with discretion and care.

Reliable, organized, and committed to delivering top-tier service.



If you are that standout candidate ready to make a difference in clients' financial journeys, apply today and join CR Financial Solutions—where integrity, growth, and exceptional service come first.

title: Quantity Surveyor
description:
Objectives of this role

Preparation of cost estimates, bills of quantities 

Managing project budgets, including forecasting and monitoring costs

Maintaining accurate records and documentation of all project-related costs and financial transactions

Provide expert advice on procurement, risk management and cost-saving measures



Duties and Responsibilities

Preparing the initial quote and contract for the sales team from the company’s side

Tracking changes to the design and/or construction work and adjusting budget projections in line with these

Coordination with the design team for analysing architectural and service drawings

Manage the valuation of work done and handle claims and variations

Preparing interim and final valuations, variations and claims of the construction site



Job Requirements

Proficient in AutoCAD (2D & 3D drawings)

Ability to read and interpret architectural and structural drawings

Able to extract dimensions, elevations, and structural details from drawings

Familiar with cantilever structurers, balconies, metal frames, and extensions

Ability to identify materials and structural components from plans

title: ID Sales Specialist
description:
The ideal candidate should have strong sales experience and good relationship-building with interior designer/architects and managing agents. You must be highly motivated, results-driven, and capable of handling negotiations with confidence and professionalism.



*The position is based in Singapore.



* Earn attractive commissions on top of base salary.



* Introduce our paint products and painting services. Open to traveling to different locations to push product visibility and growth.



* Explain and present to customers how products work and explain their features and benefits and set up and maintain attractive product displays to draw customer attention.



* Sales and Target Achievement - Ability to consistently meet and exceed sales targets.



* Excellent verbal, written, and interpersonal communication skills to engage effectively with customers.



* An outgoing personality and a self-motivated, proactive approach to engaging with people.

* Must have Civil Engineering Degree with autocad experience

title: Affiliate Manager
description:
Job Description:



Full-Time | Work From Home | Ecommerce & Influencer Partnerships



SRI Labs is a fast-growing, premium beauty & wellness ecommerce brand known for high-end skincare, hair tools, and breakthrough consumer products. We’re looking for a driven, organized, and relationship-focused Affiliate Manager to lead and scale our affiliate program across platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, and key influencer networks.



If you love partnering with creators, optimizing affiliate performance, and helping a brand grow through relationships — this is the role for you.



What You’ll Do



As our Affiliate Manager, you will own the entire affiliate ecosystem and work directly with the CEO and marketing leadership team to scale creator-led revenue.



Key Responsibilities



Manage and optimize SRI Labs’ affiliate program across ShopMy, Levanta, and other affiliate platforms.

Recruit, vet, and onboard new affiliates, creators, and influencers that align with our brand.

Build strong long-term relationships with partners to drive consistent revenue and brand growth.

Track performance, payouts, ROI, and ensure all affiliates are supported with assets, codes, and campaigns.

Coordinate affiliate-driven launches, seasonal promotions, and strategic campaigns.

Identify top performers and build incentive strategies to maximize their output.

Maintain reporting dashboards and communicate results to leadership weekly.

Collaborate with internal marketing, product, design, and operations teams to support affiliate needs.

Continuously test new platforms, creators, strategies, and incentives to grow revenue.

Who You Are



We’re looking for someone who is:



Based in the Philippines

Experienced in affiliate, influencer marketing, or digital partnerships (1–3+ years preferred).

Organized, reliable, and able to manage many creators and campaigns at once.

Strong at relationship-building — someone affiliates love to work with.

Comfortable working within platforms like ShopMy, Levanta, Impact, or similar tools.

Data-driven with excellent follow-through and communication skills.

Hungry, proactive, and passionate about helping a brand grow.

Why Join SRI Labs?



Remote work

Work directly with a high-performing founding team

Competitive salary based on experience

Long-term growth potential within a fast-scaling ecommerce company

Supportive, positive culture built around speed, innovation, and passion for great products

Opportunity to make a big impact — your work will directly drive revenue and brand expansion

How to Apply



 your resume and a quick 2–3 sentence introduction 



Subject Line: Affiliate Manager – [Your Name]



Include:



Links to affiliate programs or creators you’ve worked with

Any relevant platforms/tools you’ve used

Your expected monthly salary (in PHP)

Job Type: Full-time

title: Cold Calling Closer for B2B Solar Lead Generation (Commission-Based, Remote))
description:
SolarBridge is a fast-growing B2B lead generation company helping solar installation companies across the United States get exclusive, qualified homeowner leads. We're looking for a hungry, confident cold caller who can CLOSE DEALS on the phone — not just book appointments.



?????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Make 100+ outbound calls per day to solar installation company owners, VPs of Sales, and decision-makers across the US

- Qualify prospects using our proven script (Are they buying leads? What's their volume? Who's the decision-maker?)

- PITCH and CLOSE them on the phone (we provide the script, you execute)

- Book qualified prospects for a 5-minute "contract review call" with our founder (for hot leads you've already closed)

- Track all calls and outcomes in our CRM (simple Google Sheets — we'll train you)

- Provide daily activity reports: calls made, conversations had, deals closed



This is NOT just an appointment-setting role. You will be expected to handle objections, pitch the value, and ask for the sale on every call.



????????????????????????????????????????



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



REQUIRED:

? Excellent English (US accent strongly preferred) — you'll be calling American business owners, so clear, confident, professional communication is ESSENTIAL

? B2B phone sales experience (cold calling, inside sales, or closing experience required — we need a closer, not a beginner)

? Comfortable making 100+ calls per day and hearing "no" without getting discouraged

? Self-motivated and results-driven — you'll work independently with daily check-ins

? Reliable internet (minimum 10 Mbps), quiet workspace, quality headset/microphone

? Available 20 hours/week (4 hours/day, Monday-Friday) during US business hours (9am-5pm EST)



PREFERRED (but not required):

? Experience selling to contractors, home services businesses, or B2B SaaS

? Familiarity with CRM tools (Google Sheets, HubSpot, Salesforce, etc.)

? Track record of hitting sales quotas in previous roles



????????????????????????????????????????



COMPENSATION (PERFORMANCE-BASED)



TRIAL PERIOD (First 14 Days):

- $200 USD paid at end of trial (ONLY if you close 8+ demos/deals)

- $25 USD bonus per additional deal closed beyond 8

- Example: Close 10 deals in trial = $200 base + $50 bonus = $250 total

- If you close fewer than 8 deals, trial ends with no payment (this is a results-only role)



ONGOING EMPLOYMENT (After Passing Trial):

- $350 USD/month base salary

- $25 USD per deal closed (no cap — top performers earn $600-$800/month)

- Minimum 15 deals/month required to maintain employment

- Part-time: 20 hours/week to start

- Potential to move to full-time (40 hrs/week) for top performers



EXAMPLE MONTHLY EARNINGS:

- Close 15 deals/month (minimum) = $350 base + $375 bonuses = $725/month

- Close 20 deals/month = $350 base + $500 bonuses = $850/month

- Close 25 deals/month = $350 base + $625 bonuses = $975/month

- Top performers (30+ deals/month) earn $1,100+/month



Payment via PayPal or Wise or Stripe at the end of each month.



????????????????????????????????????????



TRIAL PERIOD REQUIREMENTS



Your first 14 days are a PERFORMANCE TRIAL. To pass and receive payment:

? Book 8+ qualified deals (installer agrees to move forward, books contract review call)

? Maintain 100 dials/day minimum (we track this)

? Professional communication, positive attitude, coachable mindset



If you hit these benchmarks, you'll transition to ongoing employment with potential for full-time hours.



?? IMPORTANT: This is a commission-based, results-only role. If you do not close at least 8 deals during the 14-day trial, the trial will end and no payment will be made. Only apply if you're confident in your closing ability.



????????????????????????????????????????



TO APPLY (APPLICATIONS WITHOUT THESE WILL BE REJECTED)



1. SHORT INTRODUCTION (5 sentences max):

   • Your name and background

   • Your B2B cold calling/closing experience (specific results if possible — e.g., "closed 20 deals/month at previous role")

   • Why you're the right fit for this role



2. AVAILABILITY:

   • How many hours per week can you work?

   • What hours are you available (include your timezone)?

   • Confirm you can work US business hours (9am-5pm EST)



3. VOICE SAMPLE + OBJECTION HANDLING (REQUIRED):

   Record yourself doing this 60-second role-play:



   Part 1: Read this opening script naturally (like you're on a real call):

   "Hi [Name], this is [Your Name] calling from SolarBridge. We help solar installers across the US get exclusive, qualified homeowner leads at $75 per lead with no long-term contracts. Is lead generation something you're currently focused on at your company?"



   Part 2: Handle this objection (improvise your response):

   The installer says: "We're already working with another lead provider and we're happy with them."



   • Use Vocaroo.com (free, no signup) or Loom to record

   • Paste the link in your application

   • ?? Applications without a voice sample will be automatically rejected



????????????????????????????????????????



WHY JOIN SOLARBRIDGE?



? Work from home with flexible hours

? Unlimited earning potential (no cap on commissions)

? Fast-growing company — top performers will have opportunities to move into leadership roles as we scale

? We provide everything: script, call list, training, CRM access

? You just need to show up, dial, and close



We're hiring IMMEDIATELY and beginning interviews THIS WEEK. Only 1-2 positions available.



Looking forward to working with you!

title: Sales Development Representative - B2B SaaS (Dutch-speaking)
description:
Company Overview



At LevelUp, we believe growth happens when people feel trusted, supported, and challenged. For more than seven years we’ve partnered with agencies, software vendors and website owners to provide world class outsourcing and offshore hiring services in a range of verticals, such as technical, operational, and back-office support. We hire curious problem-solvers, give them room to own outcomes, and back them with systems, support and a culture that makes learning part of the job. Join us and help businesses (and your career) level up.



Position Overview



We are looking for a proactive, resourceful Dutch-speaking Sales Development Representative to support our client’s global B2B SaaS sales team. You will handle inbound and outbound outreach for the auditing & accounting SaaS product in Dutch-speaking markets, qualify prospects, and book meetings for sales executives.

Strong communication skills are essential in order to match the high level of detail and precision expected by auditing and accounting professionals. You do not need deep technical product knowledge, but you must be able to understand the key differences between product versions across different regions and communicate them clearly to prospects



Key Responsibilities

•Reach out to inbound leads from Dutch-speaking markets via phone,
, and LinkedIn.

•Qualify leads against the Ideal Customer Profile (ICP) and basic business needs.

•Understand and apply regional differences in the software when speaking with prospects.

•Use discovery questions to confirm pain points, fit, and level of interest.

•Book qualified meetings for sales executives and manage calendar invites.

•Execute directed outbound campaigns 
, call, sequences) to target accounts and contact lists.

•Maintain accurate and up-to-date records in the CRM (e.g. lead status, notes, follow-up tasks).

•Follow approved scripts,
 templates, and objection-handling guidelines.

•Meet or exceed monthly targets for:

•Qualified meetings booked (e.g. 20 per month)

•Activity volumes (calls,
s, InMails)

•Collaborate with the sales and marketing teams to provide feedback on lead quality, messaging, and common objections.



Required Skills & Experience

•2+ years experience in an SDR, inside sales, appointment-setting, or similar role (B2B SaaS preferred)

•Excellent spoken and written English

•Advanced proficiency (C1 or native) in Dutch

•Confident phone presence and strong
-writing skills

•Comfortable working with CRMs and sales tools (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot, Pipedrive, Outreach, Salesloft, Apollo, or similar)

•Able to quickly understand and explain key product features and regional differences

•Strong attention to detail when logging activities and updating records

•Self-motivated, target-driven, and comfortable working in a metrics-based environment

•Reliable internet connection and suitable home-working environment for making calls



Nice to have: proficiency in German



More Info

•Remote, home-based role in the Philippines

•Central European Time office hours (4pm - 1am Philippines Time)

•Regular Philippines employment (HMO and 13th month pay included)

•Equipment provided



APPLY HERE:

title: Funnel builder (funnelish) - Long term / stable job
description:
Funnelish Expert for Drop Shipping Business



We run a growing drop shipping business and we're looking for a skilled funnel builder who knows Funnelish inside and out. This is not a general VA role — we need someone who has actually built and optimized product sales funnels before and can show results.

What you'll do:



- Build and optimize sales funnels in Funnelish from scratch

- Connect Funnelish to Shopify Checkout and ensure everything runs smoothly

- Run A/B tests across funnel stages and implement what works

- Analyze funnel performance data and identify drop-off points

- Work with our team via Slack and ClickUp



Who we're looking for:



- You have hands-on experience building funnels in Funnelish — not just page builders in general

- You have connected Funnelish to Shopify Checkout before

- You understand e-commerce buyer psychology and know how to structure an offer

- You can read data and make decisions based on it — not just gut feeling

- You communicate clearly and hit deadlines without being chased



To apply, you must include:



- At least 2 examples of funnels you built (screenshots or live links)

- A short explanation of one funnel you improved and what result it had

- Your rate and availability



Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

Compensation: $20 per funnel with a bonus structure. Long-term collaboration with higher rates for strong performers.

title: Senior Recruiter
description:
******TO BE CONSIDERED FOR THIS ROLE, YOU MUST SUBMIT YOUR RESUME AND VIDEO INTRODUCTION.******



Senior Recruiter



Job Type: Full-Time

Work Hours: Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Paci?c Time, with a 1-hour break

Salary: $1200 per month



Job Overview:

We are looking for an experienced and results-driven Senior Recruiter to join our remote

recruitment team. In this role, you will lead full-cycle hiring efforts, ensuring that top-tier Filipino

talent is sourced, assessed, and presented to meet the expectations of overseas clients. You’ll

work collaboratively with internal teams and leverage advanced sourcing strategies to deliver

high-quality candidates e?ciently and consistently.



Key Responsibilities:



* Manage every stage of the recruitment lifecycle: role intake/review, sourcing, screening,

and interviewing.

* Act as a key recruitment partner—work closely with internal teams to understand hiring

needs, de?ne role speci?cations, and build strategic hiring plans.

* Utilize advanced sourcing techniques (LinkedIn Recruiter, job boards, talent

communities, referrals) to proactively build strong pipelines for both active and passive

candidates.

* Conduct structured candidate assessments, prepare comprehensive candidate pro?les,

and deliver high-quality shortlists to the Recruitment Manager for ?nal review.

* Facilitate the interview process for candidates, ensuring coordination and readiness.

* Monitor and report key recruitment metrics (e.g., time-to-?ll, source effectiveness,

candidate no-shows, etc.) and use data to optimize recruitment strategy.

* Ensure a seamless candidate experience—from initial contact through pre-endorsement

interview—with transparent communication and timely updates.

* Contribute to the continuous improvement of recruitment tools, work?ows, sourcing

channels, and team practices to increase e?ciency and quality.

* Support the internal team by ensuring placements align with both client requirements

and candidate expectations.



Qualifications:



* Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Psychology, Business Administration, or a

related ?eld.

* Minimum of 5 years’ recruitment experience, with signi?cant full-cycle hiring exposure

Recruiter, job boards, etc.).

* Self-driven with a strong sense of ownership and commitment to ensuring excellent

recruitment outcomes.



Note: An NBI or police clearance will be required upon acceptance of the job offer.

title: Senior Long-Form Video Editor – YouTube Talking Head Content
description:
We are an established and growing YouTube content agency working with multiple clients producing premium long-form talking head content. We're looking for editors who take genuine pride in their craft and want to grow with a team that values excellence and creativity.

About the Work:



Editing sit-down talking head videos, typically 12–20 minutes in final length

Heavy, purposeful B-roll usage — you know how to find the right shot to complement what's being said, not just fill space

Clean, creative on-screen text and graphics that enhance the story without cluttering the screen

You bring creative ideas to the edit — transitions, pacing, visual storytelling

Multiple client channels, each with their own style and voice



What We're Looking For:



Expert-level use of Adobe Premiere Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or Final Cut Pro

Strong understanding of retention-based editing — hooks, pacing, keeping viewers watching

Deep knowledge of copyright rules around music, footage, graphics and sound effects

Skilled at sourcing copyright-free or properly licensed assets

Creative, innovative, and not afraid to try new approaches

Takes feedback well, revises quickly, and adapts to each client's style

Excellent English communication — responsive, clear, and professional

Available during US business hours

Able to deliver full long-form edits within 48–72 hours at the highest quality



Compensation:



Pay is based on quality and output — our best editors earn well into the thousands per month

Ongoing, stable, full-time work

The better you perform, the more work and higher pay you receive



How to Apply:

Simply reply to this job post with a short introduction about yourself and links to any previous video editing work or YouTube channels you've worked on. Shortlisted candidates will be sent a short trial clip to edit and return to us via
 — this is how we find our best people.

title: Accountant (US Taxation, Payroll and QuickBooks Specialist)
description:
Are you a highly analytical Accountant with strong US taxation and payroll experience and a passion for working with diverse clients?



We are looking for a detail-oriented and highly analytical Accountant with solid experience in US taxation, payroll processing, and proficiency in QuickBooks. This role requires someone who has handled multiple clients and can confidently manage financial records, ensure compliance, and provide accurate reporting.



Key Responsibilities:

• Manage and maintain accurate financial records for multiple clients

• Prepare and review financial statements and reports

• Handle US tax-related tasks including compliance and filings

• Process payroll and ensure timely and accurate employee compensation

• Perform bookkeeping tasks using QuickBooks

• Reconcile accounts and resolve discrepancies

• Analyze financial data to support decision-making

• Communicate with clients regarding financial matters when necessary



Qualifications:

• Female, 28 years old and above

• Strong analytical and problem-solving skills

• Proven experience in US taxation

• Experience in payroll processing

• Proficient in QuickBooks

• Experience handling multiple clients/accounts

• Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

• Strong communication and organizational skills

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines



Tools You Will Use:

• QuickBooks, Vlook and Pivot experience required



Working Hours:

• Full-Time - Monday to Friday

• 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM CST (Graveyard Shift)



Compensation:

• $5–6 per hour



Preferred Traits:

• Highly analytical mindset

• Proactive and resourceful

• Strong sense of accountability

• Adaptable and able to work in a fast-paced environment

• Client-focused with a professional attitude



Non-Negotiables:

• Screenshot and productivity tracker required

• Good credit score

• Ability to work during the Graveyard Shift (US Timezone)



HOW TO APPLY:

To be considered, please send the following:

1. Your updated resume

2. A short video introduction showcasing why you're the perfect fit for the role



If you don’t have experience in this area, we kindly ask that you refrain from applying at this time.

title: Social Content Operator
description:
Content Operator (Personal Brand | InspireLife365)

We’re building a content engine that drives visibility, connection, and clients, not just content for content’s sake.

Part-Time | 10–20 Hours/Week

Ownership | Creative Thinking | Growth-Oriented



Ready to Be More Than “Just a Content Creator”?



At InspireLife365, we don’t create content just to post.



We create content that shifts how people think, how they feel, and how they move.



We help high-achieving women move from overthinking, pressure, and burnout into clarity, confidence, and emotional self-leadership through coaching, speaking, masterclasses, and transformational programs.



This is not surface-level work.

And this is not a role for someone who just follows instructions.



We’re Looking for a Content Operator - Not Just a Creator or Scheduler



THIS IS FOR SOMEONE WHO:



Understands how content supports growth, authority, and conversion, not just engagement

Thinks beyond tasks

Understands how content actually connects

Can take an idea and turn it into something meaningful, structured, and impactful



You won’t just be “helping with content.”



You’ll be helping shape how our message shows up in the world.



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU IF…

You naturally think, “This could be better”, and then improve it

You can take a rough idea or voice note and turn it into clear, compelling content

 content

stronger hooks

call-to-actions

title: Personal Assistant to a High Performing Business Owners
description:
You’ve been doing this work well for a long time.

You anticipate. You solve. You protect the calendar before the conflict happens. You’ve made your executive’s world run smoothly — often without them realizing how much you were carrying.

But somewhere along the way, the environment stopped matching your standards. Too much oversight. Not enough trust. A business you do the work for but don’t really believe in.





This is the role for what comes next.



THE ROLE

We are Market Leaders — a coaching and marketing education brand that supports high-performing business owners across Financial Advisory, Real Estate, Coaching, and Education. As part of our client services team, we’re placing a dedicated PA to support one of our clients directly.

You’ll own the calendar, the inbox, client onboarding, admin operations, social media, GHL — and make everything run before anyone has to ask.



WHAT YOU BRING

• 2+ years of executive assistant or PA experience

• Expert cross-timezone calendar management (Google Calendar)

• Professional written and verbal English

• CRM and client management experience

• Proficiency in GHL, social media, and admin tools

• Philippines-based, available SGT hours (GMT+8)

• Proactive problem-solver who anticipates needs

• High attention to detail, zero tolerance for errors

• Reliable home office setup, stable internet (Philippines-based)

• Singapore Time Zone availability (GMT+8), flexible hours





WHAT YOU GET

• Full trust and autonomy from day one — no micromanagement

• A mission you can genuinely believe in

• Remote 



What You'll Do



Manage executive calendar with zero conflicts

Handle all
 correspondence professionally, responding within 2 hours

Coordinate customer onboarding from inquiry to activation

Solve problems proactively - anticipate challenges and eliminate chaos

Bridge operations across creative teams, clients, and leadership





A NOTE ON CULTURE

We have a strict no brilliant jerks policy. Skills matter deeply here — so does how you show up for the people around you.

You’re our kind of person if you deliver excellent work without creating friction, take ownership without needing applause, and genuinely celebrate when a teammate wins.

High Performance. Zero Drama. Peaceful & Profitable — we mean all three.



If you’re the person who already did the job before anyone asked — this was written for you.



APPLY HERE:

title: Backend Developer (Node.js / Firebase) – Part-Time / Full-Time | Remote
description:
We are seeking a Backend Developer to support and enhance our existing applications running in a Node.js and Firebase environment on Google Cloud Platform (GCP). In this role, you will help maintain live systems, introduce new functionality, and ensure the backend infrastructure continues to operate efficiently and securely.



This opportunity is well suited for someone comfortable working with production systems and capable of making sound technical decisions when improving backend architecture.



Key Responsibilities:

- Maintain and enhance backend services supporting live applications

- Develop and improve backend functionality using Node.js and Firebase

- Build and maintain RESTful APIs, cloud functions, and serverless components

- Evaluate system architecture and propose improvements when needed

- Monitor and improve system stability, performance, and security

- Handle deployments and maintain CI/CD pipelines and version control processes

- Work with the outgoing developer to ensure a smooth project transition

- Deliver ongoing updates, feature enhancements, and production support



Required Qualifications;

- 5+ years of backend development experience

- 3+ years of hands-on experience with Node.js and Firebase

- Experience deploying and managing applications on Google Cloud Platform

- Demonstrated experience building and maintaining REST APIs and serverless backend systems

- Experience managing production environments with a focus on performance, security, and reliability (Firebase Auth, IAM roles, HTTPS, JWT)

- Familiarity with Git-based version control systems such as GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket

- Experience implementing and maintaining CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Cloud Build)

- Strong analytical thinking and ability to independently recommend technical improvements

- Clear English communication skills, especially when explaining technical approaches



Preferred Experience:

- Experience working with Firebase Cloud Functions or GCP Cloud Functions in serverless environments

- Familiarity with additional GCP services such as Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, or Cloud Storage

- Experience working with financial or fintech applications involving secure systems and transaction processing

- Familiarity with monitoring and logging tools such as Firebase Analytics or GCP Logging/Monitoring

- Experience implementing secure authentication and authorization methods including OAuth or JWT

- Exposure to Terraform or similar infrastructure-as-code tools

- Experience managing staging and production environments and release processes

- Familiarity with API documentation tools such as Swagger or OpenAPI

- Experience guiding backend direction or mentoring developers during project transitions



Work Schedule:

- Part-Time (Approximately 20 hours per week)

- Full-Time (Available)

Flexible working hours between 8:00 AM – 5:00 PM Philippine Time

- Fully remote position

- Young, supportive team

- Clear growth path with opportunities to expand your role



ROLE OVERVIEW



You will extract short, high-value clips from a YouTube channel.



Your main responsibility is to:



- Watch long-form YouTube videos

- Deeply understand our target audience (pain points, goals, objections)

- Identify valuable, engaging, and on-brand 
nts

- Select clips that align with our short-form SOPs

- Turn them into 15–45 second Instagram Reels

- Add clean and accurate subtitles

- Ensure smooth audio

- Deliver 2–3 clips per day



You are not creating content from scratch.

You are selecting and packaging the best parts — strategically.



TASKS



- Clip 2–3 short videos per day (15–45 seconds each)

- Follow our short-form SOPs consistently

- Select clips based on audience relevance and brand alignment

- Clearly explain your thought process when submitting clips:

- Ensure subtitles are accurate and easy to understand

- Ensure a smooth audio experience

- Review your work carefully before submitting



Note: There may be additional small tasks as needed.



REQUIREMENTS



- Excellent English skills (C1 or above)

- Strong understanding of audience psychology and content-market fit

- Ability to follow and execute based on SOPs

- Previous experience in short-form editing or video clipping

- Strong judgment for identifying valuable, on-brand content

- Detail-oriented with critical thinking skills

- Ability to work independently while staying communicative

- Efficient and solution-focused mindset

MORE ABOUT US

description:
???? ROLE OVERVIEW



Resurge Tax & Bookkeeping is hiring 2 high-performance sales closers to convert leads into paying clients for our bookkeeping and tax services.



You will be speaking with small business owners (barbers, salons, cleaning businesses, contractors) and closing them into monthly service packages.



???? This is a production-based role for serious sales professionals only



?



???? COMPENSATION (IMPORTANT – POSITIONED RIGHT)

 • $2.50/hour draw (advance against commission)

 • 10% commission per closed account



???? Example Earnings:

 • $297 client ? ~$30 commission

 • $497 client ? ~$50 commission

 • $997 client ? ~$100 commission



???? If you produce, you earn. If you don’t, this role is not for you.



?



???? PERFORMANCE EXPECTATIONS

 • 50+ outbound calls per day

 • Follow up with inbound leads

 • Conduct discovery calls

 • Close minimum 3 deals per week

 • Maintain consistent pipeline activity



?



???? RESPONSIBILITIES

 • Call and follow up with leads

 • Generate your own opportunities

 • Qualify and present services

 • Handle objections and close deals

 • Track activity and results



?



? REQUIREMENTS

 • Clear English (little to no accent)

 • Sales experience REQUIRED

 • Lead generation experience REQUIRED

 • Basic understanding of bookkeeping or financial services

 • Strong confidence on the phone

 • Reliable internet + quiet workspace



?



? SCHEDULE



Flexible between:

???? 7:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST



?



???? TRAINING PROVIDED

 • Sales script

 • Offer breakdown

 • Closing guidance



?



???? WHO THIS IS FOR



This role is for:

 • Closers who want to earn based on performance

 • Sales reps comfortable making high-volume calls

 • Individuals who are competitive and self-driven



?



?? WHO SHOULD NOT APPLY

 • Anyone looking for hourly-only income

 • Anyone uncomfortable with commission-based roles

 • Anyone who cannot meet call or closing targets



?



???? GROWTH OPPORTUNITY



Top performers can move into:

 • Senior closer roles

 • Higher commission tiers

 • Leadership positions



?



???? HOW TO APPLY



Submit:

 1. 1–2 minute video introduction

 2. Your sales experience

 3. Why you’re confident you can close

title: Tech Ops and Automation Manager: $1,500–$2,000 USD PER MONTH
description:
Start rate: $1,500–$2,000 per month (based on experience)

Paid once per month via Wise.



ABOUT US







Young Publisher is an international digital marketing company.

We work with content creators and online brands.



If you’re someone who wants to take full ownership and build systems that scale, this role is for you!



BENEFITS



- Full-time position: 8 hours daily, Monday-Friday; 40 hours per week (Flexible hours)

- Long-term stability: Not a short-term freelance contract.

- Stable monthly income: On-time payments via Wise

- Growth path: Opportunity to take full ownership of our tech stack

- High impact: Your systems directly affect revenue, retention, and team efficiency

- Supportive environment: No micromanagement, high ownership culture

- Tools provided: We cover the software you need



YOUR IMPACT



Your work reduces manual admin work.

Your systems improve onboarding and fulfillment speed.

Your dashboards increase visibility into performance metrics.

Your automations help the company scale cleanly.

You do not just build workflows.

You build infrastructure.



TASKS



Systems & Automation

- Build and manage advanced Airtable systems (multi-table databases, linked records, dashboards, KPIs)

- Create and maintain automations using 
, Zapier, and n8n

- Set up Slack automations (channel creation, alerts, routing, reminders, triggers)

- Connect tools across the company (CRM, forms, surveys, Slack, Airtable, Kajabi)

- Monitor automations daily and proactively fix issues

- Reduce manual processes across departments

- Kajabi & Fulfillment Support

- Manage Kajabi automations (onboarding flows, tagging, access control,
 triggers)

- Automate client onboarding (intake - Slack access - CRM tracking - milestone tracking)

- Improve fulfillment systems with dashboards, alerts, and progress tracking

- Build reporting for activation, retention, churn, revenue, and team performance



Architecture & Optimization

- Suggest better system structures as we grow

- Document all workflows clearly

- Build scalable foundations instead of temporary fixes

- Own and protect our automation infrastructure



REQUIREMENTS (MUST-HAVE)



- C1+ English (written and spoken)

- Advanced Airtable experience

- Advanced 
 experience

- Experience with Slack automations and integrations

- Experience with Zapier

- Strong understanding of APIs and webhooks

- Strong systems thinking (you think in architecture, not tasks)

- Ability to translate business problems into technical solutions

- Proactive mindset and high ownership

- Reliable internet and quiet workspace



STRONG PLUS



- n8n experience

- Kajabi automation experience

- CRM integrations (Close is a plus)

- Experience building KPI dashboards

- Experience supporting onboarding and fulfillment workflows

- Experience in fast-growing online businesses

- Experience with 7–9 figure digital brands



WHY JOIN US?



- $1,500–$2,000 per month based on experience

- Long-term stability

- High ownership role

- Direct impact on company growth

- Clear opportunity to become Head of Systems / Automation Lead

- Work with a fast-moving digital company

- All tools and software covered



HOW TO APPLY



1: Message us on OnlineJobs.ph with “TECH OPS” as the message title

2: Include ONLY the following in your message:



#1: Your CV

#2: Your years of experience with Airtable

#3: Your years of experience with 

#4: Your experience with n8n (if any)

#5: A short description of the most advanced system you have built

#6: One sentence on why you are a strong fit for this role



Note: Messages that do not follow this format will NOT be reviewed.



We look forward to building scalable systems with you.



P.S. Recruitment is managed by Young Publisher. Successful candidates will work under Social Influence Consulting LLC.

title: Amazon Sourcing Specialist (Private-Label, White-Label, Wholesale)
description:
Beyond the Listing: Build a High-Performance Career in E-Commerce

The Engine of Our Success

-$50M+ Amazon Global Revenue

-Proprietary Growth Framework

-Collaborative Execution



Why You’ll Thrive With Us

-Total Freedom

-Life-First Scheduling

-Accelerated Growth

-Industry-Leading Rewards



Learn More: i.
/LNuX5bl.png



Salary Ranges from $500 to $1500/month

Candidates shall be competent in the following:

-Supplier Outreach & Strategic Negotiation: Master global factory communication and manufacturer positioning to identify strong production partners. Expertly translate brand-specific standards into technical requirements to ensure factory alignment, IP protection, and regulatory compliance. Negotiate unit costs and MOQs by cross-referencing regional manufacturing capabilities with target margins to ensure a reliable, high-quality path to production.

-Product Innovation & Supply Chain Authority: Develop a "molecular-level" understanding of materials and manufacturing constraints to transform Customer Review sentiment into physical product improvements. Translate competitor pain points into specific manufacturing requirements. Oversee the transition from generic white-label items to differentiated private-label assets with unique selling propositions (USP) that proactively address buyer objections.

-Technical Proficiency & Prompting: Leverage modern AI tools (Gemini, Claude) through advanced prompt engineering to scout global databases, identify niche manufacturers, and automate supplier vetting against strict product requirements. Utilize AI to bridge communication gaps with international partners, draft high-precision RFQs, and synthesize complex bulk pricing spreadsheets using Slack and Drive to ensure rapid lead times and optimal inventory turnover.



Apply using the form below:


/shr4Nb1owpYeM3UBf

Not for you? Please view all of our available jobs: 
/shrKtKWUH965U4R8U



Disclaimer: This is a general job description for the position stated above. The actual job description will be finalized during interview and onboarding.

Disclaimer 2: Newcomers shall value a long-lasting, committed career here; and cherish collaboration and achieving hyper-growth milestones while sustaining fundamentals.

title: Shopify Product Listing Specialist (AI & Ecommerce)
description:
We are growing fast and are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Shopify specialist who can create and manage high-quality product pages for an e-commerce brand.



This is a hands-on, execution-focused role. Strong experience with Shopify, AI tools for product listings, and e-commerce/dropshipping workflows is essential.



We work as one team with no unnecessary hierarchy. We value people who take ownership, follow instructions carefully, and consistently deliver clean, accurate work.



Work Schedule



Friday to Tuesday, 8:00 AM to 5:00 PM

Availability during these hours is required.



Core Responsibilities



Shopify & Product Listings (Primary Focus)



Creating and managing Shopify product pages

Building product pages for e-commerce/dropshipping brands from scratch

Uploading products and organizing collections

Resizing, optimizing, and managing product images

Adding variants and ensuring all product details are accurate

Writing clear, high-converting product descriptions using AI tools

Using AI to improve efficiency, speed, and quality of listings

Keeping listings clean, structured, and optimized

Requirements

Proven experience with Shopify

Experience working with e-commerce or dropshipping stores

Strong experience using AI tools for product listings and descriptions

Strong written English skills

High attention to detail

Ability to follow instructions exactly

Reliable, organized, and consistent

Compensation & Growth



$600 USD per month



This role is focused on Shopify product execution and AI-assisted workflows.

Additional responsibilities and growth opportunities may be offered over time based on performance and reliability.



We are looking for someone who can execute Shopify work accurately, efficiently, and at scale using modern AI tools.



If this sounds like a role you can perform confidently, we encourage you to apply carefully.

Small details matter to us.



(As a small note for attentive applicants: please include the word shopify in your subject line.)

nts)

-Nostalgic, raw, “real-life” aesthetic (not overproduced)

title: Part-Time Instagram VA — Canva Graphics, Scheduling & Stories (2–3 hrs/week)
description:
About the Role

I am the author of Choosing Rose, a children's book about the journey to motherhood. I run two Instagram accounts 
 
 — and I need a reliable VA to handle the creative and scheduling side so I can focus on my community.



I will handle all comments and DMs personally. Your job is purely execution — taking the captions and direction I provide and bringing them to life on Instagram every week.



This is a small but meaningful brand. I need someone detail-oriented, warm in their approach, and above all — consistent. Reliability matters more to me than a long resume.



What You'll Do Each Week

Create simple, on-brand graphics in Canva for approximately 5 posts per week across both accounts — captions and direction provided by me (approx. 1.5 hrs/week)

Schedule and post all content using a scheduling tool — I will provide access (approx. 30 min/week)

Apply the correct hashtags to each post from a list I provide

Send me a quick weekly summary of what was posted



What You Won't Need to Do

Write captions — I provide all copy

Respond to comments or DMs — I handle all engagement personally

Come up with content ideas — I provide a content calendar and full direction

Work weekends or odd hours — this is a flexible, low-pressure role



Tools & Access

???? Canva

You will be added as an editor to my Canva account. All brand colors, fonts, and templates will be set up for you. You will not need your own Canva account.



???? Instagram Scheduling

You will be given tea
mber access via a scheduling tool (Later, Buffer, or similar). You will never need my personal Instagram password — access is granted safely through the app.



What I'm Looking For

Confident with Canva — you can follow a style guide and create clean, attractive graphics

Experience scheduling Instagram posts using a scheduling tool

Strong attention to detail — captions, spelling, and posting times must be accurate

Reliable and communicative — a quick daily check-in message is all I need

Warm, genuine written English for Stories

Experience with lifestyle, parenting, or books content is a bonus but not required



How to Apply

Please send me:



A short introduction about yourself and your VA experience

2–3 examples of Canva graphics you have created (screenshots are fine)

Examples of Instagram accounts you have managed

Your availability and monthly rate

Your answer to this question: "What does good Instagram branding look like to you?"

I am looking to hire within the next 2 weeks and will reply to every complete application. Looking forward to finding the right person to grow this community with! ????

title: GHL Operations Coordinator — Ministry of Growth (INTERVIEW TOMORROW!)
description:
GHL Operations Coordinator — Ministry of Growth

$1,200/month (++BONUSES!!) | Full-time | Remote | HIRING THIS WEEK



???? Final CEO interview: Wednesday April 15, 1–3PM GMT+1. Apply now or miss the window.



ABOUT MINISTRY OF GROWTH

Ministry of Growth is an embedded growth partner for online creators. We go inside their businesses, build the revenue engine, and operate it alongside them. Revenue share — we only win when they win.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

Not just someone who can set up GHL. We need someone who maps the client journey before touching the platform, builds clean systems with clear logic, documents everything with SOP videos and walkthroughs, and keeps it all running without anyone having to ask. Ideally, you've done this inside a digital marketing agency or for online creators, coaches, or course businesses — you understand what's at stake when a funnel breaks.



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES

- Map the full client journey first — understand every touchpoint before building in GHL

- Build GHL sub-accounts from scratch — pipelines, custom fields, tags, calendars, forms, payment integrations

- Set up the complete automation flow: lead capture ? nurture ? booking ? reminders ? no-show recovery ? post-call ? won/lost

- Wire
 and SMS copy into sequences with correct triggers, delays, and conditions

- Build and deploy snapshots for consistent client setups

- Test everything end-to-end before launch

- Monitor daily — find problems before they find you

- Write SOPs and record Loom walkthroughs for every system

- Manage Notion workspaces and Slack channels per client



MUST-HAVES

- 3+ years personally building inside GHL

- Background in digital marketing — agencies, funnels, or creator businesses

- You plan and map before you build

- SOP writing and walkthrough recording is part of your process

- Notion and Slack for daily async comms

- EU business hours overlap

- Strong written English



BIG PLUS IF YOU HAVE

Experience inside a digital marketing agency or with online coaches, course creators, or info product businesses — you already understand funnels, paid traffic, and what it means when a lead leaks.



NOT A FIT IF

- You skip documentation and go straight to building

- You've never written an SOP or recorded a walkthrough

- Your monitoring is reactive, not proactive

- You've only worked in non-marketing industries



WHAT WE OFFER

- $1,200/month — above market for PH, paid consistently (++BONUSES!!)

- Long-term role with a fast-growing agency

- Clear SOPs — you'll always know what to do

- Path to Senior Operations as we scale to 10+ clients



HOW TO APPLY

Send to my
: 
 (remove spacing) with the Subject: Your Name - Years of Experience

1. Your updated resume — highlight GHL and digital marketing experience

2. Portfolio — screenshots or links to GHL systems you've built

3. Loom video (2–3 min) — show us a system you mapped before building, walk through how it works, and tell us how you documented it for the team



Final CEO interview: TOMORROW! Wednesday April 15 · 1–3PM GMT+1

? No Loom = no interview. No exceptions.

title: Full-Stack Developer – Continue & Upgrade Existing SaaS Project (Next.js + Prisma + Redis)
description:
We are looking for a reliable full-stack developer to take over and continue development of an SaaS platform for service businesses. 



This system is a modern, all-in-one business management tool designed to systemise and simplify the entire operations of service-based businesses — starting with lawn care and pressure washing. From basic scheduling to route optiization, to fleet management and more.

It replaces spreadsheets, whiteboards, and chaotic WhatsApp groups with one clean platform that gives owners full visibility and control over their business

Our system turns a chaotic service business into a smooth, predictable, and scalable operation — so owners can step back from daily firefighting and focus on growth.



We already have great feedback from potential users and want this project to get to Beta phase as soon as possible. 



There is a solid foundation built (Next.js backend, Prisma + PostgreSQL, Redis cache, basic auth structure.

We need someone who can start immediately, communicate clearly, and deliver consistent daily / weekly progress.



Key Responsibilities:

Audit and Take over the existing codebase and continue development either based on current timeline or adjusted to suit your own 

Complete and improve the authentication module (JWT + Passport)

Keep code clean and well-documented

Provide daily updates with clear progress and short demos



Requirements:



Strong experience with Next.js, Prisma, PostgreSQL, and Redis

Good knowledge of React for frontend

Experience with JWT authentication and role-based access

Ability to work independently and deliver on time

Excellent English communication (written and spoken)

Available for 15–20 hours per week



Nice to Have:



Experience with AI integrations 

Previous work on scheduling, field service, or trade management apps

Familiarity with Google Maps, Stripe, Xero, or Twilio etc for integrations



Rate & Hours:



$12 – $15 USD per hour 

Capped at 15–20 hours per week due to current budget

Weekly payments for completed and verified work



How to Apply:

Please reply with:



Your relevant experience (especially Next.js + Prisma projects)

Links to similar work or GitHub (if available)

Confirmation that you can start immediately and commit to 15–20 hours/week
