title: Go High Level Funnel & Automation Specialist
description:
GHL + ManyChat + A2P + SEO + Course/Community Buildout

We’re looking for a highly skilled Go High Level Funnel and Automation Specialist to help build and maintain the backend systems for a growing online education and coaching business serving parents of neurodivergent children.

This is not a generic VA role. We need someone who is strong in systems, automations, funnels, workflows, course setup, and implementation, and who can help us build a clean, scalable backend inside Go High Level. You’ll also help support ManyChat automations, A2P approval/setup, SEO implementation, and membership/community buildout, including support for our signature group program, The Braver Way.

You’ll be working closely with the founder to turn already-mapped strategy into an organized, functional, well-tested system. We already have a strong build plan, workflow logic, tracking structure, and offer architecture in place. We need someone who can execute well, think clearly, troubleshoot problems, and help us build this the right way.



Background

We are a growing coaching and education business in the neurodivergent family support space. Our work helps parents of neurodivergent children move from chaos and overwhelm into calmer, more connected homes through practical, evidence-based support.

We are building funnels, workflows, automations, course areas, community systems, and reporting infrastructure inside Go High Level, and we need someone who can help us implement those systems with care, accuracy, and strong attention to detail.

This role includes support for several funnels and offers, including:

* 1:1 coaching funnels

* coaching + course funnels

* webinar funnels

* 5-day challenge funnels

* calendar and booking workflows

* membership/course/resource delivery

* Braver Way group program setup

* community and replay/resource systems

* ManyChat automations

* A2P/SMS compliance setup

* SEO implementation across funnels/pages



Job Description

We are looking for someone who is experienced in Go High Level, confident with automation logic, comfortable with backend funnel builds, and able to help us organize, implement, test, and maintain systems that support sales, onboarding, delivery, and community.

This person should be able to take a structured implementation packet and build it accurately inside GHL. You should also be comfortable helping with ManyChat flows, A2P approval/setup, SEO implementation, course and community structure, and general backend optimization.

This is a role for someone who likes systems, enjoys figuring things out, and can keep a backend clean instead of chaotic.



Detailed Responsibilities

Your regular responsibilities will include:

1. Build and maintain Go High Level funnels, workflows, automations, products, forms, tags, triggers, calendars, and reporting systems.

2. Build and maintain backend systems for:

    * 1:1 coaching funnels

    * coaching + course funnels

    * webinar funnels

    * 5-day challenge funnels

    * application ? call ? checkout funnels

    * onboarding and delivery workflows

    * abandoned checkout, no-show, reschedule, and reengagement workflows

3. Implement and maintain the backend for our group coaching program, The Braver Way, including:

    * application flow

    * call-close path

    * checkout flow

    * VIP upsell logic

    * fast-action bonus logic

    * course area setup

    * replay library

    * separate resource hub

    * GHL community setup

    * AI access button/link placement in community

    * onboarding and access workflows

4. Build and maintain ManyChat automations for Instagram/Facebook/TikTok lead capture, comment/DM automation, keyword flows, nurture, and handoff points where needed.

5. Help with A2P 10DLC approval/setup and SMS compliance so our text-based workflows are built properly and can run safely.

6. Implement on-page and funnel SEO tasks, including page titles, meta descriptions, keyword placement, page structure, SEO fields, and related optimization tasks.

7. Set up and maintain tags, pipeline stages, trigger logic, stop rules, tracking, UTMs, and dashboards so lead flow and attribution stay organized and measurable.

8. Test everything thoroughly across desktop and mobile, including:

    * form submissions

    * booking flows

    * checkout flows

    * automation triggers

    *
 and text delivery

    * replay delivery

    * course access

    * community access

    * dashboard population

    * ManyChat flow logic

    * A2P/SMS flow readiness

9. Troubleshoot backend issues and help clean up systems as the business grows.

10. Communicate clearly about what is done, what is in progress, what is blocked, and what needs founder approval.



Required Technical Skills and Experience

To qualify for this position, you should already have strong experience in most of the following:

1. Go High Level

    * funnels

    * forms

    * workflows

    * automations

    * products/checkouts

    * calendars

    * tags/pipelines

    * course/membership setup

    * reporting/dashboard basics

2. Automation logic and systems thinking

    * trigger logic

    * workflow stop rules

    * segmentation

    * lead routing

    * backend cleanup

    * testing and QA

3. ManyChat

    * DM automation

    * keyword flows

    * comment-to-DM flows

    * lead capture

    * nurture and handoff sequences

4. A2P / SMS setup

    * experience with SMS compliance

    * experience with A2P approval or related messaging setup

5. SEO implementation

    * on-page SEO

    * funnel/page metadata

    * keyword placement

    * page structure

    * SEO field setup

6. Strong English communication skills

7. Ability to follow an implementation system and execute with precision



Desired Technical Skills and Experience

These are not required, but they would be a big plus:

* experience building course or membership areas

* experience building communities inside GHL

* experience supporting coaches, educators, or online programs

* experience with challenge/webinar funnel ecosystems

* experience with onboarding flows and client delivery systems

* basic design/layout sense for pages inside GHL

* experience with tracking, attribution, and dashboard/reporting organization

* experience with AI tool access or external tool integration workflows

* familiarity with neurodivergent family support, education, or coaching spaces



Soft Skills

It is very important that the person we hire is:

* highly detail-oriented

* organized and systematic

* able to think through logic clearly

* comfortable asking questions when something is unclear

* proactive without being messy

* dependable and consistent

* calm under pressure

* able to troubleshoot without spiraling

* able to follow instructions closely

* able to keep a backend clean and well-labeled

This role is not a good fit for someone who rushes through builds, skips testing, or creates messy automations that break later.



Basic Skills

You should also be comfortable using tools like:

* Gmail and Google Drive

* Google Docs and Google Sheets

* Canva & Vimeo

* Loom or screen recording tools

* time tracking tools if required

* spreadsheets for implementation, tracking, or QA notes



Examples of the Type of Work You’d Be Helping Build

You would be helping implement things like:

* booked-call, reminder, no-show, reengagement, reschedule, cancel, abandoned checkout, and purchase workflows

* recording/replay systems with expiration rules and redirect logic for webinar/challenge content

* detailed attribution systems using UTMs, source tags, and reporting dashboards

* a GHL-based course + community ecosystem for The Braver Way, including application-first sales flow, course access, replay library, resource hub, fast-action bonuses, partner pass support, and AI access inside community



Work Schedule and Availability

This role is:

* full-time or gig 

Preferred:

* Some overlap with U.S. business hours for communication and troubleshooting

* Flexible enough to work independently between check-ins

* Able to meet deadlines and communicate blockers early

Please include your typical working hours and time zone when you apply.



Salary

$8.00 per hour and we can discuss the timeline during interview

This starts project-based with opportunity to grow



Training Provided

We already have a strong implementation system, workflow logic, and structure mapped out. You will not be expected to invent the entire backend from scratch.

You will be given:

* implementation guidance

* structured workflow/system expectations

* funnel-specific build outlines

* naming conventions

* tracking requirements

* course/community direction

* offer-specific instructions for Braver Way and other funnels

That said, you should still already be experienced enough to execute inside GHL without needing beginner-level training.



Career Potential

This role has room to grow.

For the right person, this can become a long-term backend systems role with increasing responsibility across:

* funnels

* automations

* course/program systems

* reporting

* community infrastructure

* launch implementation

* backend operations

We are looking for someone who can grow with the business, not someone who only wants one-off random tasks.



How to Apply

To apply, please do all of the following:

1. Put this exact phrase in your subject line:?Behavior Builder

2. In your application, include:

* your experience with Go High Level

* your experience with ManyChat

* your experience with A2P or SMS compliance/setup

* your experience with SEO implementation

* whether you have built courses/memberships/communities in GHL

* whether you have built application ? call ? checkout funnels

* whether you have experience with tracking/UTMs/dashboards

3. Please also answer these questions:

* What is the most complex GHL workflow system you have built?

* Have you built ManyChat automations tied to funnels or lead nurture before?

* Have you helped with A2P setup/approval before?

* What kinds of SEO tasks have you implemented directly?

* Have you ever built or maintained a course area or community inside GHL?

* How do you keep automations from overlapping or breaking?

* What do you do before saying a build is complete?

4. Please include:

* your resume

* links or screenshots of relevant work if allowed

5. In the last line of your application, write:?Clean systems win

That helps us know you read the full post.



Final Note

We are not looking for the cheapest applicant. Pay is negotiable. We are looking for someone who is:

* smart

* reliable

* detail-oriented

* experienced

* honest

* strong in backend implementation

If you love building clean systems, making automations work properly, and helping a meaningful business grow, we’d love to hear from you.

Segment customers to maximise revenue

Ability to design clean, high-converting
s

Data-driven mindset

If you are a Klaviyo killer, we want to talk.

title: Full-time Entry Virtual Associate (VA) Positions. Philippines time zone. 260414
description:
This is an entry-level role, where the majority of knowledge and skills will be acquired through on-the-job training, paving the way for advancement to senior positions.



Are you seeking a full-time, long-term career that offers exceptional growth potential through advancement opportunities, along with a stable income and bonus incentives? Join our team if you have a keen eye for detail, an unwavering drive for productivity, and a strong sense of responsibility. If you possess self-motivation, assertiveness, and a strong work ethic, coupled with a positive outlook and the ability to excel in a fast-paced work environment, we invite you to reach out to us.



You will receive training and support for your work. Candidates without experience but willing to learn and grow are welcome.

This is for candidates who are keen to develop a professional career that allows you to work remotely and independently. There are career paths with promising future opportunities that have traditionally been accessible only through conventional means. However, our embrace of technology, good jobs are no longer restricted to traditional ways.



About Us

The business has collaborated with a highly acclaimed loan brokerage and independent financial advisory firm, along with several other partners, all of which are fully licensed by government authorities. We offer a diversified suite of financial services and solutions with a personalized approach.



With these partners, we have one of the largest, most-respected, and fastest-growing networks of advisers in the country. We provide sound and comprehensive financial advice at both individual and corporate levels.



Requirement

• Strong verbal and written English skills with a neutral accent.

• Knowledge of Chinese/Mandarin, whether verbal or written, is a significant advantage.

• Exceptional talent for natural conversation.

• Proficient in Microsoft Office applications.

• Owns a competent Windows computer/laptop and android mobile phone for work

• A dependable and consistent internet connection

• Consistent and reliable power supply without frequent outages.

• A distraction-free and quiet workspace.

• Utilizing a headset equipped with Noise Cancellation technology.

• Takes initiative and works independently to address challenges, consistently seeking solutions.



Other Matters

We will be communicating via various communication tools. There will be a probation period for one to three months, depending on your qualifications and experience, which is negotiable. Upon the completion of your probation period, you will become eligible for a 13th-month bonus, paid time off, and a range of employee benefits, including PhilHealth and the Social Security System. The annual performance bonus is determined by your key performance indicators (KPIs). You will follow the time zone of the Philippines. Among colleagues, your working hours may be arranged in rotation, including weekdays and weekends. A total work week of 40 hours. Your further potential salary growth will be based on your performance, which may be increased during the quarterly review.



Loan Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Engage with incoming leads primarily through WhatsApp on our business phone.

• Create comprehensive reports that incorporate inputs and details provided by clients.

• Create concise summaries and propose options for clients, utilizing templates for efficiency.

• Collaborate with the designated bankers to facilitate the processing of loan applications

• Schedule meetings with clients and bankers.

• Reach out to current clients as they approach the end of their loan lock-in period.

• Oversee client relationships and enhance processes through multiple CRM platforms.



Insurance and Investment Support

You will learn on the job to handle the primary job scope that includes:

• Prepare the required documentation for the client's application, available in various systems.

• Reach out to clients through WhatsApp using our business phone, primarily to provide reminders and follow-ups.

• Utilize WhatsApp (business phone) as the main channel to engage clients and schedule appointments effectively.

• Craft client proposals utilizing the provided templates.

• Helping clients with insurance claims

• Contact insurers to obtain quotes and provide recommendations to clients.

• Oversee client relationships and streamline processes through a range of CRM systems.



Candidates who have shown capability and knowledge may be groomed towards senior roles or management roles.



Application

To apply for the job:

Please log in and click the link below to apply, and please follow the instructions.



There will be an assessment and a Microsoft Teams interview video call required, if you are shortlisted.

title: Pre-Press Graphic Artist
description:
Job description:



Job description



We are seeking a full-time in-house graphics / production art professional at a leading North American promotional products distributor. This individual should possess a great sense of design along with excellent prepress, type and color skills. Proficiency with Adobe Suite (Illustrator/Illustrator/InDesign) is a MUST working in PC environment. The ideal candidate should be comfortable juggling multiple projects and prioritizing work in a fast paced environment and is able to QC their work.



Requirements



3 years (minimum) of Graphic Design/Production Art experience.

College degree - Associates Degree or above preferred.

High-Level Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator, Photoshop and InDesign.

BONUS: Working knowledge of pre-press / production ready artwork as well as various printing processes including digital, silk-screen and offset printing.

Other Skills And Strengths



Strong portfolio supporting a proven knowledge of graphic design and production art for print or web.

Solid track record of accurately estimating and meeting deadlines through excellent time management.

Strong attention to detail, an inherent eye for design, and the ability to multi-task and quality check work.

Solid people skills, ability to work collaboratively or independently in a fast-paced team environment.

Copy proofing and editing.

Ability to communicate well and time management.

Primary Duties And Split Responsibilities



Using Adobe design software (specifically Illustrator) to product proofs/mockups, pre-press file setup and other graphic artworks needed for marketing collaterals

Ensuring the consistency and quality of design work with attention to detail

Ability to work methodically and meet productivity goal daily independently, collaborate with team/manager to execute projects effectively with superior time management skills

Job Types: Full-time, Permanent



Salary: USD 3-4/hr



Benefits:



Opportunities for promotion

Work from home

Schedule:



8 hour shift

Monday to Friday

Night shift

Job Type: Full-time



Application Question(s):





Kindly attach link of your portfolio.

Have you worked in a fast-paced environment with a high-volume queue/workflow, where you had to pick up a task, complete it, send it out, and immediately move on to the next one?

Have you worked in a role creating layout designs, resizing or formatting art files, preparing logos for digital and silkscreen printing

Experience:





Adobe Illustrator: 1 year (Required)

Work Location: Remote

title: If You Only Edit Short-Form… Don’t Apply (Long-Form Editor Needed)
description:
Most video editors can’t do this.



And that’s not an insult…



It’s just reality.





If your entire skillset is:



- Adding captions

- Zoom cuts every 2 seconds

- Throwing random B-roll on top of talking heads

- Matching words to text like karaoke



This is NOT for you.



Seriously… don’t apply.





Because what we’re building requires a completely different brain.





What we actually need (read this twice):



In short someone who can edit like this:


/watch?v=zIN5dGq5Wjs


/watch?v=D3lhrrXb4WI&t=92s



We’re looking for a long-form video editor who can:



Zoom OUT before they zoom in



Understand the point of a video before touching the timeline



Edit with intention… not decoration



Tie every cut, visual, and pacing decision back to a bigger narrative



This is NOT about making things “more engaging” with noise.



This is about making things more compelling with structure.





Here’s the problem we keep running into…



Editors who come from short-form think:



“More visuals = better edit”



So what happens?



- Every sentence gets a caption

- Every 3 seconds gets a cut

- Every idea gets drowned in unnecessary B-roll



And the final product?



Feels busy… but empty.



Looks edited… but not thought through.



We don’t want that.





What great looks like to us:



You watch a 20-minute video…



And you’re not thinking about transitions or effects…



You’re locked into the story.



Everything feels intentional.



Every cut earns its place.



The pacing breathes.



And when it ends…



You remember the message.





This role is for you if:



You’ve edited long-form content (10+ minutes) like:



- YouTube videos

- Podcast videos



And more importantly…



You think in:



- Narrative arcs

- Retention flow

- Emotional pacing

- Information hierarchy



Not just:



- Effects

- Presets

- Templates





Damaging truth:



This kind of editing is slower.



It takes more thinking.



More rewatching.



More restraint.



BUT…



The end result is 10x more powerful…



And that’s what we care about.





What you’ll be responsible for:



Taking raw long-form footage and shaping it into a cohesive, compelling story



Making editing decisions based on the goal of the video… not habits



Enhancing clarity, flow, and retention without over-editing



Knowing when to add… and when to leave things alone





What we don’t care about:



- Fancy transitions

- Overused editing tricks

- How fast you can pump out clips





What we DO care about:



- Taste



- Judgment



- Restraint



- Storytelling ability



PS. You should be able to handle basic color grading inside DaVinci Resolve, Premiere Pro, or Final Cut.



Nothing crazy…



But enough to make footage feel clean, consistent, and intentional.





How to apply (this is important):



Do NOT send us short-form edits.



We will ignore them.



Instead, send:



2–3 long-form projects (10+ minutes) you’ve edited



And tell us:



- What was the goal of the video?

- What editing decisions did you make to support that goal?

- What did you intentionally choose NOT to do… and why?





If you read this and thought:



“Finally… someone gets it.”



We want to see your work.





If you read this and thought:



“This seems like overthinking editing…”



This is not for you.





If this feels obvious to you…



You’re probably who we’re looking for.



Send your portfolio.

If this feels obvious to you…

Send your portfolio.

title: Construction Estimator
description:
We’re expanding our team and seeking remote in-house estimators/quality control specialists for a U.S.-based takeoff and estimating firm. Please review the position details below and answer the screening questions to be considered. Thank you!



Immediate hire — Position: Structural Estimator (wood/lumber packages, plumbing, electrical)



Role overview: Perform material takeoffs and assist with quality control tasks.



Requirements and details



Full-time position preferred; overtime available based on performance and quality of work. Stable, consistent work for reliable candidates.

Some training provided, but prior estimating/takeoff experience required.

Minimum 5 years’ relevant experience.

Degree in engineering or architecture, or equivalent estimating experience.

Fluent in English.

Planswift software is required — no exceptions.

Strong math skills.

Ability to work independently in a fast-paced environment.

Proficient with Microsoft Excel.

U.S. takeoff experience is a plus but not mandatory.

Must be a collaborative tea
mber.

Work hours aligned with Eastern Standard Time daytime schedule.

Occasional weekend work may be required depending on workload.

Highly responsive and reliable during scheduled shifts.

Compensation: A base starting pay rate is offered per this posting. Demonstrated skill and performance may lead to raises, bonuses, and advancement into management roles.



To be considered, please answer the following:



Have you read the job description and can you meet most of the requirements?

Do you have experience with lumber framing and drywall? This is a high-demand area for us—please give details.

Why are you the right candidate for this role?

How many years of takeoff and estimating experience do you have? Any U.S. experience?

Please respond with your answers and any relevant resume or portfolio items.

 and Instagram

Reaching out to potential clients via
 and social media and following up

Using tools like Mailchimp and Calendly

Organizing and summarizing meeting notes

Organized, responsive, and able to manage tasks independently

Comfortable with outreach and follow-ups

Experience with
 & Instagram

Strong content creation skills (required)

Canva and Capcut experience is required

Familiarity with Mailchimp and Calendly is a plus



Work Details:

Remote position

To Apply Please include:

Captions/subtitles

You can choose any salon concept (hair, medspa, lashes, etc.) and use stock footage or previous content.

title: Short Term Project:  Docusign Setup
description: Need a resource that has created electronic signature templates before in tools like Docusign, Esign, or SignNow.  We need someone that can setup 100 templates in eSignature format creating text, numeric, and signature boxes as needed.  Project needs to be completed in 2 days.  Will pay $6 USD per hour for the perfect candidate.

title: Go High Level Expert
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a dedicated and experienced Go High Level expert to lead our platform migration and ongoing digital marketing execution. This is a hands-on build role. You will be setting up our funnels, membership area,
 automations, course delivery, and sales pages inside GHL. You will also manage the ongoing marketing systems once they are live.

This role suits someone who has built membership communities and course delivery systems inside GHL before and can show proof of that work.

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Platform Migration: Migrate our existing community, course content (21 modules across 3 stages), and support materials from Kajabi to Go High Level. Ensure nothing breaks in the transition and all member access is preserved.

Membership and Course Setup: Build the membership area inside GHL with drip content scheduling (weekly module release over 21 weeks). Set up the Survival Blueprint Quiz as a standalone element within the membership. Configure community features for member interaction.

Funnel Building: Design and build a custom opt-in page, sales page (with embedded VSL video), checkout page, and order confirmation page. All pages must be mobile-optimised as 80%+ of our traffic comes from Instagram on mobile devices.

Payment Integration: Ensure checkout is seamless and sits on the sales page without redirecting to a separate page if possible.

 Marketing and Automation: Build automated
 workflows triggered by membership milestones (signup, stage completions, module unlocks, post-completion check-in). Design and deploy
 campaigns. Segment
 lists for targeted promotions. Analyse
 performance and optimise for conversions.

ManyChat style Integration: Connect existing ManyChat keyword automations (we have 6+ active triggers driving Instagram DM sequences) with GHL workflows so leads flow from Instagram into the correct funnels and
 sequences.

Design and Content: Create and update visual assets in Canva as needed. Ensure brand consistency across all pages,
s, and member-facing materials. Work from existing brand guidelines, copy documents, and approved content.

Analytics and Reporting: Set up conversion tracking across funnels and
 sequences. Provide fortnightly performance reports covering opt-in rates, sales page conversion,
 open/click rates, and membership retention. Make data-driven recommendations for improvement.

QUALIFICATIONS

Must have proven, demonstrable experience building membership communities and course delivery systems inside Go High Level (portfolio required, not optional).

Must have experience with drip content scheduling, workflow automations, and funnel building in GHL.

Experience with ManyChat and the Go high level type of DM automation.

Strong design skills in Canva and GHL's page builder.

Understanding of digital marketing principles, particularly for Instagram-driven traffic.

Ability to build mobile-first. Everything you create must work flawlessly on a phone screen.

Detail-oriented, organised, and able to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously.

Strong communication skills. You will need to explain what you are doing and why in plain language, not jargon.

Reliable internet connection and a productive remote working environment.

Experience migrating from Kajabi is a bonus but not essential. What matters is that you know GHL inside out.

HOURS, BUDGET, AND TIMELINE

While this will be and hourly, project-based role we would love to work with the right person on an ongoing monthly wage. 

Please add your hourly rate in your application.

HOW WE WORK

We communicate via WhatsApp and share work through Google Docs. The expectation is that you respond to work requests within 24 hours and provide realistic timelines. We value clear communication and honesty. If something will take longer than expected, tell us early.

HOW TO APPLY

Send your resume and portfolio showing at least two GHL membership or course builds you have completed. 

Applications without portfolios and testimonials will not be considered.

title: Executive Support Role — We Back Potential Over Pedigree
description:
You haven’t had the title yet. But you’ve been doing the work.

You manage more than your role says you should. You think ahead. You follow through without being chased. Your clients or employer rely on you more than they probably admit.

You’re ready for a role that actually matches who you are.



THE ROLE

Market Leaders supports high-performing business owners across Financial Advisory, Real Estate, Coaching, and Education. We’re placing a Personal Assistant to be placed with one of our clients — someone ready to grow into full ownership of the role from day one.

You don’t need five years of corporate EA experience. You need the right character and the drive to own the role.



WHAT YOU BRING

•	At least 1 year of VA, admin, or support experience

•	Strong English — written and spoken

•	Organized, proactive, and high attention to detail

•	Philippines-based with SGT availability (GMT+8)

•	Comfortable with Google tools, CRM, and social media

•	Willingness to learn GHL, Asana, and AI productivity tools



WHAT YOU GET

•	A team that backs your growth, not just your output

•	Real responsibility from day one

•	SGD $700/month (probation) ? SGD $800–900/month post-probation

•	Annual increases based on performance



A NOTE ON CULTURE

We have a strict no brilliant jerks policy. Skills matter deeply here — so does how you show up for the people around you.

You’re our kind of person if you deliver excellent work without creating friction, take ownership without needing applause, and genuinely celebrate when a teammate wins.

High Performance. Zero Drama. Peaceful & Profitable — we mean all three.



We know you’re ready. Here’s the shot.



APPLY HERE:

title: English-Speaking Front-End Web Developer
description:
We are seeking a highly competent and reliable Front-End Web Developer to join our team, focusing primarily on web implementation and maintenance. We require a self-starter who can execute tasks efficiently with minimal micromanagement. This role is crucial for maintaining and enhancing the performance of our various web properties, including the upcoming Spring Bolt X site.



**Responsibilities:**



  * Execute all front-end website edits and updates quickly and accurately.

  * Implement crucial technical elements, such as SEO changes and page edits, immediately upon receiving direction.

  * Translate design mock-ups and directions into high-quality, functional web code across various platforms (e.g., WordPress, Divi, Webflow).

  * Manage tasks autonomously and maintain high efficiency without requiring constant follow-up or lengthy explanation sessions.

  * Contribute to the building and maintenance of new high-quality websites, ensuring a superior user experience.



**Required Skills and Experience:**



  * Fluency in written and verbal English is mandatory for clear communication.

  * Proven experience in front-end web development and web edits.

  * Demonstrated ability to produce reliable work on time.

  * Strong organizational skills and capacity to follow detailed instructions with precision.



**Compensation:**



We are looking for talent that delivers exceptional value and efficiency. The compensation will be commensurate with experience and reliability, with a target rate in the range of **$5-10 per hour** for high-performing candidates, similar to our past successful developers.

title: React Native Developer — Premium Faith App — 5-Week Build — iOS + Android + Firebase
description:
???? WHO WE ARE

We are building JESUS IS GOD — a bold, unapologetic, supernatural faith movement platform. With one Instagram reel already at 2.4 million views, we are creating a premium mobile app that proclaims “JESUS IS GOD” with fire and excellence.



This is not another generic church app. It is a cinematic, luxury experience built to the standard of a deep matte black ceramic mug with rich metallic gold lettering. Every screen must feel premium, commanding, and anointed.



The complete master reference document (v4.0) is finished: full design system, color palette, typography, metallic gold treatments, flame particles, sword-glint animations, 19 Firestore collections, sprint roadmap, real launch content, and exact screen specifications. You will receive the full detailed specification document, real content, design assets, and a structured 5-week sprint plan with clear Friday milestones. Your role is to translate the spec into clean, production-ready code — fast, polished, and faithful to every non-negotiable detail.

.

.

.

???? START DATE: Within Five (5) Days



???? Short or Long Term: You can leave after the 5 weeks or we can keep you on for the following releases, if we are satisfied with your work

.

.

.

???? REQUIRED SKILLS (Non-Negotiable)



You must have all of these:



•  3+ years hands-on React Native + Expo in production apps

, Cloud Messaging for push notifications, Security Rules, Storage)

•  Ability to follow detailed specifications exactly while flagging concerns early

.

.

.

???? STRONGLY PREFERRED (BIG ADVANTAGE):



•  Experience with vertical video feeds (TikTok/Reels-style infinite scroll)



•  Lottie animations for premium effects (flame particles, metallic glint)



•  RevenueCat for subscriptions + paywalls



•  Basic experience integrating 
 or PayPal



•  Previous work on community, social, or faith-based apps

.

.

.

???? WHAT YOU WILL BUILD (LAUNCH SCOPE — 5 WEEKS)



Using the locked v4.0 master document:

.

.

.

???? WEEK 1 FOUNDATION

.

 + child profiles)

 deep link + PayPal)

•  Performance optimization

Week 5 Launch

Critical: Basic Admin screen must be ready by end of Week 2 so content can be posted from Day 1.

.

.

.

???? HOW WE WORK

.

.

title: Hotel & Hospitality Wholesale Outreach Specialist
description:
Overview

We are seeking a hands-on, execution-focused Wholesale Outreach Specialist to build a predictable pipeline of opportunities within the luxury hotel and hospitality sector. Our brand is a premium craft cookie company built for 
nts of celebration and indulgence.



In this role, you will own the top-of-funnel sales process: sourcing the right contacts, running multi-touch outreach campaigns, and teeing up warm conversations for the founder to close.

Work Structure & Compensation

Hours: Part-time (20 hours per week)

Timezone: Must be available to work within Central Time (CST)

Exclusivity: Candidates MUST NOT have a concurrent full-time job to ensure dedicated focus on our pipeline growth.



Key Responsibilities



1. Lead Sourcing & List Building

Identify and build targeted lead lists across boutique hotels, luxury concierge teams, and hotel management groups

Research and validate contact details for key decision-makers, specifically Food & Beverage Directors and Guest Experience Managers

Maintain clean, structured lead lists segmented by region, channel, and job title[cite: 884].



2. Outreach & Pipeline Management

Execute personalized, multi-touch
 campaigns using a warm, premium, and concise tone

Manage daily replies: qualify interest, answer basic questions, and move the conversation forward

Track all activity and pipeline status in a CRM (HubSpot/Apollo) or structured Google Sheet

Prepare "handoff briefs" for the founder, providing context on warm leads ready for closing calls



3. Reporting & Optimization

Provide weekly reporting with visual KPI tracking, including leads added, reply rates, and positive response rates

Identify what is working or failing and propose workflow changes to improve results[cite: 902].



Required Skills & Experience

Mandatory Hotel Experience: Direct professional experience within the hotel industry is required.

Sales Background: Proven track record in hotel sales, specifically candidates who have transitioned from Inside Sales to Outside Sales and understand the drivers that close hotel deals.

Decision-Maker Knowledge: Deep familiarity with hotel organizational structures and how to effectively navigate them to reach decision-makers.

Technical Proficiency: Comfortable building lead lists and running outbound campaigns end-to-end using tools like Apollo or HubSpot



Attributes: Extremely organized with follow-ups and pipeline tracking, high ownership, and fast execution speed.



Advantageous

Experience selling premium food, gifting, or amenities specifically into luxury hotels.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a **Loom video** (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.

title: Influencer & Creator Partnerships Manager (with US Market experience)
description:
We are seeking an enthusiastic, highly organized, and strategically-minded Influencer & Creator Partnerships Manager to lead our outreach and seeding efforts. This is a part-time, remote role (20 hours/week) designed for a specialist who doesn’t just execute tasks but brings high-level judgment to creator selection and content strategy.



We prioritize candidates who move beyond simple execution. You should have a deep "content sense"—the ability to understand what feels native to a platform, what resonates with an audience, and how creator activity drives genuine brand growth.



Work Structure & Requirements

Type: Part-time (20 hours/week).



Location: Remote.



Timezone: Must be available to work within New Zealand Standard Time (NZST) hours.



Exclusivity: Candidates must not have a concurrent full-time job to ensure dedicated focus.



Market Priority: Deep familiarity with the US or UK markets is essential. You must understand the specific consumer behaviors, platform trends, and cultural nuances of these regions.



Key Responsibilities

Strategic Research & Content Evaluation



Identify creators who align with a purpose-driven mission and high-end storytelling style.



Move beyond "database searching" to conduct deep evaluations of content quality, storytelling strength, and commercial potential.



Outreach & Partnership Execution



Execute highly personalized outreach to creators and talent managers.



Draft creative briefs that ensure content feels platform-native while staying aligned with the brand’s belief system.



Growth & Community Monitoring



Coordinate seeding logistics and monitor platforms for mentions and high-performing tags.



Use content intuition to identify new "waves" of partnership opportunities that drive both engagement and conversion.



Required Skills & Experience

Purpose-Driven Experience: Proven track record working with brands built around a clear mission or belief system (especially in Wellness, Personal Care, or Beauty).



Platform Mastery: Deep, hands-on expertise in at least one core platform (TikTok or Instagram). You should know how to produce or guide content that feels native and high-performing.



High-Level Judgment: While tools/AI can track data, we value your intuition. You must be able to judge what content will actually drive outcomes.



Market Expertise: Strong understanding of platform behaviors and consumer expectations specifically in the US or UK.



System Mindset: 5+ years of experience bringing structure to creator workflows and improving efficiency over time.



Commercial Awareness: A clear understanding of how creator storytelling connects to brand performance and conversion.



To Apply

Please submit your resume along with a Loom video (2–3 minutes) introducing yourself.



Crucial: Please also include examples of past work (e.g., a content portfolio, specific campaign results, or platform-specific case studies) that demonstrate your ability to drive outcomes through content.

title: B2B Sales & Business Development Specialist
description:
About Us

We are a Hong Kong-based technology company specializing in cutting-edge AI engine solutions and AI-powered consumer services. Our clients span across international markets, and we are building a high-performance remote team to accelerate global business growth.

, LinkedIn, and video calls to international B2B clients

 You MUST include your university and degree in your application.

 / LinkedIn outreach / calling)

Please Do NOT Apply If:

How to Apply — IMPORTANT: Read carefully. Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.

] with the subject line exactly as written:

)

 (free) where you:

title: Sales Representative
description:
Join a fast-growing US online home goods retailer and enjoy the learning and opportunities that you have while working with us.



We strive to provide 5-star service & shopping assistance to all of our clients, and all of our team is accountable to fulfill this.



We are looking for a Sales Representative who can assist prospective buyers and close online ecommerce sales.



We're only looking for full-time, long-term, ongoing cooperation.



Work schedules available:

8 AM to 4 PM US EST

4 PM to 12 AM US EST



Your work week will be 5 days per week, with 2 days off per week. Days off will be selected with your manager. We will try to accommodate your preferences for which days you like, based on availability.



This role starts ASAP!!



Job Duties and Responsibilities:

Receive incoming phone calls and live chats from potential customers (prospects) who indicated that they need shopping assistance. This does not include calls and chats from existing customers that need help with their orders (that’s a job for a different department)

Makes follow-up calls, writes follow-up
s, and sends text messages to potential buyers. We try to follow up 5x with each person that contacted us (unless they indicate that they are no longer interested). We don’t do cold calling. Only reaching out to prospects who interacted with our online store and left their contact information.

After each interaction with a prospect/customer, writes notes & comments in our CRM (Asana)

Communicate efficiently and build rapport with potential customers

Assists prospects in their shopping journey and helps make the purchase decision

Ensures that all prospects’ questions and objections are addressed

Leads every interaction to a close sale, which means an order is placed on our online store

Prepares custom quotes, price matches competitors if necessary, and offers custom discounts. This requires calculating margins & ensuring profitability.

Answering questions about the products we offer, including technical questions. Learns the specifications, features and benefits of our bestsellers. Over time, becomes an expert in the industry.

If not able to answer product-specific questions, conducts research in the materials provided by the supplier, or reaches out to the supplier to get the information

Confirms stock availability and lead times when offering products to prospects

Documents standard procedures and best practices in a written form, so that other tea
mbers can learn from them



Requirements:

At least 2 years of experience in sales on the phone

Experience must include both inbound and outbound sales

Excellent written and verbal English communication skills

Experience in Customer Service on the phone is a nice to have

Experience in the e-commerce (online shopping) industry is nice to have

Home improvement, construction, and gas plumbing industry experience is a plus

Outgoing, friendly, and lively

Can-do mindset, with a sense of ownership, pride in your performance, and its impact on the company’s success

Long-term commitment - treat this as your career



What we can offer:

Sales commission: 8% of gross profit from all orders closed. Gross profit means the sale amount minus the product and shipping costs. Paid monthly. No upper limit. Monthly commission payouts range between $1,200 (the guaranteed minimum) and as high as $3,000 (for the top performer). The average monthly payout is $1,465 (average from the last 2 years).

$1,200/month minimum guaranteed pay

15 days paid days off per year (also convertible to min. guaranteed commission)

Paid training on all aspects of the role

Opportunities for professional development

Friendly atmosphere

Online Interview process

Fully remote position

title: General Manager / Business Manager
description:
Do you know a specific business inside and out? Let’s build a new company together.



I’m a US-based entrepreneur investing in new ventures. My team handles all technology, marketing, and operational execution. What we need is someone who understands the inner mechanics of a specific business model at a deep, operational level: suppliers, logistics, fulfillment flows, margins, customer expectations, and all the real-world details that make the operation succeed.



I’m looking for someone with intimate, firsthand knowledge of a particular business or industry. You’ll map out exactly how that business works, point us to the right suppliers, and then run the business full time once we launch.



This is not a VA role. This is a leadership role for someone who knows a business from the inside.



What You’ll Do

 - Explain exactly how the business you know operates from end to end

- Identify the correct suppliers, vendors, and fulfillment partners

- Break down the logistics, workflows, margins, and common bottlenecks

- Build the operational blueprint: SOPs, pricing logic, vendor flow, service delivery steps

- Validate and refine the business model before capital is deployed

- Step in as the full-time operator, general manager, or business lead once we launch

- Guide the business while my team executes tech, marketing, and day-to-day operations



What I’m Looking For

- Intimate, real-world experience inside a specific business or industry

- Detailed understanding of suppliers, logistics, fulfillment, pricing, and operations

- Ability to articulate a business clearly enough for us to build and scale it



Compensation & Growth

- Very competitive salary

- Performance bonuses up to $10,000/year

- Full-time role after we begin building the business

- You become the core operator of the business you help design



How to Apply



In your application, include:



- The exact business model you know extremely well

- The website of the business you believe we should replicate or build (required)

- The suppliers, logistics, and workflows you have firsthand experience with

- One specific operational challenge you solved and how you solved it

- Your desired monthly salary (USD)



Only apply if you can provide industry-level insight into a real business. We need someone with hands-on knowledge who can guide us to the right suppliers, define the operational foundation, and then run the company.

title: Citation Builder & SEO Reporting Specialist
description:
Company: Apex Growth

Location: Remote

Type: Part-Time (20–30 hours per week, with growth potential)



About Us



Apex Growth is a fast-growing digital marketing agency specializing in Google Maps (Google Business Profile), Apple Maps, and local SEO for smoke shops, liquor stores, and local businesses across the United States.



Our focus is simple:

 • Improve local rankings

 • Increase visibility

 • Drive more customers to our clients



We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented tea
mber to support citation building and SEO reporting across all accounts.





Role Overview



This is a precision-focused execution role.



Your responsibility is to:

Ensure client business information is accurate across the web and track SEO performance consistently.



You will be working across multiple accounts using structured systems. Accuracy and consistency are critical.





Core Responsibilities



1. Citation Building (Primary Responsibility)

 • Submit business listings to directories

 • Fix NAP (Name, Address, Phone) inconsistencies

 • Ensure all listings match the client’s Google Business Profile exactly

 • Use tools like Search Atlas to identify issues

 • Improve citation scores over time



This work requires strong attention to detail. Small mistakes matter.





2. SEO Reporting

 • Create one report per client each month

 • If managing ~150 clients, this will be approximately 38 reports per week

 • All reporting will be done using Search Atlas (this is the only tool you will use for reports)



Each report should include:

 • Heatmap ranking performance

 • Keyword visibility

 • Progress or changes over time



Reports should be clear, simple, and accurate.





3. Performance Monitoring

 • Identify clients that are not improving or are losing rankings

 • Flag issues immediately



If a client’s rankings worsen:

 • Notify the SEO team in Slack (#seo channel)

 • Clearly explain what changed

 • Work with the team to help resolve the issue and get performance trending upward again





4. Data Accuracy and Quality Control

 • Ensure all information submitted is correct and consistent

 • Double-check all listings and reports

 • Maintain clean, organized data across all clients





Requirements

 • Strong attention to detail

 • Ability to follow instructions exactly

 • Reliable and consistent work habits

 • Comfortable with repetitive tasks

 • Clear written English





Nice to Have

 • Experience with Google Business Profile

 • Experience with local SEO

 • Familiarity with citation building or SEO tools





Compensation

 • Starting at $5/hour

 • Opportunity to increase to $6–$7/hour based on performance

 • Opportunity to grow into a larger role over time





How to Apply



Please include:

 1. A short introduction

 2. Any relevant experience

 3. Your weekly availability

 4. Answer this question:



What is NAP consistency and why is it important for local SEO?





Important



This role requires precision and consistency.



If you do your job well:

 • Clients will perform better

 • The team will rely on your work

 • You will grow quickly within the company

title: Estimator / CAD Draftsperson – Signage & Fabrication (Remote)
description:
Full-time | Day Shift (7:30am–4:30pm PH Time, with 1-hour unpaid lunch) | Long-term Role with Excellent Remuneration



About the Role



We’re looking for a skilled, reliable, and detail-oriented Estimator to join an established Australian manufacturing and signage business in a long-term remote role.



This is an excellent opportunity for someone with estimating, drafting, or fabrication-related experience who wants stable full-time work, strong pay, and the chance to grow with a respected company.



In this role, you’ll prepare detailed cost estimates, drawings, and written instructions for custom fabrication and signage projects. You’ll review drawings and specifications, calculate materials and labour, help clarify job requirements, and support clear production documentation so projects run smoothly from quoting through to manufacture.



This role will suit someone who enjoys technical work, likes solving problems, and takes pride in producing accurate, well-organised work.



Why This Role Is a Great Opportunity



This is a rare opportunity to secure a long-term position with an established Australian business that values quality, reliability, and professionalism.



You won’t be treated like a disposable freelancer. You’ll be brought on as a valued tea
mber whose work matters and whose contribution is recognised.



The company offers excellent remuneration, consistent hours, and the opportunity to build your skills in a technical and respected industry.



You’ll receive support and guidance as you get started, with the opportunity to become more independent over time as your confidence and knowledge grow.



If you are looking for job security, professional growth, and a supportive remote working environment, this is a role worth applying for.



Key Responsibilities



- Review drawings, sketches, and specifications to identify material and labour requirements

- Prepare accurate cost estimates using spreadsheets and internal systems

- Create CAD models, detailed drawings, and written fabrication instructions

- Liaise with customers to clarify project requirements when needed

- Enter job and costing information into an ERP system

- Maintain cost libraries and help improve estimating templates and systems

- Support production documentation and workflow improvements



Skills & Experience



Must Have:



- Experience in estimating, drafting, or production support within signage, fabrication, engineering, or manufacturing

- Ability to read and interpret technical drawings, PDFs, sketches, and related job information

- Strong computer skills, including spreadsheets and confidence using technical software

- Experience with, or solid working knowledge of, software such as Adobe Illustrator, AutoCAD, or 3D CAD

- Strong English communication skills, written and spoken

- Reliable internet connection and strong work discipline



Nice to Have:



- Experience with ERP systems

- Background in sign manufacturing, metal fabrication, plastic fabrication, or similar industries

- Experience with aluminium, plastics, fabrication processes, or production documentation

- Engineering, drafting, or other technical qualification



Who You Are



- You are accurate, organised, and detail-focused

- You enjoy technical work and problem-solving

- You like improving systems and helping work flow more smoothly

- You communicate clearly and professionally when working remotely

- You want a long-term role where you can grow and become a trusted part of the team

- You are comfortable working across both estimating and technical documentation tasks



Work Setup



- Remote, full-time (Monday–Friday)

- Hours: 7:30am–4:30pm PH time, with 1-hour unpaid lunch

- Alternative shift may also be available: 8:30am–5:30pm PH time

- All communication via
, chat, and video



What We Offer



- Excellent salary and reliable, on-time pay

- Long-term, stable employment

- Training and support as you learn the role

- Opportunities for growth and increased responsibility over time

- Supportive and respectful team culture

- The chance to contribute to real process improvement and technical workflow development



How to Apply



Please apply using our online application form here: 



To apply, you will need to detail the following in the application form.



1. What experience do you have in estimating, interpreting technical drawings, or preparing fabrication drawings/CAD work?

2. What industries have you worked in that relate to signage, plastic fabrication, metal fabrication, or manufacturing?

3. What software have you used for estimating or technical work (for example Excel, Google Sheets, Adobe Illustrator, AutoCAD, 3D CAD, or ERP systems)?

4. What are your expected monthly salary (in PHP) and availability?



Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.

title: Sales Manager
description:
The Everyday Cleaners, Seattle, WA. YOUR JOB HUNT STOPS HERE!

Looking to hire ASAP!



We want someone who is:



-Hungry for growth

-High-energy and proactive

-Obsessed with getting results

-Comfortable moving fast and figuring things out

-If you want something easy and predictable, this isn’t it.

-If you want to level up, take ownership, and be part of building something real, keep reading…





So Who Are We?



We’re The Everyday Cleaners—a growing residential cleaning company based in Seattle Washington!

We don’t clean homes ourselves—we build the machine behind it.

We connect customers with reliable cleaners, manage the entire experience, and make sure every job runs smoothly from booking to completion. Think of us as the operations and sales engine that keeps everything moving.

We’re growing quickly and looking for our next A+ tea
mber—someone who’s NOT average, NOT passive, and NOT here to just “do a job.”





Who are we looking for?



We’re looking for a Sales Manager who is Driven, Competitive, and Obsessed with Winning!



This is NOT a role for someone who just wants a job—we want someone with REAL ambition.

Someone who has that “DAWG” in them. You’re hungry, you bring energy every day, and you don’t wait to be told what to do—you make things happen.



The ideal candidate has experience in Sales, preferably within the Cleaning Industry, and is comfortable using tools like BookingKoala (BK), QuoteIQ (Quo), Slack, and Notion. Strong English and sharp communication skills are a must—you know how to control conversations, build trust, and close deals.



You should be goal-oriented and performance-driven, always pushing for better results and never settling for average. We value people who go above and beyond, take ownership, and look for ways to improve systems, processes, and outcomes.

This role is an opportunity to grow fast, sharpen your skills, and be part of a team that actually cares about performance. We’re looking for someone who brings intensity, executes consistently, and adds real value—someone I can learn from as well.





Why Should You Work Here?



This is not a “stable, slow, corporate job.”

This is an opportunity to get in early—before things scale—and be part of building something that’s growing fast.

Right now, we’re small, which means:

You’ll work directly with decision-makers

Your ideas actually matter and get implemented

You can grow as fast as you can prove yourself

As we grow, top performers don’t stay in the same role—they move up into more responsibility, higher pay, and leadership opportunities.





Compensation:



-5 hours per day

-20 hours per week (Wednesday–Sunday, PST)

-$100 USD per week

-Performance-based bonuses for closed deals





Responsibilities



-Close inbound leads and convert them into booked jobs

-Build and improve sales scripts, processes, and workflows

-Generate new business through outbound outreach (cold calls, partnerships, referrals)

-Ensure fast response times—speed is critical in closing deals

-Set accurate pricing and provide profitable quotes based on job scope

-Track performance, manage the CRM, and hit weekly/monthly sales targets

-Continuously test and improve sales strategies to increase revenue





Ideal Requirements:



-Prior experience in Sales for a Cleaning Company.

-Has that DAWG in them, has lots of energy and is excited for the opportunity.

-Strong communication and organizational skills.

-Stable internet connection and reliable laptop/PC

-Someone who goes above and beyond.

-Strong English.





How to Apply:



Please submit:

-A short message explaining why you believe you would be a strong fit for this Sales Manager role, keep it concise and specific.

-Your updated resume

-Applications without a message will not be considered.



Looking forward to connect! 



Best,

John

title: Startup Fleet Operations & Growth Operator | Private Car Rental (Remote)
description:
Employment Type: Part-Time (leading to Full-Time)



About the Business:

We are building a private vehicle rental operation that specializes in placing reliable economy vehicles with gig economy drivers on platforms like Uber, Lyft, and DoorDash.

This business is at the ground floor. We have one vehicle, an LLC, and a clear goal to scale to five vehicles in 90 days. There is no existing system, no active client base, and no lead flow yet. We are building that from scratch, and that is exactly why this role exists.



This is not a maintenance job. This is a build job. If you need everything already organized before you can be useful, this is not the right fit.



What This Role Actually Is:

You are the person who helps us go from one car to a real operating business. That means creating structure where there is none, owning driver communication, keeping payment enforcement tight, building a renter pipeline from zero, and helping us move fast without building a mess.

You will not be handed a playbook. You will help write it.



What You Will Own:

You will build and maintain a master tracker covering driver info, vehicle status, payment due dates, days late, GPS notes, risk level, and backup driver pipeline. You will own all driver communication including payment reminders, enforcement messages, and onboarding coordination. You will monitor GPS check-ins and flag anything that needs attention. You will help build the first simple SOPs for onboarding, late payments, and driver offboarding. You will help generate the first renter leads using
 Marketplace, local driver groups, and WhatsApp outreach. You will create a backup driver waitlist so the car is never sitting idle waiting for the next qualified renter.



What I Need From You:

You think in order. You know what to build first and what to leave alone until later. You can enforce payment timelines firmly and professionally without turning it into a conflict. You document everything. You take ownership of your lane without needing a manager standing over your shoulder. You understand that at this stage, one unpaid driver or one idle week has a real impact on the business.



Experience That Helps:

Direct experience is not required, but strong preference goes to anyone who has worked in private car rentals, Turo support, HyreCar, rideshare fleet coordination, driver operations, payment enforcement, lead generation for local service businesses,
 Marketplace listings, or remote operational coordination. You should be comfortable in Google Sheets. If you have used GPS tracking systems or fleet management tools, tell us exactly which ones and what you did with them.



Hours and Pay:

20 hours per week to start. Must be available during CST business hours for overlap. Pay is $5 to $7.50 per hour depending on experience, execution quality, and fit.



How to Apply:

Use the subject line exactly as written: The Sauce: Fleet Operator

Then send all five of the following. Applications missing any of them will not be reviewed.

One, a short summary of your experience in rentals, driver support, operations, or lead generation. Be specific. Do not write general VA experience.



Two, the exact tools you have personally used for tracking, GPS monitoring, CRM, fleet management, or lead handling. Name them and tell us what you did with them.

Three, your answer to this scenario: A driver is two days late on their weekly payment. They are still responding but keep saying tomorrow. The GPS shows the car is active daily. What do you do from this 
nt until it is resolved? Give me the full timeline, what you say, how you document it, and when the kill switch becomes part of the equation.



Four, your answer to this build question: If you stepped into a one car rental business with no lead system, no landing page, and no active clients yet, what are the first five things you build in week one and why? Keep it simple and realistic for this stage.

Five, a two to three minute Loom video explaining why you are the right fit for this specific stage of the business, not fleet management in general.

title: DevOps/Senior Full Stack Developer
description:
We are on the hunt for a DevOps/Senior Full Stack Developer who embodies technical prowess and thrives in an environment where hard work, direct communication, and good humour are a staple of our day. If you’re ready to contribute to a team that pushes the envelope while rowing towards a common mission, you might just be the ideal candidate.



In this role, your responsibilities will span several critical technology domains:

1. API and Automation Development: You will be responsible for maintaining and building our internal APIs and automations, ensuring optimal functionality and adaptability to meet our needs. You will also work on our internal tools.

Customer Integration Support: You will assist our customer-facing team with integrating our solutions into client CRMs and other APIs, facilitating efficient and seamless interactions.

2. You will be responsible for improving landing page performance through ongoing visual updates and structured A/B testing. This includes testing headlines, layouts, and user flows to increase conversion rates, analysing results, and implementing winning variations. You’ll work closely with marketing to ensure all pages are optimised for performance, user experience, and lead quality.

3. Software Maintenance: Working alongside our COO, you will help maintain and enhance our internal proprietary lead distribution software, which is pivotal for managing lead capture, validation and distribution to client APIs. This software acts as the business OS.

4. Innovation and Creative Development: Innovation is at our core. You’ll have the chance to work with cutting-edge technologies, including AI, and engage in ambitious projects where you can unleash your creative potential and have a significant hand in their development from start to finish.



About You:

Experience: You should have at least 5 years of robust experience in full-stack development, with strong expertise in Node.js, Express, and SQL databases. Proficiency in JavaScript and API’s is essential, Experience with Zapier, N8N and CRM’s (Mautic, Pipedrive etc..), Next JS, Express JS - For Backend, Vanilla JS, CSS, Figma, Framer, GIT version control commands. Python and React(MUI) knowledge is also good to have but not required.

Industry Knowledge: A background in marketing technologies and CRM systems is highly favoured, enabling you to effectively support our bespoke needs and customer integrations.

Work Ethic: You are known for your drive, diligence, and commitment to excellence, thriving in an environment free of BS and big egos, ready to face challenges head-on.

Culture Fit: You appreciate a team-oriented atmosphere where everyone contributes and maintains a spirited demeanour, even under pressure. You are dedicated to our collective mission and ready to make a positive impact on our team dynamics.



How to Apply:

If you’re excited about making a substantial impact and pushing the boundaries of technology with a team that blends hard work with fun, we want to hear from you. Send us your CV and a cover letter explaining why you’re the perfect fit for this role. During the application process, we will require you to verify your identity to maintain the authenticity of our hiring process.

title: FULFILLMENT & INVENTORY COORDINATOR (MANDARIN SPEAKING - FILIPINO)
description:
FULFILLMENT & INVENTORY COORDINATOR (MANDARIN SPEAKING - FILIPINO)



We are looking for a high-performing Fulfillment & Inventory Coordinator who thinks in inventory, flow, and execution, not just tasks.



This role is critical. You will be directly responsible for keeping products in stock, ensuring smooth fulfillment operations, coordinating with suppliers, and preventing delays before they happen.



You don’t just monitor, you anticipate, act, and solve.



REQUIREMENTS (Strict - Non-Negotiable)

Fluent in Mandarin and English (spoken and written)

Filipino candidate ONLY

Proven experience in supply chain, procurement, or inventory management

Strong background in inventory forecasting and stock management

Experience coordinating with China-based suppliers

Highly organized and detail-oriented

Proactive mindset, you don’t wait, you act

Fast thinker with strong problem-solving skills

Takes full ownership of results (especially stock availability)



RESPONSIBILITIES

Manage inventory flow and stock levels across all SKUs

Perform inventory forecasting and demand planning

Communicate and coordinate with suppliers in China

Handle procurement and purchasing decisions

Track shipments and resolve delays or risks proactively

Manage order scrubbing and fulfillment coordination

Prepare and handle shipment documentation and declarations

Act as the main point of contact for supplier coordination

Ensure zero (or minimal) stockouts, full ownership required



WEEKLY OUTPUT EXPECTATIONS:

Report on SKUs at risk of going out of stock

Identify delayed or at-risk shipments

Provide actions taken to resolve issues

Present a clear execution plan for the following week



If you’re someone who enjoys solving problems, staying ahead, and keeping things running smoothly, this role is for you.



Excited to see your application! Make sure to provide your resume link.

title: Bookkeeping (Australian experience, part<telegram class=
description:
About the Role



We are seeking an experienced Remote Bookkeeper with strong knowledge of the Australian taxation environment to support our business on an hourly, ongoing basis. This role is ideal for someone who is highly organised, detail-oriented, and confident managing day-to-day financial operations independently.



Key Responsibilities



- Maintain accurate and up-to-date financial records

- Reconcile bank, credit card, and payment gateway accounts

- Process accounts payable and accounts receivable

- Work with accountants to prepare BAS, GST, PAYG, and other compliance-related documentation

- Support payroll processing and superannuation requirements

- Assist with month-end and year-end financial reporting

- Communicate with accountants, ATO (when required), and internal stakeholders

- Provide general bookkeeping support as needed



Requirements



- Proven experience as a bookkeeper (3+ years preferred)

- Strong knowledge of Australian tax laws, BAS, GST, and payroll obligations

- Proficiency with Xero accounting software

- Excellent attention to detail and accuracy

- Strong communication skills and ability to work independently

- Reliable internet connection and ability to work remotely

- Availability to work on an hourly, as-needed basis



Preferred



- Experience working with small to medium Australian businesses

- Familiarity with Xero cloud-based bookkeeping tools and relevant automation systems



How to Apply



Please submit your resume along with a brief cover letter outlining your bookkeeping experience, software proficiency, and knowledge of Australian tax requirements.
